{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01XsbD6DJNTyRBAN7d9A6S63","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { checkRateLimit } from \"@/lib/rate-limit\";\n     5→\n     6→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n     7→  const session = await requireAuth();\n     8→  if (!session) {\n     9→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    10→  }\n    11→\n    12→  // Rate limit: 10 listings per 15 minutes per user\n    13→  const rateLimitKey = `create-listing:${session.userId}`;\n    14→  const { allowed, retryAfter } = checkRateLimit(rateLimitKey, 10);\n    15→  if (!allowed) {\n    16→    return NextResponse.json(\n    17→      { error: \"Too many listings created. Please try again later.\" },\n    18→      { status: 429, headers: { \"Retry-After\": String(retryAfter) } }\n    19→    );\n    20→  }\n    21→\n    22→  try {\n    23→    const body = await req.json();\n    24→    const {\n    25→      bookTitle,\n    26→      bookAuthor,\n    27→      bookCoverUrl,\n    28→      bookOlid,\n    29→      language,\n    30→      readingPace,\n    31→      startDate,\n    32→      meetingFormat,\n    33→      maxGroupSize,\n    34→      requiresApproval,\n    35→      platformPreference,\n    36→    } = body;\n    37→\n    38→    if (!bookTitle || !bookAuthor || !readingPace || !startDate || !meetingFormat || !maxGroupSize) {\n    39→      return NextResponse.json(\n    40→        { error: \"Missing required fields\" },\n    41→        { status: 400 }\n    42→      );\n    43→    }\n    44→\n    45→    // Input length limits to prevent abuse\n    46→    if (bookTitle.length > 300 || bookAuthor.length > 200 || readingPace.length > 200) {\n    47→      return NextResponse.json(\n    48→        { error: \"One or more fields exceed maximum length\" },\n    49→        { status: 400 }\n    50→      );\n    51→    }\n    52→\n    53→    if (![\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat)) {\n    54→      return NextResponse.json(\n    55→        { error: \"Invalid meeting format\" },\n    56→        { status: 400 }\n    57→      );\n    58→    }\n    59→\n    60→    if (!startDate || !/^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$/.test(startDate)) {\n    61→      return NextResponse.json(\n    62→        { error: \"Invalid start date format (expected YYYY-MM-DD)\" },\n    63→        { status: 400 }\n    64→      );\n    65→    }\n    66→\n    67→    const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n    68→    if (startDate < today) {\n    69→      return NextResponse.json(\n    70→        { error: \"Start date cannot be in the past\" },\n    71→        { status: 400 }\n    72→      );\n    73→    }\n    74→\n    75→    const size = parseInt(maxGroupSize, 10);\n    76→    if (isNaN(size) || size < 2 || size > 20) {\n    77→      return NextResponse.json(\n    78→        { error: \"Group size must be between 2 and 20\" },\n    79→        { status: 400 }\n    80→      );\n    81→    }\n    82→\n    83→    const platform = [\"telegram\", \"discord\"].includes(platformPreference)\n    84→      ? platformPreference\n    85→      : \"telegram\";\n    86→\n    87→    // Validate book cover URL — only allow Open Library covers to prevent SSRF/tracking\n    88→    const sanitizedCoverUrl =\n    89→      bookCoverUrl && typeof bookCoverUrl === \"string\" &&\n    90→      bookCoverUrl.startsWith(\"https://covers.openlibrary.org/\")\n    91→        ? bookCoverUrl\n    92→        : \"\";\n    93→\n    94→    // Wrap listing creation + auto-join in a transaction for atomicity\n    95→    const createTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n    96→      const result = db\n    97→        .prepare(\n    98→          `INSERT INTO listings (author_id, book_title, book_author, book_cover_url, book_olid, language, reading_pace, start_date, meeting_format, max_group_size, requires_approval, platform_preference)\n    99→           VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`\n   100→        )\n   101→        .run(\n   102→          session.userId,\n   103→          bookTitle.trim(),\n     startDate,\n   110→          meetingFormat,\n   111→          size,\n   112→          requiresApproval ? 1 : 0,\n   113→          platform\n   114→        );\n   115→\n   116→      // Auto-join the author as a member\n   117→      db.prepare(\n   118→        \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n   119→      ).run(result.lastInsertRowid, session.userId);\n   120→\n   121→      return result.lastInsertRowid;\n   122→    });\n   123→\n   124→    const listingId = createTransaction();\n   125→\n   126→    return NextResponse.json(\n   127→      { id: listingId },\n   128→      { status: 201 }\n   129→    );\n   130→  } catch (error) {\n   131→    console.error(\"Create listing error:\", error);\n   132→    return NextResponse.json(\n   133→      { {"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01PN8V8KnprW8APzXP5QcuwX","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→\n     4→const PAGE_SIZE = 20;\n     5→\n     6→export async function GET(request: NextRequest) {\n     7→  const { searchParams } = request.nextUrl;\n     8→\n     9→  const q = searchParams.get(\"q\")?.trim() || \"\";\n    10→  const meetingFormat = searchParams.get(\"meeting_format\") || \"\";\n    11→  const readingPace = searchParams.get(\"reading_pace\") || \"\";\n    12→  const startDateFrom = searchParams.get(\"start_date_from\") || \"\";\n    13→  const sort = searchParams.get(\"sort\") || \"newest\";\n    14→  const includePast = searchParams.get(\"include_past\") === \"true\";\n    15→  const pageParam = parseInt(searchParams.get(\"page\") || \"1\", 10);\n    16→  const page = isNaN(pageParam) || pageParam < 1 ? 1 : Math.min(pageParam, 1000);\n    17→\n    18→  const conditions: string[] = [\"l.is_full = 0\"];\n    19→  const params: (string | number)[] = [];\n    20→\n    21→  // Apply date floor: use the more restrictive of today or startDateFrom\n    22→  const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n    23→  const hasStartDateFilter = startDateFrom && /^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$/.test(startDateFrom);\n    24→\n    25→  if (!includePast) {\n    26→    // Use whichever is later: today or the explicit start_date_from filter\n    27→    const effectiveDate = hasStartDateFilter && startDateFrom > today ? startDateFrom : today;\n    28→    conditions.push(\"l.start_date >= ?\");\n    29→    params.push(effectiveDate);\n    30→  } else if (hasStartDateFilter) {\n    31→    // includePast is true, but user wants a specific start date floor\n    32→    conditions.push(\"l.start_date >= ?\");\n    33→    params.push(startDateFrom);\n    34→  }\n    35→\n    36→  if (q && q.length <= 300) {\n    37→    conditions.push(\"(l.book_title LIKE ? OR l.book_author LIKE ?)\");\n    38→    params.push(`%${q}%`, `%${q}%`);\n    39→  }\n    40→\n    41→  if (meetingFormat && [\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat)) {\n    42→    conditions.push(\"l.meeting_format = ?\");\n    43→    params.push(meetingFormat);\n    44→  }\n    45→\n    46→  if (readingPace && readingPace.length <= 200) {\n    47→    conditions.push(\"l.reading_pace LIKE ?\");\n    48→    params.push(`%${readingPace}%`);\n    49→  }\n    50→\n    51→  const whereClause = conditions.join(\" AND \");\n    52→\n    53→  let orderClause = \"l.created_at DESC\";\n    54→  if (sort === \"oldest\") orderClause = \"l.created_at ASC\";\n    55→  else if (sort === \"start_date\") orderClause = \"l.start_date ASC\";\n    56→\n    57→  const offset = (page - 1) * PAGE_SIZE;\n    58→\n    59→  // Get total count for pagination metadata\n    60→  const countResult = db\n    61→    .prepare(\n    62→      `SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM listings l WHERE ${whereClause}`\n    63→    )\n    64→    .get(...params) as { total: number };\n    65→\n    66→  const listings = db\n    67→    .prepare(\n    68→      `SELECT\n    69→        l.*,\n    70→        u.display_name as author_name,\n    71→        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = l.id) as member_count\n    72→      FROM listings l\n    73→      JOIN users u ON l.author_id = u.id\n    74→      WHERE ${whereClause}\n    75→      ORDER BY ${orderClause}\n    76→      LIMIT ? OFFSET ?`\n    77→    )\n    78→    .all(...params, PAGE_SIZE, offset);\n    79→\n    80→  return NextResponse.json({\n    81→    listings,\n    82→    pagination: {\n    83→      page,\n    84→      pageSize: PAGE_SIZE,\n    85→      total: countResult.total,\n    86→      totalPages: Math.ceil(countResult.total / PAGE_SIZE),\n    87→    },\n    88→  });\n    89→}\n    90→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01SoX6ZnKFwGoRApAVEkLejp","session_id":"4c5466fa-2333-4a25-bba1-4cb6c49f2287","uuid":"40a2847a-950a-4fbc-8d84-e26069cbe6e4","timestamp":"2026-03-24T01:01:15.841Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01DUaZcf4sGzReQhffHJkyGr","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n     5→\n     6→/**\n     7→ * POST /api/ratings — Submit a rating for a group member\n     8→ *\n     9→ * Body: { listingId, ratedUserId, score (1-5), comment? }\n    10→ *\n    11→ * Rules:\n    12→ * - Both rater and rated must be members of the listing\n    13→ * - The listing must be full (group completed)\n    14→ * - Cannot rate yourself\n    15→ * - One rating per rater-rated pair per listing (can update)\n    16→ */\n    17→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n    18→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    19→  if (!session) {\n    20→    return NextResponse.json(\n    21→      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n    22→      { status: 401 }\n    23→    );\n    24→  }\n    25→\n    26→  const body = await req.json();\n    27→  const { listingId, ratedUserId, score, comment } = body;\n    28→\n    29→  if (listingId == null || ratedUserId == null || score == null) {\n    30→    return NextResponse.json(\n    31→      { error: \"listingId, ratedUserId, and score are required\" },\n    32→      { status: 400 }\n    33→    );\n    34→  }\n    35→\n    36→  // Validate listingId and ratedUserId are positive integers\n    37→  if (typeof listingId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(listingId) || listingId < 1) {\n    38→    return NextResponse.json(\n    39→      { error: \"Invalid listingId\" },\n    40→      { status: 400 }\n    41→    );\n    42→  }\n    43→\n    44→  if (typeof ratedUserId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(ratedUserId) || ratedUserId < 1) {\n    45→    return NextResponse.json(\n    46→      { error: \"Invalid ratedUserId\" },\n    47→      { status: 400 }\n    48→    );\n    49→  }\n    50→\n    51→  if (score < 1 || score > 5 || !Number.isInteger(score)) {\n    52→    return NextResponse.json(\n    53→      { error: \"Score must be an integer between 1 and 5\" },\n    54→      { status: 400 }\n    55→    );\n    56→  }\n    57→\n    58→  if (ratedUserId === session.userId) {\n    59→    return NextResponse.json(\n    60→      { error: \"You cannot rate yourself\" },\n    61→      { status: 400 }\n    62→    );\n    63→  }\n    64→\n    65→  if (comment && comment.length > 1000) {\n    66→    return NextResponse.json(\n    67→      { error: \"Comment must be at most 1000 characters\" },\n    68→      { status: 400 }\n    69→    );\n    70→  }\n    71→\n    72→  // Verify listing exists and is full\n    73→  const listing = db\n    74→    .prepare(\"SELECT id, book_title, is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    75→    .get(listingId) as { id: number; book_title: string; is_full: number } | undefined;\n    76→\n    77→  if (!listing) {\n    78→    return NextResponse.json(\n    79→      { error: \"Listing not found\" },\n    80→      { status: 404 }\n    81→    );\n    82→  }\n    83→\n    84→  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    85→    return NextResponse.json(\n    86→      { error: \"Ratings are only available for completed reading groups\" },\n    87→      { status: 400 }\n    88→    );\n    89→  }\n    90→\n    91→  // Verify both users are members\n    92→  const raterMember = db\n    93→    .prepare(\n    94→      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    95→    )\n    96→    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n    97→\n    98→  if (!raterMember) {\n    99→    return NextResponse.json(\n   100→      { error: \"You must be a member of this group to rate\" },\n   101→      { status: 403 }\n   102→    );\n   103→  }\n   104→\n   105→  const ratedMember = db\n   106→    .prepare(\n   107→      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n   108→    )\n   109→    .get(listingId, ratedUserId);\n   110→\n   111→  if (!ratedMember) {\n   112→    return NextResponse.json(\n   113→      { error: \"The user you are rating must be a member of this group\" },\n   114→      { status: 400 }\n   115→    );\n   116→  }\n   117→\n   118→  // Upsert rating (update if exists)\n   119→  const existing = db\n   120→    .prepare(\n   121→      \"SELECT id FROM ratings WHERE listing_id = ? AND rater_id = ? AND rated_user_id = ?\"\n   122→    )\n   123→    .get(listingId, session.userId, ratedUserId) as { id: number } | undefined;\n   124→\n   125→  if (existing) {\n   126→    db.prepare(\n   127→      \"UPDATE ratings SET score = ?, comment = ?, created_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n   128→    ).run(score, comment || \"\", existing.id);\n   129→  } else {\n   130→    db.prepare(\n   131→      \"INSERT INTO ratings (listing_id, rater_id, rated_user_id, score, comment) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\"\n   132→    ).run(listingId, session.userId, ratedUserId, score, comment || \"\");\n   133→\n   134→    // Notify the rated user\n   135→    createNotification(\n   136→      ratedUserId,\n   137→      listingId,\n   138→      \"rating_received\",\n   139→      `Someone rated your participation in \"${listing.book_title}\"`\n   140→    );\n   141→  }\n   142→\n   143→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n   144→}\n   145→\n   146→/**\n   147→ * GET /api/ratings?listingId=X — Get ratings for a listing\n   148→ *\n   149→ * Returns ratings the current user has given and received in a listing,\n   150→ * plus the members who can still be rated.\n   151→ */\n   152→export async function GET(req: NextRequest) {\n   153→  const session = await requireAuth();\n   154→  if (!session) {\n   155→    return NextResponse.json(\n   156→      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n   157→      { status: 401 }\n   158→    );\n   159→  }\n   160→\n   161→  const listingIdParam = req.nextUrl.searchParams.get(\"listingId\");\n   162→  if (!listingIdParam) {\n   163→    return NextResponse.json(\n   164→      { error: \"listingId parameter required\" },\n   165→      { status: 400 }\n   166→    );\n   167→  }\n   168→  const listingId = parseInt(listingIdParam, 10);\n   169→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n   170→    return NextResponse.json(\n   171→      { error: \"Invalid listingId\" },\n   172→      { status: 400 }\n   173→    );\n   174→  }\n   175→\n   176→  // Verify the current user is a member of this listing\n   177→  const isMember = db\n   178→    .prepare(\"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\")\n   179→    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n   180→  if (!isMember) {\n   181→    return NextResponse.json(\n   182→      { error: \"You are not a member of this group\" },\n   183→      { status: 403 }\n   184→    );\n   185→  }\n   186→\n   187→  // Ratings the current user has given in this listing\n   188→  const givenRatings = db\n   189→    .prepare(\n   190→      `SELECT r.rated_user_id, r.score, r.comment, u.display_name\n   191→       FROM ratings r\n   192→       JOIN users u ON r.rated_user_id = u.id\n   193→       WHERE r.listing_id = ? AND r.rater_id = ?`\n   194→    )\n   195→    .all(listingId, session.userId) as {\n   196→      rated_user_id: number;\n   197→      score: number;\n   198→      comment: string;\n   199→      display_name: string;\n   200→    }[];\n   201→\n   202→  // Ratings the current user has received in this listing\n   203→  const receivedRatings = db\n   204→    .prepare(\n   205→      `SELECT r.rater_id, r.score, r.comment, u.display_name\n   206→       FROM ratings r\n   207→       JOIN users u ON r.rater_id = u.id\n   208→       WHERE r.listing_id = ? AND r.rated_user_id = ?`\n   209→    )\n   210→    .all(listingId, session.userId) as {\n   211→      rater_id: number;\n   212→      score: number;\n   213→      comment: string;\n   214→      display_name: string;\n   215→    }[];\n   216→\n   217→  return NextResponse.json({\n   218→    givenRatings,\n   219→    receivedRatings,\n   220→  });\n   221→}\n   222→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01SoX6ZnKFwGoRApAVEkLejp","session_id":"4c5466fa-2333-4a25-bba1-4cb6c49f2287","uuid":"6f9f6508-0f6c-4880-b302-0173fc931eeb","timestamp":"2026-03-24T01:01:18.697Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_019s6orhhxyvUuKL67k2oSma","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→export async function PATCH(req: NextRequest) {\n     6→  const session = await requireAuth();\n     7→  if (!session) {\n     8→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n     9→  }\n    10→\n    11→  const { displayName, bio } = await req.json();\n    12→\n    13→  if (!displayName || displayName.trim().length === 0) {\n    14→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Display name is required\" }, { status: 400 });\n    15→  }\n    16→\n    17→  if (displayName.length > 100) {\n    18→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Display name must be at most 100 characters\" }, { status: 400 });\n    19→  }\n    20→\n    21→  if (bio && bio.length > 500) {\n    22→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Bio must be at most 500 characters\" }, { status: 400 });\n    23→  }\n    24→\n    25→  db.prepare(\"UPDATE users SET display_name = ?, bio = ? WHERE id = ?\").run(\n    26→    displayName.trim(),\n    27→    (bio || \"\").trim(),\n    28→    session.userId\n    29→  );\n    30→\n    31→  // Update session\n    32→  session.displayName = displayName.trim();\n    33→  await session.save();\n    34→\n    35→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    36→}\n    37→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01SoX6ZnKFwGoRApAVEkLejp","session_id":"4c5466fa-2333-4a25-bba1-4cb6c49f2287","uuid":"00b5c77a-3bc1-4dd9-bb22-dcbd8b0d12cf","timestamp":"2026-03-24T01:01:19.174Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_017QEvi2BPCgMDWyqYA2FcXy","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import bcrypt from \"bcryptjs\";\n     3→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     4→import { getSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     5→import { checkRateLimit } from \"@/lib/rate-limit\";\n     6→\n     7→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n     8→  try {\n     9→    const { email, password, displayName } = await req.json();\n    10→\n    11→    if (!email || !password || !displayName) {\n    12→      return NextResponse.json(\n    13→        { error: \"Email, password, and display name are required\" },\n    14→        { status: 400 }\n    15→      );\n    16→    }\n    17→\n    18→    // Rate limit: 3 registrations per IP per 15 minutes\n    19→    const ip = req.headers.get(\"x-forwarded-for\")?.split(\",\")[0]?.trim() || \"unknown\";\n    20→    const { allowed, retryAfter } = checkRateLimit(`register:${ip}`, 3);\n    21→    if (!allowed) {\n    22→      return NextResponse.json(\n    23→        { error: \"Too many registration attempts. Please try again later.\" },\n    24→        { status: 429, headers: { \"Retry-After\": String(retryAfter) } }\n    25→      );\n    26→    }\n    27→\n    28→    if (password.length < 8) {\n    29→      return NextResponse.json(\n    30→        { error: \"Password must be at least 8 characters\" },\n    31→        { status: 400 }\n    32→      );\n    33→    }\n    34→\n    35→    // bcrypt only uses the first 72 bytes; cap to prevent DoS via slow hashing\n    36→    if (password.length > 72) {\n    37→      return NextResponse.json(\n    38→        { error: \"Password must be at most 72 characters\" },\n    39→        { status: 400 }\n    40→      );\n    41→    }\n    42→\n    43→    if (displayName.length > 100) {\n    44→      return NextResponse.json(\n    45→        { error: \"Display name must be at most 100 characters\" },\n    46→        { status: 400 }\n    47→      );\n    48→    }\n    49→\n    50→    if (email.length > 254) {\n    51→      return NextResponse.json(\n    52→        { error: \"Email address is too long\" },\n    53→        { status: 400 }\n    54→      );\n    55→    }\n    56→\n    57→    if (!/^[^\\s@]+@[^\\s@]+\\.[^\\s@]+$/.test(email.trim())) {\n    58→      return NextResponse.json(\n    59→        { error: \"Please provide a valid email address\" },\n    60→        { status: 400 }\n    61→      );\n    62→    }\n    63→\n    64→    // Normalize email before duplicate check (INSERT stores lowercase)\n    65→    const normalizedEmail = email.toLowerCase().trim();\n    66→\n    67→    // Check if email is already taken\n    68→    const existing = db\n    69→      .prepare(\"SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = ?\")\n    70→      .get(normalizedEmail);\n    71→    if (existing) {\n    72→      return NextResponse.json(\n    73→        { error: \"An account with this email already exists\" },\n    74→        { status: 409 }\n    75→      );\n    76→    }\n    77→\n    78→    const passwordHash = await bcrypt.hash(password, 12);\n    79→\n    80→    const result = db\n    81→      .prepare(\n    82→        \"INSERT INTO users (email, password_hash, display_name) VALUES (?, ?, ?)\"\n    83→      )\n    84→      .run(normalizedEmail, passwordHash, displayName.trim());\n    85→\n    86→    // Auto-login after registration\n    87→    const session = await getSession();\n    88→    session.userId = Number(result.lastInsertRowid);\n    89→    session.email = normalizedEmail;\n    90→    session.displayName = displayName.trim();\n    91→    await session.save();\n    92→\n    93→    return NextResponse.json(\n    94→      {\n    95→        user: {\n    96→          id: result.lastInsertRowid,\n    97→          email: normalizedEmail,\n    98→          displayName: displayName.trim(),\n    99→        },\n   100→      },\n   101→      { status: 201 }\n   102→    );\n   103→  } catch (error) {\n   104→    console.error(\"Registration error:\", error);\n   105→    return NextResponse.json(\n   106→      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n   107→      { status: 500 }\n   108→    );\n   109→  }\n   110→}\n   111→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01SoX6ZnKFwGoRApAVEkLejp","session_id":"4c5466fa-2333-4a25-bba1-4cb6c49f2287","uuid":"25227d18-e308-425c-b0e5-491cfd0b1089","timestamp":"2026-03-24T01:01:19.289Z"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01FCHLuhmjfM9rWy3krarCJs","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01V1zSS4PRicaXXLNAjyNLCF","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/auth/login/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":4691,"cache_read_input_tokens":28807,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":4691,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":37,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01SoX6ZnKFwGoRApAVEkLejp","session_id":"4c5466fa-2333-4a25-bba1-4cb6c49f2287","uuid":"58c15dab-86ef-432e-98f5-278206e85f01"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01V1zSS4PRicaXXLNAjyNLCF","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import bcrypt from \"bcryptjs\";\n     3→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     4→import { getSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     5→import { checkRateLimit } from \"@/lib/rate-limit\";\n     6→\n     7→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n     8→  try {\n     9→    const { email, password } = await req.json();\n    10→\n    11→    if (!email || !password) {\n    12→      return NextResponse.json(\n    13→        { error: \"Email and password are required\" },\n    14→        { status: 400 }\n    15→      );\n    16→    }\n    17→\n    18→    // Rate limit: 5 login attempts per email+IP per 15 minutes\n    19→    const ip = req.headers.get(\"x-forwarded-for\")?.split(\",\")[0]?.trim() || \"unknown\";\n    20→    const rateLimitKey = `login:${ip}:${email.toLowerCase().trim()}`;\n    21→    const { allowed, retryAfter } = checkRateLimit(rateLimitKey, 5);\n    22→    if (!allowed) {\n    23→      return NextResponse.json(\n    24→        { error: \"Too many login attempts. Please try again later.\" },\n    25→        { status: 429, headers: { \"Retry-After\": String(retryAfter) } }\n    26→      );\n    27→    }\n    28→\n    29→    const user = db\n    30→      .prepare(\"SELECT id, email, password_hash, display_name FROM users WHERE email = ?\")\n    31→      .get(email.toLowerCase().trim()) as\n    32→      | { id: number; email: string; password_hash: string; display_name: string }\n    33→      | undefined;\n    34→\n    35→    if (!user) {\n    36→      return NextResponse.json(\n    37→        { error: \"Invalid email or password\" },\n    38→        { status: 401 }\n    39→      );\n    40→    }\n    41→\n    42→    const valid = await bcrypt.compare(password, user.password_hash);\n    43→    if (!valid) {\n    44→      return NextResponse.json(\n    45→        { error: \"Invalid email or password\" },\n    46→        { status: 401 }\n    47→      );\n    48→    }\n    49→\n    50→    const session = await getSession();\n    51→    session.userId = user.id;\n    52→    session.email = user.email;\n    53→    session.displayName = user.display_name;\n    54→    await session.save();\n    55→\n    56→    return NextResponse.json({\n    57→      user: {\n    58→        id: user.id,\n    59→        email: user.email,\n    60→        displayName: user.display_name,\n    61→      },\n    62→    });\n    63→  } catch (error) {\n    64→    console.error(\"Login error:\", error);\n    65→    return NextResponse.json(\n    66→      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n    67→      { status: 500 }\n    68→    );\n    69→  }\n    70→}\n    71→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01SoX6ZnKFwGoRApAVEkLejp","session_id":"4c5466fa-2333-4a25-bba1-4cb6c49f2287","uuid":"3d6a1ecf-d455-470c-ac11-ada198a340af","timestamp":"2026-03-24T01:01:22.147Z"}
{"type":"system","subtype":"task_progress","task_id":"aa8122251812e89bc","tool_use_id":"toolu_01SoX6ZnKFwGoRApAVEkLejp","description":"Reading app/api/telegram/webhook/route.ts","usage":{"total_tokens":34038,"tool_uses":16,"duration_ms":20143},"last_tool_name":"Read","uuid":"661f2e65-45c8-476e-8585-2634c6f05f2a","session_id":"4c5466fa-2333-4a25-bba1-4cb6c49f2287"}
{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01FCHLuhmjfM9rWy3krarCJs","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01ABED3SKpnpLYb6ELSEgjhg","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/telegram/webhook/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":4691,"cache_read_input_tokens":28807,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":4691,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":37,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01SoX6ZnKFwGoRApAVEkLejp","session_id":"4c5466fa-2333-4a25-bba1-4cb6c49f2287","uuid":"b064df96-dd13-4eeb-8ee7-1d694229f656"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01ABED3SKpnpLYb6ELSEgjhg","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import {\n     4→  createChatInviteLink,\n     5→  exportChatInviteLink,\n     6→  sendMessage,\n     7→  parseListingIdFromPayload,\n     8→  escapeHtml,\n     9→} from \"@/lib/telegram\";\n    10→import { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n    11→\n    12→/**\n    13→ * Telegram webhook endpoint.\n    14→ *\n    15→ * Handles two types of updates:\n    16→ *\n    17→ * 1. `my_chat_member` — bot was added to a group\n    18→ *    When the author creates a group via the deep link, the bot is\n    19→ *    automatically added. We detect this, generate an invite link,\n    20→ *    and save it to the listing.\n    21→ *\n    22→ * 2. `message` with `/start listing_ID` — the bot receives a start\n    23→ *    command in a group with a payload referencing a listing.\n    24→ */\n    25→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n    26→  // Verify webhook secret — fail closed if not configured\n    27→  const webhookSecret = process.env.TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET;\n    28→  if (!webhookSecret) {\n    29→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Webhook not configured\" }, { status: 500 });\n    30→  }\n    31→  const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\");\n    32→  if (headerSecret !== webhookSecret) {\n    33→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n    34→  }\n    35→\n    36→  let update: Record<string, unknown>;\n    37→  try {\n    38→    update = await req.json();\n    39→  } catch {\n    40→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid JSON\" }, { status: 400 });\n    41→  }\n    42→\n    43→  // Handle bot being added to a group chat\n    44→  if (update.my_chat_member) {\n    45→    await handleChatMemberUpdate(\n    46→      update.my_chat_member as ChatMemberUpdate\n    47→    );\n    48→  }\n    49→\n    50→  // Handle /start command in groups (fallback mechanism)\n    51→  if (update.message) {\n    52→    await handleMessage(update.message as TelegramMessage);\n    53→  }\n    54→\n    55→  // Always return 200 to Telegram to avoid retries\n    56→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    57→}\n    58→\n    59→interface ChatMemberUpdate {\n    60→  chat: {\n    61→    id: number;\n    62→    title?: string;\n    63→    type: string;\n    64→  };\n    65→  from: {\n    66→    id: number;\n    67→    first_name: string;\n    68→  };\n    69→  new_chat_member: {\n    70→    user: {\n    71→      id: number;\n    72→      is_bot: boolean;\n    73→    };\n    74→    status: string;\n    75→  };\n    76→}\n    77→\n    78→interface TelegramMessage {\n    79→  chat: {\n    80→    id: number;\n    81→    type: string;\n    82→    title?: string;\n    83→  };\n    84→  text?: string;\n    85→  from?: {\n    86→    id: number;\n    87→  };\n    88→}\n    89→\n    90→/**\n    91→ * When the bot is added to a group, check if it's related to a listing.\n    92→ *\n    93→ * The deep link format is: t.me/BOT?startgroup=listing_ID\n    94→ * When a user creates a group through this link, Telegram:\n    95→ * 1. Creates the group\n    96→ * 2. Adds the bot as a member\n    97→ * 3. Sends a `my_chat_member` update\n    98→ *\n    99→ * We use the group title or a pending mapping to associate the chat with a listing.\n   100→ */\n   101→async function handleChatMemberUpdate(update: ChatMemberUpdate) {\n   102→  const { chat, new_chat_member } = update;\n   103→\n   104→  // Only process when bot is added (member or administrator)\n   105→  if (\n   106→    !new_chat_member.user.is_bot ||\n   107→    ![\"member\", \"administrator\"].includes(new_chat_member.status)\n   108→  ) {\n   109→    return;\n   110→  }\n   111→\n   112→  // Only process group chats\n   113→  if (![\"group\", \"supergroup\"].includes(chat.type)) {\n   114→    return;\n   115→  }\n   116→\n   117→  // Try to find the listing this group belongs to.\n   118→  // Strategy 1: Check pending_telegram_groups mapping table\n   119→  const pending = db\n   120→    .prepare(\n   121→      \"SELECT listing_id FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE telegram_chat_id = ?\"\n   122→    )\n   123→    .get(chat.id) as { listing_id: number } | undefined;\n   124→\n   125→  if (pending) {\n   126→    await linkTelegramToListing(pending.listing_id, chat.id);\n   127→    db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE telegram_chat_id = ?\").run(\n   128→      chat.id\n   129→    );\n   130→    return;\n   131→  }\n   132→\n   133→  // Strategy 2: Check for listings awaiting auto-telegram (most recent unlinked full listing by this author)\n   134→  // We store the chat ID and wait for the /start command or title match\n   135→  // For now, store the mapping and send a welcome message\n   136→  await sendMessage(\n   137→    chat.id,\n   138→    \"Hello! I'm the Bookmate bot. I'll help set up this reading group.\\n\\n\" +\n   139→      'If this group was created for a Bookmate listing, I\\'ll automatically generate an invite link. ' +\n   140→      \"The organizer can also type <code>/link</code> to manually trigger the setup.\"\n   141→  );\n   142→\n   143→  // Store the chat for potential later linking\n   144→  try {\n   145→    db.prepare(\n   146→      \"INSERT OR IGNORE INTO telegram_chats (chat_id, chat_title, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, datetime('now'))\"\n   147→    ).run(chat.id, chat.title || \"\");\n   148→  } catch {\n   149→    // Table might not exist yet on first run — handled gracefully\n   150→  }\n   151→}\n   152→\n   153→/**\n   154→ * Handle messages in group chats.\n   155→ * Supports /start with payload and /link command.\n   156→ */\n   157→async function handleMessage(message: TelegramMessage) {\n   158→  if (!message.text || ![\"group\", \"supergroup\"].includes(message.chat.type)) {\n   159→    return;\n   160→  }\n   161→\n   162→  const text = message.text.trim();\n   163→\n   164→  // Handle /start with listing payload (sent when group is created via deep link)\n   165→  if (text.startsWith(\"/start \")) {\n   166→    const payload = text.replace(\"/start \", \"\").trim();\n   167→    const listingId = parseListingIdFromPayload(payload);\n   168→    if (listingId) {\n   169→      // Verify the sender is the listing author to prevent unauthorized linking\n   170→      const telegramUserId = message.from?.id;\n   171→      if (!telegramUserId) {\n   172→        await sendMessage(message.chat.id, \"Could not identify the sender.\");\n   173→        return;\n   174→      }\n   175→\n   176→      const linkedUser = db\n   177→        .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM telegram_user_links WHERE telegram_user_id = ?\")\n   178→        .get(telegramUserId) as { user_id: number } | undefined;\n   179→\n   180→      if (linkedUser) {\n   181→        const listing = db\n   182→          .prepare(\"SELECT author_id FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   183→          .get(listingId) as { author_id: number } | undefined;\n   184→\n   185→        if (listing && listing.author_id === linkedUser.user_id) {\n   186→          await linkTelegramToListing(listingId, message.chat.id);\n   187→          return;\n   188→        }\n   189→      }\n   190→\n   191→      // If no linked user or not the author, store for later linking via /link command\n   192→      await sendMessage(\n   193→        message.chat.id,\n   194→        \"To link this group to a Bookmate listing, the listing author should use the <code>/link</code> command.\"\n   195→      );\n   196→      return;\n   197→    }\n   198→  }\n   199→\n   200→  // Handle /link command — allow manual linking\n   201→  // Security: only show listings authored by a Bookmate user linked to this Telegram user\n   202→  if (text === \"/link\") {\n   203→    const telegramUserId = message.from?.id;\n   204→    if (!telegramUserId) {\n   205→      await sendMessage(message.chat.id, \"Could not identify the sender.\");\n   206→      return;\n   207→    }\n   208→\n   209→    // Look up the Bookmate user linked to this Telegram user\n   210→    const linkedUser = db\n   211→      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM telegram_user_links WHERE telegram_user_id = ?\")\n   212→      .get(telegramUserId) as { user_id: number } | undefined;\n   213→\n   214→    if (!linkedUser) {\n   215→      await sendMessage(\n   216→        message.chat.id,\n   217→        \"Your Telegram account is not linked to a Bookmate account. \" +\n   218→          \"Please use the Telegram setup link from your Bookmate listing page to link your account first.\"\n   219→      );\n   220→      return;\n   221→    }\n   222→\n   223→    // Only show unlinked listings authored by this verified user\n   224→    const unlinkedListings = db\n   225→      .prepare(\n   226→        `SELECT id, book_title FROM listings\n   227→         WHERE is_full = 1 AND (telegram_link = '' OR telegram_link IS NULL)\n   228→         AND telegram_chat_id IS NULL\n   229→         AND author_id = ?\n   230→         ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5`\n   231→      )\n   232→      .all(linkedUser.user_id) as { id: number; book_title: string }[];\n   233→\n   234→    if (unlinkedListings.length === 0) {\n   235→      await sendMessage(\n   236→        message.chat.id,\n   237→        \"No unlinked reading groups found for your account. The group may already be set up!\"\n   238→      );\n   239→      return;\n   240→    }\n   241→\n   242→    if (unlinkedListings.length === 1) {\n   243→      await linkTelegramToListing(unlinkedListings[0].id, message.chat.id);\n   244→      return;\n   245→    }\n   246→\n   247→    const listText = unlinkedListings\n   248→      .map((l) => `  /link_${l.id} — \"${escapeHtml(l.book_title)}\"`)\n   249→      .join(\"\\n\");\n   250→    await sendMessage(\n   251→      message.chat.id,\n   252→      `Multiple reading groups need a Telegram link. Pick one:\\n\\n${listText}`\n   253→    );\n   254→    return;\n   255→  }\n   256→\n   257→  // Handle /link_ID command — require verified ownership\n   258→  const linkMatch = text.match(/^\\/link_(\\d+)$/);\n   259→  if (linkMatch) {\n   260→    const telegramUserId = message.from?.id;\n   261→    if (!telegramUserId) {\n   262→      await sendMessage(message.chat.id, \"Could not identify the sender.\");\n   263→      return;\n   264→    }\n   265→\n   266→    const linkedUser = db\n   267→      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM telegram_user_links WHERE telegram_user_id = ?\")\n   268→      .get(telegramUserId) as { user_id: number } | undefined;\n   269→\n   270→    if (!linkedUser) {\n   271→      await sendMessage(\n   272→        message.chat.id,\n   273→        \"Your Telegram account is not linked to a Bookmate account.\"\n   274→      );\n   275→      return;\n   276→    }\n   277→\n   278→    const listingId = parseInt(linkMatch[1], 10);\n   279→\n   280→    // Verify this user is the listing author and the listing is full\n   281→    const listing = db\n   282→      .prepare(\"SELECT author_id, is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   283→      .get(listingId) as { author_id: number; is_full: number } | undefined;\n   284→\n   285→    if (!listing || listing.author_id !== linkedUser.user_id) {\n   286→      await sendMessage(\n   287→        message.chat.id,\n   288→        \"You can only link Telegram groups to your own Bookmate listings.\"\n   289→      );\n   290→      return;\n   291→    }\n   292→\n   293→    if (!listing.is_full) {\n   294→      await sendMessage(\n   295→        message.chat.id,\n   296→        \"This listing's group is not full yet. You can link a Telegram group once the group reaches its maximum size.\"\n   297→      );\n   298→      return;\n   299→    }\n   300→\n   301→    await linkTelegramToListing(listingId, message.chat.id);\n   302→  }\n   303→}\n   304→\n   305→/**\n   306→ * Link a Telegram chat to a listing:\n   307→ * 1. Generate an invite link\n   308→ * 2. Save it to the listing\n   309→ * 3. Notify all members\n   310→ * 4. Send a confirmation message to the Telegram group\n   311→ */\n   312→async function linkTelegramToListing(listingId: number, chatId: number) {\n   313→  const listing = db\n   314→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   315→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n   316→\n   317→  if (!listing) {\n   318→    await sendMessage(chatId, \"Could not find that reading group on Bookmate.\");\n   319→    return;\n   320→  }\n   321→\n   322→  if (listing.telegram_link) {\n   323→    await sendMessage(chatId, \"This reading group already has a Telegram link set up!\");\n   324→    return;\n   325→  }\n   326→\n   327→  // Try to create an invite link\n   328→  let inviteLink = await createChatInviteLink(chatId);\n   329→  if (!inviteLink) {\n   330→    // Fallback: export the default invite link\n   331→    inviteLink = await exportChatInviteLink(chatId);\n   332→  }\n   333→\n   334→  if (!inviteLink) {\n   335→    await sendMessage(\n   336→      chatId,\n   337→      \"I couldn't generate an invite link. Please make sure I have admin permissions in this group, \" +\n   338→        \"then try again with /link\"\n   339→    );\n   340→    return;\n   341→  }\n   342→\n   343→  // Save to database\n   344→  db.prepare(\n   345→    \"UPDATE listings SET telegram_link = ?, telegram_chat_id = ? WHERE id = ?\"\n   346→  ).run(inviteLink, chatId, listingId);\n   347→\n   348→  // Notify all members on Bookmate\n   349→  const members = db\n   350→    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n   351→    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];\n   352→\n   353→  const bookTitle = listing.book_title as string;\n   354→  for (const member of members) {\n   355→    createNotification(\n   356→      member.user_id,\n   357→      listingId,\n   358→      \"telegram_ready\",\n   359→      `The Telegram group for \"${bookTitle}\" is ready! Click to view the invite link.`\n   360→    );\n   361→  }\n   362→\n   363→  // Send confirmation to the Telegram group\n   364→  // Escape book title to prevent HTML injection via Telegram's HTML parser\n   365→  await sendMessage(\n   366→    chatId,\n   367→    `This group is now linked to the Bookmate reading group for \"<b>${escapeHtml(bookTitle)}</b>\".\\n\\n` +\n   368→      `Invite link: ${inviteLink}\\n\\n` +\n   369→      \"All group members have been notified on Bookmate. Happy reading!\"\n   370→  );\n   371→}\n   372→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01SoX6ZnKFwGoRApAVEkLejp","session_id":"4c5466fa-2333-4a25-bba1-4cb6c49f2287","uuid":"b0644818-69b6-4cb8-af19-73548526bf28","timestamp":"2026-03-24T01:01:22.791Z"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01FCHLuhmjfM9rWy3krarCJs","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01W14gHGhdmc51i9k6GFFpwr","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/discord/webhook/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":4691,"cache_read_input_tokens":28807,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":4691,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":37,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01SoX6ZnKFwGoRApAVEkLejp","session_id":"4c5466fa-2333-4a25-bba1-4cb6c49f2287","uuid":"726e596c-0d62-47a4-a248-9d8f13a41f7e"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01W14gHGhdmc51i9k6GFFpwr","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import {\n     4→  createTextChannel,\n     5→  createChannelInvite,\n     6→  sendChannelMessage,\n     7→  isValidSnowflake,\n     8→} from \"@/lib/discord\";\n     9→import { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n    10→\n    11→/**\n    12→ * Discord webhook endpoint for bot events.\n    13→ *\n    14→ * This endpoint handles:\n    15→ * 1. POST with { type: \"link\", guildId, listingId } - Link a Discord server to a listing\n    16→ *    (called by the bot or by an admin setup flow)\n    17→ *\n    18→ * Note: Unlike Telegram's push-based webhook, Discord uses Gateway (WebSocket)\n    19→ * for real-time events. This endpoint is used as an HTTP callback for\n    20→ * simpler integration scenarios or manual triggering.\n    21→ */\n    22→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n    23→  // Verify webhook secret — fail closed if not configured\n    24→  const webhookSecret = process.env.DISCORD_WEBHOOK_SECRET;\n    25→  if (!webhookSecret) {\n    26→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Webhook not configured\" }, { status: 500 });\n    27→  }\n    28→  const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\");\n    29→  if (headerSecret !== webhookSecret) {\n    30→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n    31→  }\n    32→\n    33→  try {\n    34→    const body = await req.json();\n    35→    const { type } = body;\n    36→\n    37→    if (type === \"link\") {\n    38→      return handleLink(body);\n    39→    }\n    40→\n    41→    // Discord Interaction verification (for future slash command support)\n    42→    if (type === 1) {\n    43→      // PING - respond with PONG\n    44→      return NextResponse.json({ type: 1 });\n    45→    }\n    46→\n    47→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unknown event type\" }, { status: 400 });\n    48→  } catch (err) {\n    49→    console.error(\"Discord webhook error:\", err);\n    50→    return NextResponse.json(\n    51→      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n    52→      { status: 500 }\n    53→    );\n    54→  }\n    55→}\n    56→\n    57→async function handleLink(body: {\n    58→  guildId: string;\n    59→  listingId: number;\n    60→  channelId?: string;\n    61→}) {\n    62→  const { guildId, listingId, channelId } = body;\n    63→\n    64→  if (!guildId || !listingId) {\n    65→    return NextResponse.json(\n    66→      { error: \"Missing guildId or listingId\" },\n    67→      { status: 400 }\n    68→    );\n    69→  }\n    70→\n    71→  if (typeof listingId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(listingId) || listingId < 1) {\n    72→    return NextResponse.json(\n    73→      { error: \"Invalid listingId\" },\n    74→      { status: 400 }\n    75→    );\n    76→  }\n    77→\n    78→  // Validate Discord snowflake IDs to prevent path traversal in API URLs\n    79→  if (typeof guildId !== \"string\" || !isValidSnowflake(guildId)) {\n    80→    return NextResponse.json(\n    81→      { error: \"Invalid guildId format\" },\n    82→      { status: 400 }\n    83→    );\n    84→  }\n    85→  if (channelId !== undefined && (typeof channelId !== \"string\" || !isValidSnowflake(channelId))) {\n    86→    return NextResponse.json(\n    87→      { error: \"Invalid channelId format\" },\n    88→      { status: 400 }\n    89→    );\n    90→  }\n    91→\n    92→  const listing = db\n    93→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    94→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    95→\n    96→  if (!listing) {\n    97→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    98→  }\n    99→\n   100→  if (!listing.is_full) {\n   101→    return NextResponse.json(\n   102→      { error: \"Cannot link Discord until the group is full\" },\n   103→      { status: 400 }\n   104→    );\n   105→  }\n   106→\n   107→  if (listing.discord_link) {\n   108→    return NextResponse.json(\n   109→      { error: \"Discord link already set for this listing\" },\n   110→      { status: 400 }\n   111→    );\n   112→  }\n   113→\n   114→  let targetChannelId = channelId;\n   115→\n   116→  // If no channel specified, create one\n   117→  if (!targetChannelId) {\n   118→    const bookTitle = String(listing.book_title || \"reading-group\");\n   119→    const channelName = `bookmate-${bookTitle\n   120→      .toLowerCase()\n   121→      .replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, \"-\")\n   122→      .slice(0, 80)}`;\n   123→\n   124→    const channel = await createTextChannel(\n   125→      guildId,\n   126→      channelName,\n   127→      `Bookmate reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" by ${listing.book_author}`\n   128→    );\n   129→\n   130→    if (!channel) {\n   131→      return NextResponse.json(\n   132→        { error: \"Failed to create Discord channel. Make sure the bot has Manage Channels permission.\" },\n   133→        { status: 500 }\n   134→      );\n   135→    }\n   136→\n   137→    targetChannelId = channel.id;\n   138→  }\n   139→\n   140→  // Create invite link\n   141→  const inviteLink = await createChannelInvite(targetChannelId);\n   142→  if (!inviteLink) {\n   143→    return NextResponse.json(\n   144→      { error: \"Failed to create invite link. Make sure the bot has Create Instant Invite permission.\" },\n   145→      { status: 500 }\n   146→    );\n   147→  }\n   148→\n   149→  // Save to DB\n   150→  db.prepare(\n   151→    \"UPDATE listings SET discord_link = ?, discord_channel_id = ? WHERE id = ?\"\n   152→  ).run(inviteLink, targetChannelId, listingId);\n   153→\n   154→  // Notify all members\n   155→  const members = db\n   156→    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n   157→    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];\n   158→\n   159→  for (const member of members) {\n   160→    createNotification(\n   161→      member.user_id,\n   162→      listingId,\n   163→      \"discord_ready\",\n   164→      `The Discord channel for \"${listing.book_title}\" is ready! Join to start discussing.`\n   165→    );\n   166→  }\n   167→\n   168→  // Send welcome message to the channel\n   169→  await sendChannelMessage(\n   170→    targetChannelId,\n   171→    `Welcome to the **${listing.book_title}** reading group! 📚\\n\\n` +\n   172→      `This channel was created by Bookmate for your reading group.\\n` +\n   173→      `**Reading pace:** ${listing.reading_pace}\\n` +\n   174→      `**Start date:** ${listing.start_date}\\n\\n` +\n   175→      `Happy reading! 🎉`\n   176→  );\n   177→\n   178→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true, inviteLink });\n   179→}\n   180→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01SoX6ZnKFwGoRApAVEkLejp","session_id":"4c5466fa-2333-4a25-bba1-4cb6c49f2287","uuid":"f76be232-de7d-4bec-908d-5724f7bf0387","timestamp":"2026-03-24T01:01:22.816Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01RAhHH8CvDiskZXcb4gHWwB","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→export async function POST(\n     6→  req: NextRequest,\n     7→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n     8→) {\n     9→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    10→  if (!session) {\n    11→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    12→  }\n    13→\n    14→  const { id } = await params;\n    15→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    16→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    17→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    18→  }\n    19→\n    20→  const listing = db\n    21→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    22→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    23→\n    24→  if (!listing) {\n    25→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    26→  }\n    27→\n    28→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    29→    return NextResponse.json(\n    30→      { error: \"Only the listing author can set the Telegram link\" },\n    31→      { status: 403 }\n    32→    );\n    33→  }\n    34→\n    35→  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    36→    return NextResponse.json(\n    37→      { error: \"Group must be full before sharing a platform link\" },\n    38→      { status: 400 }\n    39→    );\n    40→  }\n    41→\n    42→  const { telegramLink } = await req.json();\n    43→\n    44→  if (!telegramLink || !telegramLink.startsWith(\"https://t.me/\") || telegramLink.length > 512) {\n    45→    return NextResponse.json(\n    46→      { error: \"Please provide a valid Telegram invite link (https://t.me/..., max 512 characters)\" },\n    47→      { status: 400 }\n    48→    );\n    49→  }\n    50→\n    51→  db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET telegram_link = ? WHERE id = ?\").run(\n    52→    telegramLink.trim(),\n    53→    listingId\n    54→  );\n    55→\n    56→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    57→}\n    58→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01SoX6ZnKFwGoRApAVEkLejp","session_id":"4c5466fa-2333-4a25-bba1-4cb6c49f2287","uuid":"e39ef948-0f09-45c0-89b1-fd22f214bafd","timestamp":"2026-03-24T01:01:25.916Z"}

* GET /api/listings/[id]/auto-telegram\n     8→ *\n     9→ * Returns the Telegram deep link for one-click group creation.\n    10→ * Only available to the listing author when the group is full\n    11→ * and no Telegram link has been set yet.\n    12→ */\n    13→export async function GET(\n    14→  _req: NextRequest,\n    15→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n    16→) {\n    17→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    18→  if (!session) {\n    19→    return NextResponse.json(\n    20→      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n    21→      { status: 401 }\n    22→    );\n    23→  }\n    24→\n    25→  if (!isBotConfigured()) {\n    26→    return NextResponse.json(\n    27→      { error: \"Telegram bot not configured\", botConfigured: false },\n    28→      { status: 404 }\n    29→    );\n    30→  }\n    31→\n    32→  const { id } = await params;\n    33→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    34→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    35→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    36→  }\n    37→\n    38→  const listing = db\n    39→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    40→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    41→\n    42→  if (!listing) {\n    43→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    44→  }\n    45→\n    46→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    47→    return NextResponse.json(\n    48→      { error: \"Only the organizer can create the Telegram group\" },\n    49→      { status: 403 }\n    50→    );\n    51→  }\n    52→\n    53→  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    54→    return NextResponse.json(\n    55→      { error: \"Group must be full before creating a Telegram group\" },\n    56→      { status: 400 }\n    57→    );\n    58→  }\n    59→\n    60→  if (listing.telegram_link) {\n    61→    return NextResponse.json(\n    62→      { error: \"Telegram link already set\", telegramLink: listing.telegram_link },\n    63→      { status: 400 }\n    64→    );\n    65→  }\n    66→\n    67→  const deepLink = await generateGroupDeepLink(listingId);\n    68→  if (!deepLink) {\n    69→    return NextResponse.json(\n    70→      { error: \"Failed to generate deep link. Check bot configuration.\" },\n    71→      { status: 500 }\n    72→    );\n    73→  }\n    74→\n    75→  return NextResponse.json({\n    76→    deepLink,\n    77→    instructions:\n    78→      \"Click the link to open Telegram and create a group. The bot will automatically generate an invite link for your reading group.\",\n    79→  });\n    80→}\n    81→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01SoX6ZnKFwGoRApAVEkLejp","session_id":"4c5466fa-2333-4a25-bba1-4cb6c49f2287","uuid":"d8aab3d8-5575-41e3-92a7-1ad3c7399556","timestamp":"2026-03-24T01:01:26.456Z"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_013xB7JhKquCrZgMSQczzQj9","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01J4BUtetE9sQEtMK6WYS8Zb","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/telegram/setup/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":2673,"cache_read_input_tokens":41399,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":2673,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":34,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01SoX6ZnKFwGoRApAVEkLejp","session_id":"4c5466fa-2333-4a25-bba1-4cb6c49f2287","uuid":"654db683-6425-44a2-93df-dfc87786043f"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01J4BUtetE9sQEtMK6WYS8Zb","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import { isBotConfigured, setWebhook, getBotInfo } from \"@/lib/telegram\";\n     3→\n     4→/**\n     5→ * POST /api/telegram/setup\n     6→ *\n     7→ * Sets up the Telegram webhook. Should be called once after deployment.\n     8→ * Requires TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN and TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_URL env vars.\n     9→ *\n    10→ * Protected by a setup secret to prevent unauthorized access.\n    11→ */\n    12→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n    13→  const setupSecret = process.env.TELEGRAM_SETUP_SECRET;\n    14→  if (!setupSecret) {\n    15→    return NextResponse.json(\n    16→      { error: \"TELEGRAM_SETUP_SECRET not configured\" },\n    17→      { status: 500 }\n    18→    );\n    19→  }\n    20→\n    21→  const body = await req.json();\n    22→  if (body.secret !== setupSecret) {\n    23→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n    24→  }\n    25→\n    26→  if (!isBotConfigured()) {\n    27→    return NextResponse.json(\n    28→      { error: \"TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN not configured\" },\n    29→      { status: 500 }\n    30→    );\n    31→  }\n    32→\n    33→  const webhookUrl = process.env.TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_URL;\n    34→  if (!webhookUrl) {\n    35→    return NextResponse.json(\n    36→      { error: \"TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_URL not configured\" },\n    37→      { status: 500 }\n    38→    );\n    39→  }\n    40→\n    41→  const bot = await getBotInfo();\n    42→  if (!bot) {\n    43→    return NextResponse.json(\n    44→      { error: \"Failed to connect to Telegram API. Check your bot token.\" },\n    45→      { status: 500 }\n    46→    );\n    47→  }\n    48→\n    49→  const success = await setWebhook(webhookUrl);\n    50→  if (!success) {\n    51→    return NextResponse.json(\n    52→      { error: \"Failed to set webhook\" },\n    53→      { status: 500 }\n    54→    );\n    55→  }\n    56→\n    57→  return NextResponse.json({\n    58→    ok: true,\n    59→    bot: { username: bot.username, id: bot.id },\n    60→    webhookUrl,\n    61→  });\n    62→}\n    63→\n    64→/**\n    65→ * GET /api/telegram/setup\n    66→ *\n    67→ * Returns the current Telegram bot configuration status.\n    68→ */\n    69→export async function GET() {\n    70→  return NextResponse.json({\n    71→    botConfigured: isBotConfigured(),\n    72→    webhookUrlConfigured: !!process.env.TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_URL,\n    73→  });\n    74→}\n    75→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01SoX6ZnKFwGoRApAVEkLejp","session_id":"4c5466fa-2333-4a25-bba1-4cb6c49f2287","uuid":"09cf8869-1d33-48b0-ade5-5fd4b9150300","timestamp":"2026-03-24T01:01:29.751Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01SuJpT12Ud44dcUA9yNYQFq","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import { isBotConfigured, getBotInfo } from \"@/lib/discord\";\n     3→\n     4→/**\n     5→ * Discord bot setup endpoint.\n     6→ * Returns bot info and invite URL for verification.\n     7→ *\n     8→ * Protected by DISCORD_SETUP_SECRET env var.\n     9→ */\n    10→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n    11→  const { secret } = await req.json();\n    12→  const setupSecret = process.env.DISCORD_SETUP_SECRET || \"\";\n    13→\n    14→  if (!setupSecret || secret !== setupSecret) {\n    15→    return NextResponse.json(\n    16→      { error: \"Invalid setup secret\" },\n    17→      { status: 403 }\n    18→    );\n    19→  }\n    20→\n    21→  if (!isBotConfigured()) {\n    22→    return NextResponse.json(\n    23→      {\n    24→        error:\n    25→          \"Discord bot is not configured. Set DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN and DISCORD_CLIENT_ID environment variables.\",\n    26→      },\n    27→      { status: 503 }\n    28→    );\n    29→  }\n    30→\n    31→  const botInfo = await getBotInfo();\n    32→  if (!botInfo) {\n    33→    return NextResponse.json(\n    34→      { error: \"Failed to connect to Discord API. Check your bot token.\" },\n    35→      { status: 500 }\n    36→    );\n    37→  }\n    38→\n    39→  return NextResponse.json({\n    40→    ok: true,\n    41→    bot: {\n    42→      id: botInfo.id,\n    43→      username: botInfo.username,\n    44→    },\n    45→    message: `Discord bot \"${botInfo.username}\" is configured and ready.`,\n    46→  });\n    47→}\n    48→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01SoX6ZnKFwGoRApAVEkLejp","session_id":"4c5466fa-2333-4a25-bba1-4cb6c49f2287","uuid":"b5fd1324-7f78-46c5-8fa3-809d8e9bdb61","timestamp":"2026-03-24T01:01:29.928Z"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01KYYTQZo9u1YNQZEvtwsBX6","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01LjFL6UPVhEmcPTMG9FUA4V","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/profile/reputation/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":2504,"cache_read_input_tokens":44072,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":2504,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":36,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01SoX6ZnKFwGoRApAVEkLejp","session_id":"4c5466fa-2333-4a25-bba1-4cb6c49f2287","uuid":"d98e4e03-444a-4c9c-9c31-39b33f4d4785"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01LjFL6UPVhEmcPTMG9FUA4V","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→/**\n     6→ * GET /api/profile/reputation?userId=X\n     7→ *\n     8→ * Returns a user's reputation score and rating breakdown.\n     9→ * If no userId is provided, returns the current user's reputation.\n    10→ */\n    11→export async function GET(req: NextRequest) {\n    12→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    13→  if (!session) {\n    14→    return NextResponse.json(\n    15→      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n    16→      { status: 401 }\n    17→    );\n    18→  }\n    19→\n    20→  const userIdParam = req.nextUrl.searchParams.get(\"userId\");\n    21→  const userId = userIdParam ? parseInt(userIdParam, 10) : session.userId;\n    22→  const isOwnProfile = userId === session.userId;\n    23→\n    24→  if (userIdParam && isNaN(userId as number)) {\n    25→    return NextResponse.json(\n    26→      { error: \"Invalid userId parameter\" },\n    27→      { status: 400 }\n    28→    );\n    29→  }\n    30→\n    31→  // Average score\n    32→  const stats = db\n    33→    .prepare(\n    34→      `SELECT\n    35→        COUNT(*) as total_ratings,\n    36→        ROUND(AVG(score), 1) as average_score,\n    37→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as five_star,\n    38→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as four_star,\n    39→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as three_star,\n    40→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as two_star,\n    41→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as one_star\n    42→       FROM ratings\n    43→       WHERE rated_user_id = ?`\n    44→    )\n    45→    .get(userId) as {\n    46→      total_ratings: number;\n    47→      average_score: number | null;\n    48→      five_star: number;\n    49→      four_star: number;\n    50→      three_star: number;\n    51→      two_star: number;\n    52→      one_star: number;\n    53→    };\n    54→\n    55→  // Number of completed groups\n    56→  const completedGroups = db\n    57→    .prepare(\n    58→      `SELECT COUNT(*) as count\n    59→       FROM listing_members lm\n    60→       JOIN listings l ON lm.listing_id = l.id\n    61→       WHERE lm.user_id = ? AND l.is_full = 1`\n    62→    )\n    63→    .get(userId) as { count: number };\n    64→\n    65→  // Number of groups where this user has given ratings\n    66→  const groupsRated = db\n    67→    .prepare(\n    68→      `SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT listing_id) as count\n    69→       FROM ratings\n    70→       WHERE rater_id = ?`\n    71→    )\n    72→    .get(userId) as { count: number };\n    73→\n    74→  // Recent ratings received (with anonymized feedback)\n    75→  const recentRatings = db\n    76→    .prepare(\n    77→      `SELECT r.score, r.comment, r.created_at, l.book_title\n    78→       FROM ratings r\n    79→       JOIN listings l ON r.listing_id = l.id\n    80→       WHERE r.rated_user_id = ?\n    81→       ORDER BY r.created_at DESC\n    82→       LIMIT 10`\n    83→    )\n    84→    .all(userId) as {\n    85→      score: number;\n    86→      comment: string;\n    87→      created_at: string;\n    88→      book_title: string;\n    89→    }[];\n    90→\n    91→  // Strip comments from ratings when viewing other users' profiles (privacy)\n    92→  const sanitizedRatings = isOwnProfile\n    93→    ? recentRatings\n    94→    : recentRatings.map(({ score, created_at, book_title }) => ({\n    95→        score,\n    96→        created_at,\n    97→        book_title,\n    98→      }));\n    99→\n   100→  return NextResponse.json({\n   101→    reputation: {\n   102→      averageScore: stats.average_score || 0,\n   103→      totalRatings: stats.total_ratings,\n   104→      completedGroups: completedGroups.count,\n   105→      groupsRated: groupsRated.count,\n   106→      breakdown: {\n   107→        5: stats.five_star || 0,\n   108→        4: stats.four_star || 0,\n   109→        3: stats.three_star || 0,\n   110→        2: stats.two_star || 0,\n   111→        1: stats.one_star || 0,\n   112→      },\n   113→      recentRatings: sanitizedRatings,\n   114→    },\n   115→  });\n   116→}\n   117→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01SoX6ZnKFwGoRApAVEkLejp","session_id":"4c5466fa-2333-4a25-bba1-4cb6c49f2287","uuid":"96b67e98-c969-4419-97dc-014d1d4c2919","timestamp":"2026-03-24T01:01:32.628Z"}
{"type":"system","subtype":"task_progress","task_id":"aa8122251812e89bc","tool_use_id":"toolu_01SoX6ZnKFwGoRApAVEkLejp","description":"Reading app/api/profile/genres/route.ts","usage":{"total_tokens":47429,"tool_uses":25,"duration_ms":30543},"last_tool_name":"Read","uuid":"81dd864a-5702-43b4-8ed8-e70c3812d40f","session_id":"4c5466fa-2333-4a25-bba1-4cb6c49f2287"}
{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01KYYTQZo9u1YNQZEvtwsBX6","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01SoPD8RFLaADdF8CsJeJ3FU","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/profile/genres/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":2504,"cache_read_input_tokens":44072,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":2504,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":36,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01SoX6ZnKFwGoRApAVEkLejp","session_id":"4c5466fa-2333-4a25-bba1-4cb6c49f2287","uuid":"249f44a6-dd6d-49b6-ac90-3796e325b14b"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01SoPD8RFLaADdF8CsJeJ3FU","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→const AVAILABLE_GENRES = [\n     6→  \"Literary Fiction\",\n     7→  \"Science Fiction\",\n     8→  \"Fantasy\",\n     9→  \"Mystery\",\n    10→  \"Thriller\",\n    11→  \"Romance\",\n    12→  \"Historical Fiction\",\n    13→  \"Horror\",\n    14→  \"Dystopian\",\n    15→  \"Adventure\",\n    16→  \"Contemporary Fiction\",\n    17→  \"Magical Realism\",\n    18→  \"Classics\",\n    19→  \"Short Stories\",\n    20→  \"Young Adult\",\n    21→  \"Graphic Novels\",\n    22→];\n    23→\n    24→interface GenreRow {\n    25→  genre: string;\n    26→}\n    27→\n    28→export async function GET() {\n    29→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    30→  if (!session) {\n    31→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    32→  }\n    33→\n    34→  const userGenres = db.prepare(\n    35→    \"SELECT genre FROM user_genres WHERE user_id = ? ORDER BY genre\"\n    36→  ).all(session.userId) as GenreRow[];\n    37→\n    38→  return NextResponse.json({\n    39→    genres: userGenres.map((g) => g.genre),\n    40→    available: AVAILABLE_GENRES,\n    41→  });\n    42→}\n    43→\n    44→export async function PUT(req: NextRequest) {\n    45→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    46→  if (!session) {\n    47→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    48→  }\n    49→\n    50→  const { genres } = await req.json();\n    51→\n    52→  if (!Array.isArray(genres)) {\n    53→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"genres must be an array\" }, { status: 400 });\n    54→  }\n    55→\n    56→  // Validate all genres\n    57→  const validGenres = genres.filter((g: string) => AVAILABLE_GENRES.includes(g));\n    58→\n    59→  // Replace all genres in a transaction\n    60→  const updateGenres = db.transaction(() => {\n    61→    db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM user_genres WHERE user_id = ?\").run(session.userId);\n    62→    const insert = db.prepare(\"INSERT INTO user_genres (user_id, genre) VALUES (?, ?)\");\n    63→    for (const genre of validGenres) {\n    64→      insert.run(session.userId, genre);\n    65→    }\n    66→  });\n    67→\n    68→  updateGenres();\n    69→\n    70→  return NextResponse.json({ genres: validGenres });\n    71→}\n    72→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01SoX6ZnKFwGoRApAVEkLejp","session_id":"4c5466fa-2333-4a25-bba1-4cb6c49f2287","uuid":"a9b70b98-5ad0-446e-b031-67163143db0d","timestamp":"2026-03-24T01:01:33.015Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_017dWegArFr8z5c54ZD7aLbX","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→interface ReadingRow {\n     6→  id: number;\n     7→  book_title: string;\n     8→  book_author: string;\n     9→  book_cover_url: string;\n    10→  reading_pace: string;\n    11→  start_date: string;\n    12→  meeting_format: string;\n    13→  is_full: number;\n    14→  telegram_link: string;\n    15→  discord_link: string;\n    16→  member_count: number;\n    17→  max_group_size: number;\n    18→  author_name: string;\n    19→  joined_at: string;\n    20→}\n    21→\n    22→export async function GET() {\n    23→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    24→  if (!session) {\n    25→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    26→  }\n    27→\n    28→  // Get all listings the user is a member of (including ones they authored)\n    29→  const readings = db.prepare(`\n    30→    SELECT\n    31→      l.id,\n    32→      l.book_title,\n    33→      l.book_author,\n    34→      l.book_cover_url,\n    35→      l.reading_pace,\n    36→      l.start_date,\n    37→      l.meeting_format,\n    38→      l.is_full,\n    39→      l.telegram_link,\n    40→      l.discord_link,\n    41→      l.max_group_size,\n    42→      u.display_name as author_name,\n    43→      lm.joined_at,\n    44→      (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = l.id) as member_count\n    45→    FROM listing_members lm\n    46→    JOIN listings l ON l.id = lm.listing_id\n    47→    JOIN users u ON u.id = l.author_id\n    48→    WHERE lm.user_id = ?\n    49→    ORDER BY lm.joined_at DESC\n    50→  `).all(session.userId) as ReadingRow[];\n    51→\n    52→  const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n    53→\n    54→  // Reading history: completed groups (full + start_date in the past)\n    55→  // Upcoming: not yet started and not full\n    56→  // Active: everything else that has started or is full (but not completed)\n    57→  const isHistory = (r: ReadingRow) => r.is_full === 1 && r.start_date < today;\n    58→  const isUpcoming = (r: ReadingRow) => r.is_full === 0 && r.start_date > today;\n    59→\n    60→  const history = readings.filter(isHistory);\n    61→  const upcoming = readings.filter(isUpcoming);\n    62→  const active = readings.filter(\n    63→    (r) => !isHistory(r) && !isUpcoming(r) && (r.is_full === 1 || r.start_date <= today)\n    64→  );\n    65→\n    66→  return NextResponse.json({\n    67→    active,\n    68→    history,\n    69→    upcoming,\n    70→    total: readings.length,\n    71→  });\n    72→}\n    73→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01SoX6ZnKFwGoRApAVEkLejp","session_id":"4c5466fa-2333-4a25-bba1-4cb6c49f2287","uuid":"93f71dab-d6fb-4a32-9fb9-45ab4ed93619","timestamp":"2026-03-24T01:01:33.406Z"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01KYYTQZo9u1YNQZEvtwsBX6","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_011Jzdzog41K2gYJiwZKbJRk","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/notifications/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":2504,"cache_read_input_tokens":44072,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":2504,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":36,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01SoX6ZnKFwGoRApAVEkLejp","session_id":"4c5466fa-2333-4a25-bba1-4cb6c49f2287","uuid":"00c745f2-5116-49f0-845b-09f6054c7008"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_011Jzdzog41K2gYJiwZKbJRk","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→export async function GET() {\n     6→  const session = await requireAuth();\n     7→  if (!session) {\n     8→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n     9→  }\n    10→\n    11→  const notifications = db\n    12→    .prepare(\n    13→      `SELECT n.*, l.book_title\n    14→       FROM notifications n\n    15→       LEFT JOIN listings l ON n.listing_id = l.id\n    16→       WHERE n.user_id = ?\n    17→       ORDER BY n.created_at DESC\n    18→       LIMIT 50`\n    19→    )\n    20→    .all(session.userId);\n    21→\n    22→  const unreadCount = db\n    23→    .prepare(\n    24→      \"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM notifications WHERE user_id = ? AND is_read = 0\"\n    25→    )\n    26→    .get(session.userId) as { count: number };\n    27→\n    28→  return NextResponse.json({\n    29→    notifications,\n    30→    unreadCount: unreadCount.count,\n    31→  });\n    32→}\n    33→\n    34→export async function PATCH(req: NextRequest) {\n    35→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    36→  if (!session) {\n    37→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    38→  }\n    39→\n    40→  const { notificationId } = await req.json();\n    41→\n    42→  if (notificationId) {\n    43→    // Validate notificationId is a positive integer\n    44→    if (typeof notificationId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(notificationId) || notificationId < 1) {\n    45→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid notification ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    46→    }\n    47→    db.prepare(\n    48→      \"UPDATE notifications SET is_read = 1 WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    49→    ).run(notificationId, session.userId);\n    50→  } else {\n    51→    // Mark all as read\n    52→    db.prepare(\n    53→      \"UPDATE notifications SET is_read = 1 WHERE user_id = ?\"\n    54→    ).run(session.userId);\n    55→  }\n    56→\n    57→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    58→}\n    59→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01SoX6ZnKFwGoRApAVEkLejp","session_id":"4c5466fa-2333-4a25-bba1-4cb6c49f2287","uuid":"7533fa86-8f75-418e-9382-7c35631656f2","timestamp":"2026-03-24T01:01:33.750Z"}
