{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01Qhu73aWWPt2V6d7zfYcZrf","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→/**\n     2→ * Telegram Bot API integration for automatic group creation.\n     3→ *\n     4→ * When TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN is set, the system can:\n     5→ * 1. Generate deep links for one-click group creation\n     6→ * 2. Detect when the bot is added to a group (via webhook)\n     7→ * 3. Auto-generate and save invite links\n     8→ *\n     9→ * Flow:\n    10→ * - Author clicks \"Create Telegram Group\" → opens deep link in Telegram\n    11→ * - Telegram prompts author to create a group with the bot\n    12→ * - Bot receives `my_chat_member` update via webhook\n    13→ * - Bot creates an invite link and saves it to the listing\n    14→ */\n    15→\n    16→const BOT_TOKEN = process.env.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN || \"\";\n    17→const TELEGRAM_API = `https://api.telegram.org/bot${BOT_TOKEN}`;\n    18→\n    19→export function isBotConfigured(): boolean {\n    20→  return BOT_TOKEN.length > 0;\n    21→}\n    22→\n    23→/**\n    24→ * Call the Telegram Bot API.\n    25→ */\n    26→async function callApi<T = unknown>(\n    27→  method: string,\n    28→  params?: Record<string, unknown>\n    29→): Promise<{ ok: boolean; result?: T; description?: string }> {\n    30→  const res = await fetch(`${TELEGRAM_API}/${method}`, {\n    31→    method: \"POST\",\n    32→    headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n    33→    body: JSON.stringify(params || {}),\n    34→  });\n    35→  return res.json();\n    36→}\n    37→\n    38→/**\n    39→ * Get bot info (username, id).\n    40→ */\n    41→export async function getBotInfo(): Promise<{\n    42→  id: number;\n    43→  username: string;\n    44→  first_name: string;\n    45→} | null> {\n    46→  const res = await callApi<{\n    47→    id: number;\n    48→    username: string;\n    49→    first_name: string;\n    50→  }>(\"getMe\");\n    51→  return res.ok ? res.result! : null;\n    52→}\n    53→\n    54→/**\n    55→ * Generate a deep link that opens Telegram and prompts the user\n    56→ * to create a new group with the bot already added.\n    57→ *\n    58→ * Format: https://t.me/BOT_USERNAME?startgroup=listing_LISTING_ID\n    59→ *\n    60→ * When the user creates the group, Telegram adds the bot and\n    61→ * sends a `my_chat_member` update to our webhook.\n    62→ */\n    63→export async function generateGroupDeepLink(\n    64→  listingId: number\n    65→): Promise<string | null> {\n    66→  const bot = await getBotInfo();\n    67→  if (!bot) return null;\n    68→  return `https://t.me/${bot.username}?startgroup=listing_${listingId}`;\n    69→}\n    70→\n    71→/**\n    72→ * Create an invite link for a chat where the bot is an admin.\n    73→ */\n    74→export async function createChatInviteLink(\n    75→  chatId: number | string\n    76→): Promise<string | null> {\n    77→  const res = await callApi<{ invite_link: string }>(\n    78→    \"createChatInviteLink\",\n    79→    {\n    80→      chat_id: chatId,\n    81→      name: \"Bookmate Reading Group\",\n    82→      creates_join_request: false,\n    83→    }\n    84→  );\n    85→  if (res.ok && res.result) {\n    86→    return res.result.invite_link;\n    87→  }\n    88→  return null;\n    89→}\n    90→\n    91→/**\n    92→ * Export the existing invite link for a chat (fallback).\n    93→ */\n    94→export async function exportChatInviteLink(\n    95→  chatId: number | string\n    96→): Promise<string | null> {\n    97→  const res = await callApi<string>(\"exportChatInviteLink\", {\n    98→    chat_id: chatId,\n    99→  });\n   100→  if (res.ok && res.result) {\n   101→    return res.result;\n   102→  }\n   103→  return null;\n   104→}\n   105→\n   106→/**\n   107→ * Escape HTML special characters for Telegram HTML parse mode.\n   108→ * Telegram's HTML parser interprets <, >, &, and \" — all must be escaped\n   109→ * in user-supplied content to prevent message injection.\n   110→ */\n   111→export function escapeHtml(text: string): string {\n   112→  return text\n   113→    .replace(/&/g, \"&amp;\")\n   114→    .replace(/</g, \"&lt;\")\n   115→    .replace(/>/g, \"&gt;\")\n   116→    .replace(/\"/g, \"&quot;\");\n   117→}\n   118→\n   119→/**\n   120→ * Send a message to a Telegram chat.\n   121→ */\n   122→export async function sendMessage(\n   123→  chatId: number | string,\n   124→  text: string\n   125→): Promise<boolean> {\n   126→  const res = await callApi(\"sendMessage\", {\n   127→    chat_id: chatId,\n   128→    text,\n   129→    parse_mode: \"HTML\",\n   130→  });\n   131→  return res.ok;\n   132→}\n   133→\n   134→/**\n   135→ * Set up webhook URL for receiving Telegram updates.\n   136→ */\n   137→export async function setWebhook(url: string): Promise<boolean> {\n   138→  const res = await callApi(\"setWebhook\", {\n   139→    url,\n   140→    allowed_updates: [\"my_chat_member\", \"message\"],\n   141→  });\n   142→  return res.ok;\n   143→}\n   144→\n   145→/**\n   146→ * Parse the listing ID from a /start command payload.\n   147→ * Expected format: \"listing_123\"\n   148→ */\n   149→export function parseListingIdFromPayload(\n   150→  payload: string\n   151→): number | null {\n   152→  const match = payload.match(/^listing_(\\d+)$/);\n   153→  return match ? parseInt(match[1], 10) : null;\n   154→}\n   155→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01SoX6ZnKFwGoRApAVEkLejp","session_id":"4c5466fa-2333-4a25-bba1-4cb6c49f2287","uuid":"d1de7640-791a-4a3d-acd4-59006c5218b1","timestamp":"2026-03-24T01:01:37.914Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01WkEizw3BxbWArxmGT3Tphu","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→\"use client\";\n     2→\n     3→import { useEffect, useState, useCallback } from \"react\";\n     4→import { useParams, useRouter } from \"next/navigation\";\n     5→import BookCover from \"@/components/BookCover\";\n     6→\n     7→interface Member {\n     8→  id: number;\n     9→  display_name: string;\n    10→  bio: string;\n    11→  joined_at: string;\n    12→}\n    13→\n    14→interface Applicant {\n    15→  application_id: number;\n    16→  id: number;\n    17→  display_name: string;\n    18→  bio: string;\n    19→  applied_at: string;\n    20→}\n    21→\n    22→interface Listing {\n    23→  id: number;\n    24→  author_id: number;\n    25→  book_title: string;\n    26→  book_author: string;\n    27→  book_cover_url: string;\n    28→  language: string;\n    29→  reading_pace: string;\n    30→  start_date: string;\n    31→  meeting_format: string;\n    32→  max_group_size: number;\n    33→  telegram_link: string;\n    34→  is_full: number;\n    35→  requires_approval: number;\n    36→  created_at: string;\n    37→  author_name: string;\n    38→  members: Member[];\n    39→  memberCount: number;\n    40→  isMember: boolean;\n    41→  isAuthor: boolean;\n    42→  hasApplied: boolean;\n    43→  applicationStatus: string;\n    44→  pendingApplicants: Applicant[];\n    45→  currentUserId: number | null;\n    46→  telegramBotConfigured: boolean;\n    47→  discordBotConfigured: boolean;\n    48→  platform_preference: string;\n    49→  discord_link: string;\n    50→}\n    51→\n    52→export default function ListingDetail() {\n    53→  const { id } = useParams();\n    54→  const router = useRouter();\n    55→  const [listing, setListing] = useState<Listing | null>(null);\n    56→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n    57→  const [joining, setJoining] = useState(false);\n    58→  const [applying, setApplying] = useState(false);\n    59→  const [decidingId, setDecidingId] = useState<number | null>(null);\n    60→  const [telegramLink, setTelegramLink] = useState(\"\");\n    61→  const [telegramSaving, setTelegramSaving] = useState(false);\n    62→  const [autoTelegramLoading, setAutoTelegramLoading] = useState(false);\n    63→  const [autoTelegramLink, setAutoTelegramLink] = useState(\"\");\n    64→  const [showManualFallback, setShowManualFallback] = useState(false);\n    65→  // Discord state\n    66→  const [discordLink, setDiscordLink] = useState(\"\");\n    67→  const [discordSaving, setDiscordSaving] = useState(false);\n    68→  const [autoDiscordLoading, setAutoDiscordLoading] = useState(false);\n    69→  const [autoDiscordLink, setAutoDiscordLink] = useState(\"\");\n    70→  const [showDiscordManualFallback, setShowDiscordManualFallback] = useState(false);\n    71→  const [error, setError] = useState(\"\");\n    72→\n    73→  // Rating state\n    74→  const [givenRatings, setGivenRatings] = useState<Record<number, { score: number; comment: string }>>({});\n    75→  const [ratingScores, setRatingScores] = useState<Record<number, number>>({});\n    76→  const [ratingComments, setRatingComments] = useState<Record<number, string>>({});\n    77→  const [ratingSaving, setRatingSaving] = useState<number | null>(null);\n    78→  const [ratingMessage, setRatingMessage] = useState(\"\");\n    79→\n    80→  const [notAvailable, setNotAvailable] = useState(false);\n    81→\n    82→  const [fetchError, setFetchError] = useState(false);\n    83→  const [showDeleteConfirm, setShowDeleteConfirm] = useState(false);\n    84→  const [deleting, setDeleting] = useState(false);\n    85→\n    86→  const fetchListing = useCallback(async () => {\n    87→    try {\n    88→      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}`);\n    89→      const data = await res.json();\n    90→      if (res.ok && data.listing) {\n    91→        setListing(data.listing);\n    92→        setTelegramLink(data.listing.telegram_link || \"\");\n    93→        setDiscordLink(data.listing.discord_link || \"\");\n    94→      } else if (res.status === 404) {\n    95→        setNotAvailable(true);\n    96→      } else {\n    97→        setFetchError(true);\n    98→      }\n    99→    } catch {\n   100→      setFetchError(true);"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01SoX6ZnKFwGoRApAVEkLejp","session_id":"4c5466fa-2333-4a25-bba1-4cb6c49f2287","uuid":"e3ef5c96-6bcb-4e00-89ba-f37abaee679b","timestamp":"2026-03-24T01:01:41.283Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_0182K8hw1P1qqGBXs5zBJjmR","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→/**\n     2→ * Discord Bot API integration for automatic server/channel creation.\n     3→ *\n     4→ * When DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN and DISCORD_CLIENT_ID are set, the system can:\n     5→ * 1. Generate bot invite URLs so authors can add the bot to their server\n     6→ * 2. Create text channels and invite links via Discord REST API\n     7→ * 3. Receive interaction events via webhook\n     8→ *\n     9→ * Flow:\n    10→ * - Author clicks \"Set up Discord\" → opens bot invite URL\n    11→ * - Author adds bot to their server\n    12→ * - Bot receives an interaction or the author triggers channel creation\n    13→ * - Bot creates a text channel + invite link, saves to listing\n    14→ */\n    15→\n    16→const BOT_TOKEN = process.env.DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN || \"\";\n    17→const CLIENT_ID = process.env.DISCORD_CLIENT_ID || \"\";\n    18→const DISCORD_API = \"https://discord.com/api/v10\";\n    19→\n    20→export function isBotConfigured(): boolean {\n    21→  return BOT_TOKEN.length > 0 && CLIENT_ID.length > 0;\n    22→}\n    23→\n    24→/**\n    25→ * Validate a Discord snowflake ID (numeric string, 17-20 digits).\n    26→ * Used to prevent path traversal in Discord API URL construction.\n    27→ */\n    28→export function isValidSnowflake(id: string): boolean {\n    29→  return /^\\d{17,20}$/.test(id);\n    30→}\n    31→\n    32→/**\n    33→ * Call the Discord REST API.\n    34→ */\n    35→async function callApi<T = unknown>(\n    36→  endpoint: string,\n    37→  method: string = \"GET\",\n    38→  body?: Record<string, unknown>\n    39→): Promise<{ ok: boolean; data?: T; error?: string }> {\n    40→  try {\n    41→    const res = await fetch(`${DISCORD_API}${endpoint}`, {\n    42→      method,\n    43→      headers: {\n    44→        Authorization: `Bot ${BOT_TOKEN}`,\n    45→        \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\",\n    46→      },\n    47→      body: body ? JSON.stringify(body) : undefined,\n    48→    });\n    49→\n    50→    if (!res.ok) {\n    51→      const errData = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));\n    52→      return {\n    53→        ok: false,\n    54→        error: (errData as Record<string, string>).message || `HTTP ${res.status}`,\n    55→      };\n    56→    }\n    57→\n    58→    const data = (await res.json()) as T;\n    59→    return { ok: true, data };\n    60→  } catch (err) {\n    61→    return { ok: false, error: String(err) };\n    62→  }\n    63→}\n    64→\n    65→/**\n    66→ * Get bot user info.\n    67→ */\n    68→export async function getBotInfo(): Promise<{\n    69→  id: string;\n    70→  username: string;\n    71→} | null> {\n    72→  const res = await callApi<{ id: string; username: string }>(\"/users/@me\");\n    73→  return res.ok && res.data ? res.data : null;\n    74→}\n    75→\n    76→/**\n    77→ * Generate a bot invite URL that includes the listing ID in the state parameter.\n    78→ * The bot needs permissions: Manage Channels, Create Instant Invite, Send Messages\n    79→ *\n    80→ * Permission bits:\n    81→ * - MANAGE_CHANNELS (0x10) = 16\n    82→ * - CREATE_INSTANT_INVITE (0x1) = 1\n    83→ * - SEND_MESSAGES (0x800) = 2048\n    84→ * - VIEW_CHANNEL (0x400) = 1024\n    85→ * Total: 3089\n    86→ */\n    87→export function generateBotInviteUrl(listingId: number): string {\n    88→  const permissions = 3089;\n    89→  const state = `listing_${listingId}`;\n    90→  return `https://discord.com/oauth2/authorize?client_id=${CLIENT_ID}&permissions=${permissions}&scope=bot&state=${encodeURIComponent(state)}`;\n    91→}\n    92→\n    93→/**\n    94→ * Create a text channel in a guild.\n    95→ */\n    96→export async function createTextChannel(\n    97→  guildId: string,\n    98→  name: string,\n    99→  topic?: string\n   100→): Promise<{ id: string; name: string } | null> {\n   101→  const res = await callApi<{ id: string; name: string }>(\n   102→    `/guilds/${guildId}/channels`,\n   103→    \"POST\",\n   104→    {\n   105→      name: name.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9-]/g, \"-\").slice(0, 100),\n   106→      type: 0, // GUILD_TEXT\n   107→      topic: topic || \"Bookmate reading group discussion channel\",\n   108→    }\n   109→  );\n   110→  return res.ok && res.data ? res.data : null;\n   111→}\n   112→\n   113→/**\n   114→ * Create an invite for a channel.\n   115→ */\n   116→export async function createChannelInvite(\n   117→  channelId: string,\n   118→  maxAge: number = 0 // 0 = never expires\n   119→): Promise<string | null> {\n   120→  const res = await callApi<{ code: string }>(\n   121→    `/channels/${channelId}/invites`,\n   122→    \"POST\",\n   123→    {\n   124→      max_age: maxAge,\n   125→      max_uses: 0,\n   126→      unique: true,\n   127→    }\n   128→  );\n   129→  if (res.ok && res.data) {\n   130→    return `https://discord.gg/${res.data.code}`;\n   131→  }\n   132→  return null;\n   133→}\n   134→\n   135→/**\n   136→ * Send a message to a Discord channel.\n   137→ */\n   138→export async function sendChannelMessage(\n   139→  channelId: string,\n   140→  content: string\n   141→): Promise<boolean> {\n   142→  const res = await callApi(\n   143→    `/channels/${channelId}/messages`,\n   144→    \"POST\",\n   145→    { content }\n   146→  );\n   147→  return res.ok;\n   148→}\n   149→\n   150→/**\n   151→ * Get guild (server) info.\n   152→ */\n   153→export async function getGuild(\n   154→  guildId: string\n   155→): Promise<{ id: string; name: string } | null> {\n   156→  const res = await callApi<{ id: string; name: string }>(\n   157→    `/guilds/${guildId}`\n   158→  );\n   159→  return res.ok && res.data ? res.data : null;\n   160→}\n   161→\n   162→/**\n   163→ * List guilds the bot is a member of.\n   164→ */\n   165→export async function getBotGuilds(): Promise<\n   166→  { id: string; name: string }[]\n   167→> {\n   168→  const res = await callApi<{ id: string; name: string }[]>(\n   169→    \"/users/@me/guilds\"\n   170→  );\n   171→  return res.ok && res.data ? res.data : [];\n   172→}\n   173→\n   174→/**\n   175→ * Parse listing ID from a state or payload string.\n   176→ * Expected format: \"listing_123\"\n   177→ */\n   178→export function parseListingIdFromState(state: string): number | null {\n   179→  const match = state.match(/^listing_(\\d+)$/);\n   180→  return match ? parseInt(match[1], 10) : null;\n   181→}\n   182→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01SoX6ZnKFwGoRApAVEkLejp","session_id":"4c5466fa-2333-4a25-bba1-4cb6c49f2287","uuid":"010783fe-6ca7-4308-9d60-3950bb304933","timestamp":"2026-03-24T01:01:41.502Z"}

setRatingMessage(\"\");\n   164→    try {\n   165→      const res = await fetch(\"/api/ratings\", {\n   166→        method: \"POST\",\n   167→        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n   168→        body: JSON.stringify({\n   169→          listingId: parseInt(id as string, 10),\n   170→          ratedUserId: memberId,\n   171→          score,\n   172→          comment: ratingComments[memberId] || \"\",\n   173→        }),\n   174→      });\n   175→      const data = await res.json();\n   176→      if (!res.ok) {\n   177→        setRatingMessage(data.error || {"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01HLCe62jhNSv8xRp95xdwbj","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import nodemailer from \"nodemailer\";\n     2→\n     3→const isConfigured =\n     4→  !!process.env.SMTP_HOST &&\n     5→  !!process.env.SMTP_PORT &&\n     6→  !!process.env.SMTP_FROM;\n     7→\n     8→let transporter: nodemailer.Transporter | null = null;\n     9→\n    10→function getTransporter(): nodemailer.Transporter | null {\n    11→  if (!isConfigured) return null;\n    12→  if (!transporter) {\n    13→    transporter = nodemailer.createTransport({\n    14→      host: process.env.SMTP_HOST,\n    15→      port: parseInt(process.env.SMTP_PORT || \"587\", 10),\n    16→      secure: process.env.SMTP_SECURE === \"true\",\n    17→      ...(process.env.SMTP_USER && process.env.SMTP_PASS\n    18→        ? {\n    19→            auth: {\n    20→              user: process.env.SMTP_USER,\n    21→              pass: process.env.SMTP_PASS,\n    22→            },\n    23→          }\n    24→        : {}),\n    25→    });\n    26→  }\n    27→  return transporter;\n    28→}\n    29→\n    30→export async function sendEmail(\n    31→  to: string,\n    32→  subject: string,\n    33→  text: string,\n    34→  html?: string\n    35→): Promise<boolean> {\n    36→  const t = getTransporter();\n    37→  if (!t) return false;\n    38→\n    39→  try {\n    40→    await t.sendMail({\n    41→      from: process.env.SMTP_FROM,\n    42→      to,\n    43→      subject,\n    44→      text,\n    45→      html: html || text,\n    46→    });\n    47→    return true;\n    48→  } catch (err) {\n    49→    console.error(\"Failed to send email:\", err);\n    50→    return false;\n    51→  }\n    52→}\n    53→\n    54→export function isEmailConfigured(): boolean {\n    55→  return isConfigured;\n    56→}\n    57→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01SoX6ZnKFwGoRApAVEkLejp","session_id":"4c5466fa-2333-4a25-bba1-4cb6c49f2287","uuid":"852f61b5-8533-4a5c-98ce-bd603dd573f0","timestamp":"2026-03-24T01:01:45.227Z"}

Please try again.\");\n   302→    } finally {\n   303→      setAutoTelegramLoading(false);\n   304→    }\n   305→  };\n   306→\n   307→  const isValidDiscordLink = (link: string) => {\n   308→    return /^https:\\/\\/(discord\\.gg|discord\\.com\\/invite)\\/[\\w-]+$/.test(link.trim());\n   309→  };\n   310→\n   311→  const discordLinkError = discordLink && !isValidDiscordLink(discordLink)\n   312→    ? \"Link must start with https://discord.gg/ or https://discord.com/invite/\"\n   313→    : \"\";\n   314→\n   315→  const handleDiscordSave = async () => {\n   316→    if (!isValidDiscordLink(discordLink)) return;\n   317→    setDiscordSaving(true);\n   318→    setError(\"\");\n   319→    try {\n   320→      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/discord`, {\n   321→        method: \"POST\",\n   322→        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n   323→        body: JSON.stringify({ discordLink: discordLink.trim() }),\n   324→      });\n   325→      const data = await res.json();\n   326→      if (!res.ok) {\n   327→        setError(data.error);\n   328→        return;\n   329→      }\n   330→      await fetchListing();\n   331→    } catch {\n   332→      setError(\"Failed to save link. Please try again.\");\n   333→    } finally {\n   334→      setDiscordSaving(false);\n   335→    }\n   336→  };\n   337→\n   338→  const handleAutoDiscord = async () => {\n   339→    setAutoDiscordLoading(true);\n   340→    setError(\"\");\n   341→    try {\n   342→      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/auto-discord`);\n   343→      const data = await res.json();\n   344→      if (!res.ok) {\n   345→        setError(data.error || \"Failed to generate Discord link\");\n   346→        return;\n   347→      }\n   348→      setAutoDiscordLink(data.inviteUrl);\n   349→    } catch {\n   350→      setError(\"Failed to connect. Please try again.\");\n   351→    } finally {\n   352→      setAutoDiscordLoading(false);\n   353→    }\n   354→  };\n   355→\n   356→  const formatMeetingType = (f: string) => {\n   357→    const labels: Record<string, string> = {\n   358→      voice: \"Voice calls\",\n   359→      text: \"Text chat\",\n   360→      mixed: \"Mixed (voice + text)\",\n   361→    };\n   362→    return labels[f] || f;\n   363→  };\n   364→\n   365→  if (loading) {\n   366→    return (\n   367→      <div className=\"text-center py-16\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n   368→        <p style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>Loading...</p>\n   369→      </div>\n   370→    );\n   371→  }\n   372→\n   373→  if (fetchError) {\n   374→    return (\n   375→      <div className=\"text-center py-16\">\n   376→        <h2 className=\"text-2xl mb-2\">Something went wrong</h2>\n   377→        <p style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n   378→          Failed to load this listing. Please try again.\n   379→        </p>\n   380→        <button\n   381→          onClick={() => { setFetchError(false); setLoading(true); fetchListing(); }}\n   382→          className=\"mt-4 px-4 py-2 rounded cursor-pointer\"\n   383→          style={{ background: \"var(--color-accent)\", color: \"white\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n   384→        >\n   385→          Retry\n   386→        </button>\n   387→      </div>\n   388→    );\n   389→  }\n   390→\n   391→  if (notAvailable) {\n   392→    return (\n   393→      <div className=\"text-center py-16\">\n   394→        <h2 className=\"text-2xl mb-2\">This listing is no longer available</h2>\n   395→        <p style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n   396→          This reading group has reached its maximum size and is no longer visible to non-members.\n   397→        </p>\n   398→        <button\n   399→          onClick={() => router.push(\"/\")}\n   400→          className=\"mt-4 px-4 py-2 rounded\"\n   401→          style={{ background: \"var(--color-accent)\", color: \"white\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n   402→        >\n   403→          Browse other listings\n   404→        </button>\n   405→      </div>\n   406→    );\n   407→  }\n   408→\n   409→  if (!listing) {\n   410→    return (\n   411→      <div className=\"text-center py-16\">\n   412→        <h2 className=\"text-2xl mb-2\">Listing not found</h2>\n   413→        <p style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n   414→          This reading group may have been removed.\n   415→        </p>\n   416→      </div>\n   417→    );\n   418→  }\n   419→\n   420→  const spotsLeft = listing.max_group_size - listing.memberCount;\n   421→\n   422→  return (\n   423→    <div className=\"max-w-2xl mx-auto\">\n   424→      {error && (\n   425→        <div\n   426→          className=\"mb-4 p-3 rounded-lg text-sm\"\n   427→          style={{\n   428→            backgroundColor: \"rgba(192, 57, 43, 0.08)\",\n   429→            color: \"var(--color-error)\",\n   430→            fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n   431→          }}\n   432→        >\n   433→          {error}\n   434→        </div>\n   435→      )}\n   436→\n   437→      <div className=\"card mb-6\">\n   438→        <div className=\"flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-4 sm:gap-5\">\n   439→          <BookCover\n   440→            src={listing.book_cover_url}\n   441→            alt={listing.book_title}\n   442→            width={96}\n   443→            height={144}\n   444→            className=\"w-20 h-28 sm:w-24 sm:h-36 object-cover rounded-lg shadow-sm\"\n   445→            style={{ flexShrink: 0 }}\n   446→          />\n   447→\n   448→          <div className=\"flex-1\">\n   449→            <h1 className=\"text-xl sm:text-2xl mb-1\">{listing.book_title}</h1>"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01SoX6ZnKFwGoRApAVEkLejp","session_id":"4c5466fa-2333-4a25-bba1-4cb6c49f2287","uuid":"50f30601-5522-46b2-882f-a42654a3050d","timestamp":"2026-03-24T01:01:48.144Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01Dusve71qUxAvC9Tg1YsidQ","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→/**\n     2→ * Simple in-memory rate limiter for auth endpoints.\n     3→ * Uses a sliding window approach keyed by identifier (IP + route).\n     4→ * Not shared across cluster workers — acceptable for SQLite single-process setup.\n     5→ */\n     6→\n     7→interface RateLimitEntry {\n     8→  timestamps: number[];\n     9→}\n    10→\n    11→const store = new Map<string, RateLimitEntry>();\n    12→\n    13→// Clean up expired entries every 5 minutes\n    14→// Guard against multiple intervals on Next.js hot reload\n    15→const CLEANUP_INTERVAL = 5 * 60 * 1000;\n    16→const globalObj = globalThis as unknown as { __rateLimitCleanup?: ReturnType<typeof setInterval> };\n    17→if (!globalObj.__rateLimitCleanup) {\n    18→  globalObj.__rateLimitCleanup = setInterval(() => {\n    19→    const now = Date.now();\n    20→    for (const [key, entry] of store) {\n    21→      entry.timestamps = entry.timestamps.filter((t) => now - t < 15 * 60 * 1000);\n    22→      if (entry.timestamps.length === 0) {\n    23→        store.delete(key);\n    24→      }\n    25→    }\n    26→  }, CLEANUP_INTERVAL);\n    27→}\n    28→\n    29→/**\n    30→ * Check if a request should be rate limited.\n    31→ * @param key - Unique identifier (e.g., IP + email for login, IP for register)\n    32→ * @param maxAttempts - Maximum attempts allowed in the window\n    33→ * @param windowMs - Time window in milliseconds (default: 15 minutes)\n    34→ * @returns Object with allowed boolean and retryAfter seconds (0 if allowed)\n    35→ */\n    36→export function checkRateLimit(\n    37→  key: string,\n    38→  maxAttempts: number = 5,\n    39→  windowMs: number = 15 * 60 * 1000\n    40→): { allowed: boolean; retryAfter: number } {\n    41→  const now = Date.now();\n    42→  let entry = store.get(key);\n    43→\n    44→  if (!entry) {\n    45→    entry = { timestamps: [] };\n    46→    store.set(key, entry);\n    47→  }\n    48→\n    49→  // Remove expired timestamps\n    50→  entry.timestamps = entry.timestamps.filter((t) => now - t < windowMs);\n    51→\n    52→  if (entry.timestamps.length >= maxAttempts) {\n    53→    const oldestInWindow = entry.timestamps[0];\n    54→    const retryAfter = Math.ceil((oldestInWindow + windowMs - now) / 1000);\n    55→    return { allowed: false, retryAfter };\n    56→  }\n    57→\n    58→  entry.timestamps.push(now);\n    59→  return { allowed: true, retryAfter: 0 };\n    60→}\n    61→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01SoX6ZnKFwGoRApAVEkLejp","session_id":"4c5466fa-2333-4a25-bba1-4cb6c49f2287","uuid":"6063cf68-cad3-461c-bc23-70badd57e2a5","timestamp":"2026-03-24T01:01:48.430Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01DC4TdhZPVBcoKS5H6YoHd4","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→\"use client\";\n     2→\n     3→import { useEffect, useState, useCallback, useRef } from \"react\";\n     4→import Link from \"next/link\";\n     5→import BookCover from \"@/components/BookCover\";\n     6→\n     7→interface Listing {\n     8→  id: number;\n     9→  book_title: string;\n    10→  book_author: string;\n    11→  book_cover_url: string;\n    12→  language: string;\n    13→  reading_pace: string;\n    14→  start_date: string;\n    15→  meeting_format: string;\n    16→  max_group_size: number;\n    17→  requires_approval: number;\n    18→  platform_preference: string;\n    19→  member_count: number;\n    20→  author_name: string;\n    21→  created_at: string;\n    22→}\n    23→\n    24→export default function HomePage() {\n    25→  const [listings, setListings] = useState<Listing[]>([]);\n    26→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n    27→  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);\n    28→\n    29→  // Search & filter state\n    30→  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState(\"\");\n    31→  const [meetingFormat, setMeetingFormat] = useState(\"\");\n    32→  const [readingPace, setReadingPace] = useState(\"\");\n    33→  const [startDateFrom, setStartDateFrom] = useState(\"\");\n    34→  const [sort, setSort] = useState(\"newest\");\n    35→  const [filtersOpen, setFiltersOpen] = useState(false);\n    36→\n    37→  // Pagination state\n    38→  const [page, setPage] = useState(1);\n    39→  const [totalPages, setTotalPages] = useState(1);\n    40→  const [totalResults, setTotalResults] = useState(0);\n    41→\n    42→  const debounceRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>(undefined);\n    43→\n    44→  const fetchListings = useCallback(\n    45→    (query: string, format: string, sortBy: string, pace?: string, dateFrom?: string, pageNum?: number) => {\n    46→      setLoading(true);\n    47→      const params = new URLSearchParams();\n    48→      if (query) params.set(\"q\", query);\n    49→      if (format) params.set(\"meeting_format\", format);\n    50→      if (pace) params.set(\"reading_pace\", pace);\n    51→      if (dateFrom) params.set(\"start_date_from\", dateFrom);\n    52→      if (sortBy) params.set(\"sort\", sortBy);\n    53→      if (pageNum && pageNum > 1) params.set(\"page\", String(pageNum));\n    54→\n    55→      const qs = params.toString();\n    56→      fetch(`/api/listings${qs ? `?${qs}` : \"\"}`)\n    57→        .then((r) => {\n    58→          if (!r.ok) throw new Error(\"Failed to load listings\");\n    59→          return r.json();\n    60→        })\n    61→        .then((data) => {\n    62→          setListings(data.listings || []);\n    63→          if (data.pagination) {\n    64→            setTotalPages(data.pagination.totalPages || 1);\n    65→            setTotalResults(data.pagination.total || 0);\n    66→          }\n    67→          setError(null);\n    68→          setLoading(false);\n    69→        })\n    70→        .catch((err) => {\n    71→          setError(err.message || \"Could not load listings. Please try again.\");\n    72→          setLoading(false);\n    73→        });\n    74→    },\n    75→    []\n    76→  );\n    77→\n    78→  // Initial fetch\n    79→  useEffect(() => {\n    80→    fetchListings(\"\", \"\", \"newest\", \"\", \"\", 1);\n    81→  }, [fetchListings]);\n    82→\n    83→  // Debounced search\n    84→  const handleSearchChange = (value: string) => {\n    85→    setSearchQuery(value);\n    86→    setPage(1);\n    87→    if (debounceRef.current) clearTimeout(debounceRef.current);\n    88→    debounceRef.current = setTimeout(() => {\n    89→      fetchListings(value, meetingFormat, sort, readingPace, startDateFrom, 1);\n    90→    }, 400);\n    91→  };\n    92→\n    93→  // Immediate filter changes\n    94→  const handleFormatChange = (value: string) => {\n    95→    setMeetingFormat(value);\n    96→    setPage(1);\n    97→    fetchListings(searchQuery, value, sort, readingPace, startDateFrom, 1);\n    98→  };\n    99→\n   100→  const handlePaceChange = (value: string) => {\n   101→    setReadingPace(value);\n   102→    setPage(1);\n   103→    fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, sort, value, startDateFrom, 1);\n   104→  };\n   105→\n   106→  const handleStartDateFromChange = (value: string) => {\n   107→    setStartDateFrom(value);\n   108→    setPage(1);\n   109→    fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, sort, readingPace, value, 1);\n   110→  };\n   111→\n   112→  const handleSortChange = (value: string) => {\n   113→    setSort(value);\n   114→    setPage(1);\n   115→    fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, value, readingPace, startDateFrom, 1);\n   116→  };\n   117→\n   118→  const handlePageChange = (newPage: number) => {\n   119→    setPage(newPage);\n   120→    fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, sort, readingPace, startDateFrom, newPage);\n   121→    window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: \"smooth\" });\n   122→  };\n   123→\n   124→  const clearFilters = () => {\n   125→    setSearchQuery(\"\");\n   126→    setMeetingFormat(\"\");\n   127→    setReadingPace(\"\");\n   128→    setStartDateFrom(\"\");\n   129→    setSort(\"newest\");\n   130→    setPage(1);\n   131→    fetchListings(\"\", \"\", \"newest\", \"\", \"\", 1);\n   132→  };\n   133→\n   134→  const hasActiveFilters = searchQuery || meetingFormat || readingPace || startDateFrom || sort !== \"newest\";\n   135→\n   136→  const formatMeetingType = (f: string) => {\n   137→    const labels: Record<string, string> = {\n   138→      voice: \"Voice calls\",\n   139→      text: \"Text chat\",\n   140→      mixed: \"Mixed\",\n   141→    };\n   142→    return labels[f] || f;\n   143→  };\n   144→\n   145→  return (\n   146→    <div>\n   147→      <div className=\"text-center mb-6 sm:mb-8 mt-2 sm:mt-4\">\n   148→        <h1 className=\"text-2xl sm:text-4xl mb-2 sm:mb-3\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>\n   149→          Find your reading companion\n   150→        </h1>\n   151→        <p\n   152→          className=\"text-sm sm:text-lg max-w-xl mx-auto\"\n   153→          style={{\n   154→            color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   155→            fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n   156→          }}\n   157→        >\n   158→          Browse open reading groups, join one that matches your pace, and\n   159→          connect on Telegram to read together.\n   160→        </p>\n   161→      </div>\n   162→\n   163→      {/* Search & Filter Bar */}\n   164→      <div className=\"mb-6\">\n   165→        <div className=\"flex gap-3 items-center\">\n   166→          <div className=\"flex-1 relative\">\n   167→            <input\n   168→              type=\"text\"\n   169→              placeholder=\"Search by book title or author...\"\n   170→              value={searchQuery}\n   171→              onChange={(e) => handleSearchChange(e.target.value)}\n   172→              className=\"input-field\"\n   173→              style={{ paddingLeft: \"2.5rem\" }}\n   174→            />\n   175→            <svg\n   176→              aria-hidden=\"true\"\n   177→              style={{\n   178→                position: \"absolute\",\n   179→                left: \"0.75rem\",\n   180→                top: \"50%\",\n   181→                transform: \"translateY(-50%)\",\n   182→                color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   183→                width: \"1.125rem\",\n   184→                height: \"1.125rem\",\n   185→                pointerEvents: \"none\",\n   186→              }}\n   187→              fill=\"none\"\n   188→              stroke=\"currentColor\"\n   189→              strokeWidth={2}\n   190→              viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"\n   191→            >\n   192→              <circle cx={11} cy={11} r={8} />\n   193→              <line x1={21} y1={21} x2={16.65} y2={16.65} />\n   194→            </svg>\n   195→          </div>\n   196→          <button\n   197→            onClick={() => setFiltersOpen(!filtersOpen)}\n   198→            className=\"btn-secondary\"\n   199→            aria-expanded={filtersOpen}\n   200→            aria-controls=\"filter-panel\"\n   201→            style={{\n   202→              display: \"flex\",\n   203→              alignItems: \"center\",\n   204→              gap: \"0.375rem\",\n   205→              whiteSpace: \"nowrap\",\n   206→              position: \"relative\",\n   207→            }}\n   208→          >\n   209→            <svg\n   210→              aria-hidden=\"true\"\n   211→              width=\"16\"\n   212→              height=\"16\"\n   213→              viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"\n   214→              fill=\"none\"\n   215→              stroke=\"currentColor\"\n   216→              strokeWidth={2}\n   217→            >\n   218→              <line x1={4} y1={6} x2={20} y2={6} />\n   219→              <line x1={7} y1={12} x2={17} y2={12} />\n   220→              <line x1={10} y1={18} x2={14} y2={18} />\n   221→            </svg>\n   222→            Filters\n   223→            {hasActiveFilters && (\n   224→              <span\n   225→                aria-hidden=\"true\"\n   226→                style={{\n   227→                  width: \"0.5rem\",\n   228→                  height: \"0.5rem\",\n   229→                  borderRadius: \"50%\",\n   230→                  backgroundColor: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n   231→                  position: \"absolute\",\n   232→                  top: \"0.375rem\",\n   233→                  right: \"0.375rem\",\n   234→                }}\n   235→              />\n   236→            )}\n   237→          </button>\n   238→        </div>\n   239→\n   240→        {/* Filter panel */}\n   241→        {filtersOpen && (\n   242→          <div\n   243→            id=\"filter-panel\"\n   244→            className=\"card mt-3\"\n   245→            style={{ padding: \"1rem 1.25rem\" }}\n   246→          >\n   247→            <div\n   248→              className=\"grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-3 sm:gap-4 items-end\"\n   249→              style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n   250→            >\n   251→              <div>\n   252→                <label\n   253→                  className=\"text-xs font-semibold mb-1 block\"\n   254→                  style={{\n   255→                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   256→                    textTransform: \"uppercase\",\n   257→                    letterSpacing: \"0.05em\",\n   258→                  }}\n   259→                >\n   260→                  Meeting format\n   261→                </label>\n   262→                <select\n   263→                  value={meetingFormat}\n   264→                  onChange={(e) => handleFormatChange(e.target.value)}\n   265→                  className=\"input-field\"\n   266→                  style={{ fontSize: \"0.875rem\", padding: \"0.5rem 0.75rem\" }}\n   267→                >\n   268→                  <option value=\"\">All formats</option>\n   269→                  <option value=\"voice\">Voice calls</option>\n   270→                  <option value=\"text\">Text chat</option>\n   271→                  <option value=\"mixed\">Mixed</option>\n   272→                </select>\n   273→              </div>\n   274→\n   275→              <div>\n   276→                <label\n   277→                  className=\"text-xs font-semibold mb-1 block\"\n   278→                  style={{\n   279→                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   280→                    textTransform: \"uppercase\",\n   281→                    letterSpacing: \"0.05em\",\n   282→                  }}\n   283→                >\n   284→                  Reading pace\n   285→                </label>\n   286→                <select\n   287→                  value={readingPace}\n   288→                  onChange={(e) => handlePaceChange(e.target.value)}\n   289→                  className=\"input-field\"\n   290→                  style={{ fontSize: \"0.875rem\", padding: \"0.5rem 0.75rem\" }}\n   291→                >\n   292→                  <option value=\"\">All paces</option>\n   293→                  <option value=\"chapter\">Chapter-based</option>\n   294→                  <option value=\"pages\">Pages-based</option>\n   295→                  <option value=\"week\">Weekly</option>\n   296→                  <option value=\"day\">Daily</option>\n   297→                </select>\n   298→              </div>\n   299→\n   300→              <div>\n   301→                <label\n   302→                  className=\"text-xs font-semibold mb-1 block\"\n   303→                  style={{\n   304→                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   305→                    textTransform: \"uppercase\",\n   306→                    letterSpacing: \"0.05em\",\n   307→                  }}\n   308→                >\n   309→                  Starting from\n   310→                </label>\n   311→                <input\n   312→                  type=\"date\"\n   313→                  value={startDateFrom}\n   314→                  onChange={(e) => handleStartDateFromChange(e.target.value)}\n   315→                  className=\"input-field\"\n   316→                  style={{ fontSize: \"0.875rem\", padding: \"0.5rem 0.75rem\" }}\n   317→                />\n   318→              </div>\n   319→\n   320→              <div>\n   321→                <label\n   322→                  className=\"text-xs font-semibold mb-1 block\"\n   323→                  style={{\n   324→                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   325→                    textTransform: \"uppercase\",\n   326→                    letterSpacing: \"0.05em\",\n   327→                  }}\n   328→                >\n   329→                  Sort by\n   330→                </label>\n   331→                <select\n   332→                  value={sort}\n   333→                  onChange={(e) => handleSortChange(e.target.value)}\n   334→                  className=\"input-field\"\n   335→                  style={{ fontSize: \"0.875rem\", padding: \"0.5rem 0.75rem\" }}\n   336→                >\n   337→                  <option value=\"newest\">Newest first</option>\n   338→                  <option value=\"oldest\">Oldest first</option>\n   339→                  <option value=\"start_date\">Start date (soonest)</option>\n   340→                </select>\n   341→              </div>\n   342→\n   343→              {hasActiveFilters && (\n   344→                <button\n   345→                  onClick={clearFilters}\n   346→                  style={{\n   347→                    color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n   348→                    fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n   349→                    fontSize: \"0.875rem\",\n   350→                    fontWeight: 600,\n   351→                    cursor: \"pointer\",\n   352→                    background: \"none\",\n   353→                    border: \"none\",\n   354→                    padding: \"0.5rem 0\",\n   355→                  }}\n   356→                >\n   357→                  Clear all\n   358→                </button>\n   359→              )}\n   360→            </div>\n   361→          </div>\n   362→        )}\n   363→      </div>\n   364→\n   365→      {/* Results */}\n   366→      {loading ? (\n   367→        <div className=\"grid gap-4\">\n   368→          {[1, 2, 3].map((i) => (\n   369→            <div key={i} className=\"card flex gap-4\">\n   370→              <div\n   371→                className=\"skeleton\"\n   372→                style={{ width: \"4rem\", height: \"6rem\", flexShrink: 0 }}\n   373→              />\n   374→              <div className=\"flex-1\">\n   375→                <div\n   376→                  className=\"skeleton skeleton-heading\"\n   377→                  style={{ width: `${60 - i * 5}%` }}\n   378→                />\n   379→                <div\n   380→                  className=\"skeleton skeleton-text\"\n   381→                  style={{ width: `${45 - i * 5}%` }}\n   382→                />\n   383→                <div className=\"flex gap-2 mt-2\">\n   384→                  <div\n   385→                    className=\"skeleton\"\n   386→                    style={{\n   387→                      width: \"5rem\",\n   388→                      height: \"1.5rem\",\n   389→                      borderRadius: \"9999px\",\n   390→                    }}\n   391→                  />\n   392→                  <div\n   393→                    className=\"skeleton\"\n   394→                    style={{\n   395→                      width: \"4rem\",\n   396→                      height: \"1.5rem\",\n   397→                      borderRadius: \"9999px\",\n   398→                    }}\n   399→                  />\n   400→                  <div\n   401→                    className=\"skeleton\"\n   402→                    style={{\n   403→                      width: \"5.5rem\",\n   404→                      height: \"1.5rem\",\n   405→                      borderRadius: \"9999px\",\n   406→                    }}\n   407→                  />\n   408→                </div>\n   409→              </div>\n   410→            </div>\n   411→          ))}\n   412→        </div>\n   413→      ) : error ? (\n   414→        <div className=\"text-center py-16\">\n   415→          <svg\n   416→            width=\"40\"\n   417→            height=\"40\"\n   418→            viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"\n   419→            fill=\"none\"\n   420→            stroke=\"var(--color-error)\"\n   421→            strokeWidth={1.5}\n   422→            style={{ margin: \"0 auto 0.75rem\" }}\n   423→          >\n   424→            <circle cx={12} cy={12} r={10} />\n   425→            <line x1={12} y1={8} x2={12} y2={12} />\n   426→            <line x1={12} y1={16} x2={12.01} y2={16} />\n   427→          </svg>\n   428→          <p\n   429→            className=\"text-lg mb-2\"\n   430→            style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n   431→          >\n   432→            {error}\n   433→          </p>\n   434→          <button\n   435→            onClick={() => fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, sort, readingPace, startDateFrom)}\n   436→            className=\"btn-primary\"\n   437→            style={{ marginTop: \"0.75rem\" }}\n   438→          >\n   439→            Try again\n   440→          </button>\n   441→        </div>\n   442→      ) : listings.length === 0 ? (\n   443→        <div className=\"text-center py-16\">\n   444→          {hasActiveFilters ? (\n   445→            <>\n   446→              <p\n   447→                className=\"text-lg mb-2\"\n   448→                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n   449→              >\n   450→                No matching reading groups\n   451→              </p>\n   452→              <p\n   453→                className=\"mb-6\"\n   454→                style={{\n   455→                  color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   456→                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n   457→                  fontSize: \"0.95rem\",\n   458→                }}\n   459→              >\n   460→                Try adjusting your search or filters to find more groups.\n   461→              </p>\n   462→              <button onClick={clearFilters} className=\"btn-secondary\">\n   463→                Clear filters\n   464→              </button>\n   465→            </>\n   466→          ) : (\n   467→            <>\n   468→              <p\n   469→                className=\"text-lg mb-2\"\n   470→                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n   471→              >\n   472→                No reading groups yet\n   473→              </p>\n   474→              <p\n   475→                className=\"mb-6\"\n   476→                style={{\n   477→                  color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   478→                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n   479→                  fontSize: \"0.95rem\",\n   480→                }}\n   481→              >\n   482→                Be the first to create a reading group and find your book\n   483→                companions.\n   484→              </p>\n   485→              <Link href=\"/listings/create\" className=\"btn-primary\">\n   486→                Create the first listing\n   487→              </Link>\n   488→            </>\n   489→          )}\n   490→        </div>\n   491→      ) : (\n   492→        <>\n   493→          <p\n   494→            className=\"mb-3 text-sm\"\n   495→            style={{\n   496→              color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   497→              fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n   498→            }}\n   499→          >\n   500→            {totalResults} open group{totalResults !== 1 ? \"s\" : \"\"}\n   501→            {hasActiveFilters ? \" found\" : \"\"}\n   502→            {totalPages > 1 ? ` · Page ${page} of ${totalPages}` : \"\"}\n   503→          </p>\n   504→          <div className=\"grid gap-4\" role=\"list\" aria-label=\"Reading groups\">\n   505→            {listings.map((listing) => (\n   506→              <Link\n   507→                key={listing.id}\n   508→                href={`/listings/${listing.id}`}\n   509→                className=\"card hover:shadow-md transition-shadow flex gap-4\"\n   510→                role=\"listitem\"\n   511→              >\n   512→                <BookCover\n   513→                  src={listing.book_cover_url}\n   514→                  alt={listing.book_title}\n   515→                  width={64}\n   516→                  height={96}\n   517→                  className=\"w-16 h-24 object-cover rounded\"\n   518→                  style={{ flexShrink: 0 }}\n   519→                />\n   520→\n   521→                <div className=\"flex-1 min-w-0\">\n   522→           disabled={page <= 1}\n   626→                className=\"btn-secondary\"\n   627→                style={{\n   628→                  fontSize: \"0.875rem\",\n   629→                  padding:           <button\n   644→                onClick={() => handlePageChange(page + 1)}\n   645→                disabled={page >= totalPages}\n   646→                className=\"btn-secondary\"\n   647→ useCallback, useRef } from \"react\";\n     4→import { useRouter } from \"next/navigation\";\n     5→import Link from \"next/link\";\n     6→import BookCover from \"@/components/BookCover\";\n     7→\n     8→interface ReadingItem {\n     9→  id: number;\n    10→  book_title: string;\n    11→  book_author: string;\n    12→  book_cover_url: string;\n    13→  reading_pace: string;\n    14→  start_date: string;\n    15→  meeting_format: string;\n    16→  is_full: number;\n    17→  telegram_link: string;\n    18→  member_count: number;\n    19→  max_group_size: number;\n    20→  author_name: string;\n    21→  joined_at: string;\n    22→}\n    23→\n    24→interface Reputation {\n    25→  averageScore: number;\n    26→  totalRatings: number;\n    27→  completedGroups: number;\n    28→  groupsRated: number;\n    29→  breakdown: Record<number, number>;\n    30→  recentRatings: {\n    31→    score: number;\n    32→    comment: string;\n    33→    created_at: string;\n    34→    book_title: string;\n    35→  }[];\n    36→}\n    37→\n    38→type TabKey = \"profile\" | \"reading\" | \"genres\" | \"reputation\";\n    39→\n    40→export default function ProfilePage() {\n    41→  const router = useRouter();\n    42→  const [displayName, setDisplayName] = useState(\"\");\n    43→  const [bio, setBio] = useState(\"\");\n    44→  const [email, setEmail] = useState(\"\");\n    45→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n    46→  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false);\n    47→  const [message, setMessage] = useState(\"\");\n    48→\n    49→  // Tab state\n    50→  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<TabKey>(\"profile\");\n    51→\n    52→  // Reading activity\n    53→  const [active, setActive] = useState<ReadingItem[]>([]);\n    54→  const [history, setHistory] = useState<ReadingItem[]>([]);\n    55→  const [upcoming, setUpcoming] = useState<ReadingItem[]>([]);\n    56→  const [readingLoading, setReadingLoading] = useState(false);\n    57→\n    58→  // Genres\n    59→  const [userGenres, setUserGenres] = useState<string[]>([]);\n    60→  const [availableGenres, setAvailableGenres] = useState<string[]>([]);\n    61→  const [genresLoading, setGenresLoading] = useState(false);\n    62→  const [genresSaving, setGenresSaving] = useState(false);\n    63→  const [genresMessage, setGenresMessage] = useState(\"\");\n    64→\n    65→  // Reputation\n    66→  const [reputation, setReputation] = useState<Reputation | null>(null);\n    67→  const [reputationLoading, setReputationLoading] = useState(false);\n    68→\n    69→  // Track which tabs have been fetched to avoid redundant requests\n    70→  const fetchedTabs = useRef<Set<string>>(new Set());\n    71→\n    72→  useEffect(() => {\n    73→    fetch(\"/api/auth/me\")\n    74→      .then((r) => r.json())\n    75→      .then((data) => {\n    76→        if (!data.user) {\n    77→          router.push(\"/auth/login\");\n    78→          return;\n    79→        }\n    80→        setDisplayName(data.user.displayName);"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01SoX6ZnKFwGoRApAVEkLejp","session_id":"4c5466fa-2333-4a25-bba1-4cb6c49f2287","uuid":"f20c9c9d-c5d0-45ca-93eb-8c5a0b966b67","timestamp":"2026-03-24T01:01:57.118Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01WMfKzdHrXi9dVgAUAiEvPf","type":"tool_result","content":"   140→  // Cannot edit if a platform link has been shared (group already formed)\n   141→  if (listing.telegram_link || listing.discord_link) {\n   142→    return NextResponse.json(\n   143→      { error: \"Cannot edit a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n   144→      { status: 400 }\n   145→    );\n   146→  }\n   147→\n   148→  try {\n   149→    const body = await req.json();\n   150→    const {\n   151→      language,\n   152→      readingPace,\n   153→      startDate,\n   154→      meetingFormat,\n   155→      maxGroupSize,\n   156→      requiresApproval,\n   157→      platformPreference,\n   158→    } = body;\n   159→\n   160→    // Validate fields that are provided\n   161→    if (readingPace !== undefined && (!readingPace || readingPace.length > 200)) {\n   162→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Reading pace is required (max 200 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n   163→    }\n   164→\n   165→    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n   166→      if (!/^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$/.test(startDate)) {\n   167→        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid start date format (expected YYYY-MM-DD)\" }, { status: 400 });\n   168→      }\n   169→      const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n   170→      if (startDate < today) {\n   171→        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Start date cannot be in the past\" }, { status: 400 });\n   172→      }\n   173→    }\n   174→\n   175→    if (meetingFormat !== undefined && ![\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat)) {\n   176→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid meeting format\" }, { status: 400 });\n   177→    }\n   178→\n   179→    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n   180→      const size = parseInt(maxGroupSize, 10);\n   181→      if (isNaN(size) || size < 2 || size > 20) {\n   182→        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Group size must be between 2 and 20\" }, { status: 400 });\n   183→      }\n   184→\n   185→      // Cannot reduce below current member count\n   186→      const memberCount = (db\n   187→        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n   188→        .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n   189→\n   190→      if (size < memberCount) {\n   191→        return NextResponse.json(\n   192→          { error: `Cannot reduce group size below current member count (${memberCount})` },\n   193→          { status: 400 }\n   194→        );\n   195→      }\n   196→    }\n   197→\n   198→    if (language !== undefined && (!language || typeof language !== \"string\" || language.length > 100)) {\n   199→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Language is required (max 100 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n   200→    }\n   201→\n   202→    if (platformPreference !== undefined && ![\"telegram\", \"discord\"].includes(platformPreference)) {\n   203→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid platform preference\" }, { status: 400 });\n   204→    }\n   205→\n   206→    // Build dynamic UPDATE\n   207→    const updates: string[] = [];\n   208→    const values: unknown[] = [];\n   209→\n   210→    if (language !== undefined) {\n   211→      updates.push(\"language = ?\");\n   212→      values.push(language);\n   213→    }\n   214→    if (readingPace !== undefined) {\n   215→      updates.push(\"reading_pace = ?\");\n   216→      values.push(readingPace.trim());\n   217→    }\n   218→    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n   219→      updates.push(\"start_date = ?\");\n   220→      values.push(startDate);\n   221→    }\n   222→    if (meetingFormat !== undefined) {\n   223→      updates.push(\"meeting_format = ?\");\n   224→      values.push(meetingFormat);\n   225→    }\n   226→    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n   227→      const newSize = parseInt(maxGroupSize, 10);\n   228→      updates.push(\"max_group_size = ?\");\n   229→      values.push(newSize);\n   230→\n   231→      // If increasing group size on a full listing, reopen it\n   232→      const currentMemberCount = (db\n   233→        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n   234→        .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n   235→      if (newSize > currentMemberCount && listing.is_full) {\n   236→        updates.push(\"is_full = ?\");\n   237→        values.push(0);\n   238→      }\n   239→    }\n   240→    if (requiresApproval !== undefined) {\n   241→      updates.push(\"requires_approval = ?\");\n   242→      values.push(requiresApproval ? 1 : 0);\n   243→    }\n   244→    if (platformPreference !== undefined) {\n   245→      updates.push(\"platform_preference = ?\");\n   246→      values.push(platformPreference);\n   247→    }\n   248→\n   249→    if (updates.length === 0) {\n   250→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"No fields to update\" }, { status: 400 });\n   251→    }\n   252→\n   253→    values.push(listingId);\n   254→    db.prepare(`UPDATE listings SET ${updates.join(\", \")} WHERE id = ?`).run(...values);\n   255→\n   256→    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n   257→  } catch (error) {\n   258→    console.error(\"Update listing error:\", error);\n   259→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01SoX6ZnKFwGoRApAVEkLejp","session_id":"4c5466fa-2333-4a25-bba1-4cb6c49f2287","uuid":"7e08c65a-9a83-461e-8801-0531cd0c7143","timestamp":"2026-03-24T01:02:00.964Z"}

listing, reopen it\n   232→      const currentMemberCount = (db\n   233→        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n   234→        .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n   235→      if (newSize > currentMemberCount && listing.is_full) {\n   236→        updates.push(\"is_full = ?\");\n   237→        values.push(0);\n   238→      }\n   239→ (platformPreference !== undefined) {\n   245→      updates.push(\"platform_preference = ?\");\n   246→      values.push(platformPreference);\n   247→    }\n   248→\n   249→    if (updates.length === 0) {\n   250→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"No fields to update\" }, { status: 400 });\n   251→    }\n   252→\n   253→    values.push(listingId);\n   254→    db.prepare(`UPDATE listings SET ${updates.join(\", \")} WHERE id = ?`).run(...values);\n   255→\n   256→    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n   257→  } catch (error) {\n   258→    console.error(\"Update listing error:\", error);\n   259→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });\n   260→  }\n   261→}\n   262→\n   263→export async function DELETE(\n   264→  _req: NextRequest,\n   265→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n   266→) {\n   267→  const session = await requireAuth();\n   268→  if (!session) {\n   269→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n   270→  }\n   271→\n   272→  const { id } = await params;\n   273→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n   274→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n   275→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n   276→  }\n   277→\n   278→  const listing = db\n   279→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   280→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n   281→\n   282→  if (!listing) {\n   283→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n   284→  }\n   285→\n   286→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n   287→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the author can delete this listing\" }, { status: 403 });\n   288→  }\n
