{ NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { getSession, requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\nimport { isBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/telegram\";\nimport { isBotConfigured as isDiscordBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/discord\";\n\nexport async function GET(\n  _req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT\n        l.*,\n        u.display_name as author_name\n      FROM listings l\n      JOIN users u ON l.author_id = u.id\n      WHERE l.id = ?`\n    )\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  const members = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, lm.joined_at\n       FROM listing_members lm\n       JOIN users u ON lm.user_id = u.id\n       WHERE lm.listing_id = ?\n       ORDER BY lm.joined_at ASC`\n    )\n    .all(listingId) as { id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; joined_at: string }[];\n\n  const session = await getSession();\n  const isMember = session.userId\n    ? members.some((m) => m.id === session.userId)\n    : false;\n  const isAuthor = session.userId\n    ? listing.author_id === session.userId\n    : false;\n\n  // PRD: full listings should be invisible to non-participants\n  if (listing.is_full && !isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"This listing is no longer available\" },\n      { status: 404 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Check if the current user has an application (regardless of requires_approval,\n  // since the flag may have been toggled after the application was submitted)\n  let hasApplied = false;\n  let applicationStatus = \"\";\n  if (session.userId && !isMember) {\n    const app = db\n      .prepare(\n        \"SELECT status FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n      )\n      .get(listingId, session.userId) as { status: string } | undefined;\n    if (app) {\n      hasApplied = app.status === \"pending\";\n      applicationStatus = app.status;\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Fetch pending applicants if the viewer is the author\n  let pendingApplicants: { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[] = [];\n  if (isAuthor && listing.requires_approval) {\n    pendingApplicants = db\n      .prepare(\n        `SELECT la.id as application_id, u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, la.applied_at\n         FROM listing_applications la\n         JOIN users u ON la.user_id = u.id\n         WHERE la.listing_id = ? AND la.status = 'pending'\n         ORDER BY la.applied_at ASC`\n      )\n      .all(listingId) as { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[];\n  }\n\n  // Strip platform links for non-members to prevent leaking invite URLs\n  const safeListingData = { ...listing };\n  if (!isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    delete safeListingData.telegram_link;\n    delete safeListingData.discord_link;\n  }\n\n  return NextResponse.json({\n    listing: {\n      ...safeListingData,\n      members,\n      memberCount: members.length,\n      isMember,\n      isAuthor,\n      hasApplied,\n      applicationStatus,\n      pendingApplicants,\n      currentUserId: session.userId || null,\n      telegramBotConfigured: isBotConfigured(),\n      discordBotConfigured: isDiscordBotConfigured(),\n    },\n  });\n}\n\nexport async function PATCH(\n  req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the author can edit this listing\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  // Cannot edit if a platform link has been shared (group already formed)\n  if (listing.telegram_link || listing.discord_link) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Cannot edit a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  try {\n    const body = await req.json();\n    const {\n      language,\n      readingPace,\n      startDate,\n      meetingFormat,\n      maxGroupSize,\n      requiresApproval,\n      platformPreference,\n    } = body;\n\n    // Validate fields that are provided\n    if (readingPace !== undefined && (!readingPace || readingPace.length > 200)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Reading pace is required (max 200 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n      if (!/^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$/.test(startDate)) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid start date format (expected YYYY-MM-DD)\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n      const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n      if (startDate < today) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Start date cannot be in the past\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n    }\n\n    if (meetingFormat !== undefined && ![\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid meeting format\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n      const size = parseInt(maxGroupSize, 10);\n      if (isNaN(size) || size < 2 || size > 20) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Group size must be between 2 and 20\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n\n      // Cannot reduce below current member count\n      const memberCount = (db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n        .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n\n      if (size < memberCount) {\n        return NextResponse.json(\n          { error: `Cannot reduce group size below current member count (${memberCount})` },\n          { status: 400 }\n        );\n      }\n    }\n\n    if (language !== undefined && (!language || typeof language !== \"string\" || language.length > 100)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Language is required (max 100 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (platformPreference !== undefined && ![\"telegram\", \"discord\"].includes(platformPreference)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid platform preference\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    // Build dynamic UPDATE\n    const updates: string[] = [];\n    const values: unknown[] = [];\n\n    if (language !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"language = ?\");\n      values.push(language);\n    }\n    if (readingPace !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"reading_pace = ?\");\n      values.push(readingPace.trim());\n    }\n    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"start_date = ?\");\n      values.push(startDate);\n    }\n    if (meetingFormat !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"meeting_format = ?\");\n      values.push(meetingFormat);\n    }\n    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n      const newSize = parseInt(maxGroupSize, 10);\n      updates.push(\"max_group_size = ?\");\n      values.push(newSize);\n\n      // If increasing group size on a full listing, reopen it\n      const currentMemberCount = (db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n        .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n      if (newSize > currentMemberCount && listing.is_full) {\n        updates.push(\"is_full = ?\");\n        values.push(0);\n      }\n    }\n    if (requiresApproval !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"requires_approval = ?\");\n      values.push(requiresApproval ? 1 : 0);\n    }\n    if (platformPreference !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"platform_preference = ?\");\n      values.push(platformPreference);\n    }\n\n    if (updates.length === 0) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"No fields to update\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    values.push(listingId);\n    db.prepare(`UPDATE listings SET ${updates.join(\", \")} WHERE id = ?`).run(...values);\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Update listing error:\", error);\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n}\n\nexport async function DELETE(\n  _req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the author can delete this listing\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  // Cannot delete if a platform link has been shared\n  if (listing.telegram_link || listing.discord_link) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Cannot delete a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  try {\n    // Get members to notify (excluding the author)\n    const members = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id != ?\")\n      .all(listingId, session.userId) as { user_id: number }[];\n\n    // Delete in a transaction (notifications sent after, so they aren't wiped)\n    const deleteTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM notifications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM ratings WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    });\n\n    deleteTransaction();\n\n    // Send deletion notifications after transaction (listing_id is NULL since listing is gone)\n    for (const member of members) {\n      try {\n        createNotification(\n          member.user_id,\n          null,\n          \"listing_deleted\",\n          `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" has been cancelled by the organizer.`\n        );\n      } catch {\n        // Notification failure should not block response\n      }\n    }\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Delete listing error:\", error);\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n}\n","numLines":335,"startLine":1,"totalLines":335}}}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01SekcLtWKetz8kwMMwEDT7z","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import {\n     4→  createChatInviteLink,\n     5→  exportChatInviteLink,\n     6→  sendMessage,\n     7→  parseListingIdFromPayload,\n     8→  escapeHtml,\n     9→} from \"@/lib/telegram\";\n    10→import { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n    11→\n    12→/**\n    13→ * Telegram webhook endpoint.\n    14→ *\n    15→ * Handles two types of updates:\n    16→ *\n    17→ * 1. `my_chat_member` — bot was added to a group\n    18→ *    When the author creates a group via the deep link, the bot is\n    19→ *    automatically added. We detect this, generate an invite link,\n    20→ *    and save it to the listing.\n    21→ *\n    22→ * 2. `message` with `/start listing_ID` — the bot receives a start\n    23→ *    command in a group with a payload referencing a listing.\n    24→ */\n    25→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n    26→  // Verify webhook secret — fail closed if not configured\n    27→  const webhookSecret = process.env.TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET;\n    28→  if (!webhookSecret) {\n    29→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Webhook not configured\" }, { status: 500 });\n    30→  }\n    31→  const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\");\n    32→  if (headerSecret !== webhookSecret) {\n    33→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n    34→  }\n    35→\n    36→  let update: Record<string, unknown>;\n    37→  try {\n    38→    update = await req.json();\n    39→  } catch {\n    40→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid JSON\" }, { status: 400 });\n    41→  }\n    42→\n    43→  // Handle bot being added to a group chat\n    44→  if (update.my_chat_member) {\n    45→    await handleChatMemberUpdate(\n    46→      update.my_chat_member as ChatMemberUpdate\n    47→    );\n    48→  }\n    49→\n    50→  // Handle /start command in groups (fallback mechanism)\n    51→  if (update.message) {\n    52→    await handleMessage(update.message as TelegramMessage);\n    53→  }\n    54→\n    55→  // Always return 200 to Telegram to avoid retries\n    56→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    57→}\n    58→\n    59→interface ChatMemberUpdate {\n    60→  chat: {\n    61→    id: number;\n    62→    title?: string;\n    63→    type: string;\n    64→  };\n    65→  from: {\n    66→    id: number;\n    67→    first_name: string;\n    68→  };\n    69→  new_chat_member: {\n    70→    user: {\n    71→      id: number;\n    72→      is_bot: boolean;\n    73→    };\n    74→    status: string;\n    75→  };\n    76→}\n    77→\n    78→interface TelegramMessage {\n    79→  chat: {\n    80→    id: number;\n    81→    type: string;\n    82→    title?: string;\n    83→  };\n    84→  text?: string;\n    85→  from?: {\n    86→    id: number;\n    87→  };\n    88→}\n    89→\n    90→/**\n    91→ * When the bot is added to a group, check if it's related to a listing.\n    92→ *\n    93→ * The deep link format is: t.me/BOT?startgroup=listing_ID\n    94→ * When a user creates a group through this link, Telegram:\n    95→ * 1. Creates the group\n    96→ * 2. Adds the bot as a member\n    97→ * 3. Sends a `my_chat_member` update\n    98→ *\n    99→ * We use the group title or a pending mapping to associate the chat with a listing.\n   100→ */\n   101→async function handleChatMemberUpdate(update: ChatMemberUpdate) {\n   102→  const { chat, new_chat_member } = update;\n   103→\n   104→  // Only process when bot is added (member or administrator)\n   105→  if (\n   106→    !new_chat_member.user.is_bot ||\n   107→    ![\"member\", \"administrator\"].includes(new_chat_member.status)\n   108→  ) {\n   109→    return;\n   110→  }\n   111→\n   112→  // Only process group chats\n   113→  if (![\"group\", \"supergroup\"].includes(chat.type)) {\n   114→    return;\n   115→  }\n   116→\n   117→  // Try to find the listing this group belongs to.\n   118→  // Strategy 1: Check pending_telegram_groups mapping table\n   119→  const pending = db\n   120→    .prepare(\n   121→      \"SELECT listing_id FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE telegram_chat_id = ?\"\n   122→    )\n   123→    .get(chat.id) as { listing_id: number } | undefined;\n   124→\n   125→  if (pending) {\n   126→    await linkTelegramToListing(pending.listing_id, chat.id);\n   127→    db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE telegram_chat_id = ?\").run(\n   128→      chat.id\n   129→    );\n   130→    return;\n   131→  }\n   132→\n   133→  // Strategy 2: Check for listings awaiting auto-telegram (most recent unlinked full listing by this author)\n   134→  // We store the chat ID and wait for the /start command or title match\n   135→  // For now, store the mapping and send a welcome message\n   136→  await sendMessage(\n   137→    chat.id,\n   138→    \"Hello! I'm the Bookmate bot. I'll help set up this reading group.\\n\\n\" +\n   139→      'If this group was created for a Bookmate listing, I\\'ll automatically generate an invite link. ' +\n   140→      \"The organizer can also type <code>/link</code> to manually trigger the setup.\"\n   141→  );\n   142→\n   143→  // Store the chat for potential later linking\n   144→  try {\n   145→    db.prepare(\n   146→      \"INSERT OR IGNORE INTO telegram_chats (chat_id, chat_title, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, datetime('now'))\"\n   147→    ).run(chat.id, chat.title || \"\");\n   148→  } catch {\n   149→    // Table might not exist yet on first run — handled gracefully\n   150→  }\n   151→}\n   152→\n   153→/**\n   154→ * Handle messages in group chats.\n   155→ * Supports /start with payload and /link command.\n   156→ */\n   157→async function handleMessage(message: TelegramMessage) {\n   158→  if (!message.text || ![\"group\", \"supergroup\"].includes(message.chat.type)) {\n   159→    return;\n   160→  }\n   161→\n   162→  const text = message.text.trim();\n   163→\n   164→  // Handle /start with listing payload (sent when group is created via deep link)\n   165→  if (text.startsWith(\"/start \")) {\n   166→    const payload = text.replace(\"/start \", \"\").trim();\n   167→    const listingId = parseListingIdFromPayload(payload);\n   168→    if (listingId) {\n   169→      // Verify the sender is the listing author to prevent unauthorized linking\n   170→      const telegramUserId = message.from?.id;\n   171→      if (!telegramUserId) {\n   172→        await sendMessage(message.chat.id, \"Could not identify the sender.\");\n   173→        return;\n   174→      }\n   175→\n   176→      const linkedUser = db\n   177→        .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM telegram_user_links WHERE telegram_user_id = ?\")\n   178→        .get(telegramUserId) as { user_id: number } | undefined;\n   179→\n   180→      if (linkedUser) {\n   181→        const listing = db\n   182→          .prepare(\"SELECT author_id FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   183→          .get(listingId) as { author_id: number } | undefined;\n   184→\n   185→        if (listing && listing.author_id === linkedUser.user_id) {\n   186→          await linkTelegramToListing(listingId, message.chat.id);\n   187→          return;\n   188→        }\n   189→      }\n   190→\n   191→      // If no linked user or not the author, store for later linking via /link command\n   192→      await sendMessage(\n   193→        message.chat.id,\n   194→        \"To link this group to a Bookmate listing, the listing author should use the <code>/link</code> command.\"\n   195→      );\n   196→      return;\n   197→    }\n   198→  }\n   199→\n   200→  // Handle /link command — allow manual linking\n   201→  // Security: only show listings authored by a Bookmate user linked to this Telegram user\n   202→  if (text === \"/link\") {\n   203→    const telegramUserId = message.from?.id;\n   204→    if (!telegramUserId) {\n   205→      await sendMessage(message.chat.id, \"Could not identify the sender.\");\n   206→      return;\n   207→    }\n   208→\n   209→    // Look up the Bookmate user linked to this Telegram user\n   210→    const linkedUser = db\n   211→      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM telegram_user_links WHERE telegram_user_id = ?\")\n   212→      .get(telegramUserId) as { user_id: number } | undefined;\n   213→\n   214→    if (!linkedUser) {\n   215→      await sendMessage(\n   216→        message.chat.id,\n   217→        \"Your Telegram account is not linked to a Bookmate account. \" +\n   218→          \"Please use the Telegram setup link from your Bookmate listing page to link your account first.\"\n   219→      );\n   220→      return;\n   221→    }\n   222→\n   223→    // Only show unlinked listings authored by this verified user\n   224→    const unlinkedListings = db\n   225→      .prepare(\n   226→        `SELECT id, book_title FROM listings\n   227→         WHERE is_full = 1 AND (telegram_link = '' OR telegram_link IS NULL)\n   228→         AND telegram_chat_id IS NULL\n   229→         AND author_id = ?\n   230→         ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5`\n   231→      )\n   232→      .all(linkedUser.user_id) as { id: number; book_title: string }[];\n   233→\n   234→    if (unlinkedListings.length === 0) {\n   235→      await sendMessage(\n   236→        message.chat.id,\n   237→        \"No unlinked reading groups found for your account. The group may already be set up!\"\n   238→      );\n   239→      return;\n   240→    }\n   241→\n   242→    if (unlinkedListings.length === 1) {\n   243→      await linkTelegramToListing(unlinkedListings[0].id, message.chat.id);\n   244→      return;\n   245→    }\n   246→\n   247→    const listText = unlinkedListings\n   248→      .map((l) => `  /link_${l.id} — \"${escapeHtml(l.book_title)}\"`)\n   249→      .join(\"\\n\");\n   250→    await sendMessage(\n   251→      message.chat.id,\n   252→      `Multiple reading groups need a Telegram link. Pick one:\\n\\n${listText}`\n   253→    );\n   254→    return;\n   255→  }\n   256→\n   257→  // Handle /link_ID command — require verified ownership\n   258→  const linkMatch = text.match(/^\\/link_(\\d+)$/);\n   259→  if (linkMatch) {\n   260→    const telegramUserId = message.from?.id;\n   261→    if (!telegramUserId) {\n   262→      await sendMessage(message.chat.id, \"Could not identify the sender.\");\n   263→      return;\n   264→    }\n   265→\n   266→    const linkedUser = db\n   267→      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM telegram_user_links WHERE telegram_user_id = ?\")\n   268→      .get(telegramUserId) as { user_id: number } | undefined;\n   269→\n   270→    if (!linkedUser) {\n   271→      await sendMessage(\n   272→        message.chat.id,\n   273→        \"Your Telegram account is not linked to a Bookmate account.\"\n   274→      );\n   275→      return;\n   276→    }\n   277→\n   278→    const listingId = parseInt(linkMatch[1], 10);\n   279→\n   280→    // Verify this user is the listing author and the listing is full\n   281→    const listing = db\n   282→      .prepare(\"SELECT author_id, is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   283→      .get(listingId) as { author_id: number; is_full: number } | undefined;\n   284→\n   285→    if (!listing || listing.author_id !== linkedUser.user_id) {\n   286→      await sendMessage(\n   287→        message.chat.id,\n   288→        \"You can only link Telegram groups to your own Bookmate listings.\"\n   289→      );\n   290→      return;\n   291→    }\n   292→\n   293→    if (!listing.is_full) {\n   294→      await sendMessage(\n   295→        message.chat.id,\n   296→        \"This listing's group is not full yet. You can link a Telegram group once the group reaches its maximum size.\"\n   297→      );\n   298→      return;\n   299→    }\n   300→\n   301→    await linkTelegramToListing(listingId, message.chat.id);\n   302→  }\n   303→}\n   304→\n   305→/**\n   306→ * Link a Telegram chat to a listing:\n   307→ * 1. Generate an invite link\n   308→ * 2. Save it to the listing\n   309→ * 3. Notify all members\n   310→ * 4. Send a confirmation message to the Telegram group\n   311→ */\n   312→async function linkTelegramToListing(listingId: number, chatId: number) {\n   313→  const listing = db\n   314→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   315→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n   316→\n   317→  if (!listing) {\n   318→    await sendMessage(chatId, \"Could not find that reading group on Bookmate.\");\n   319→    return;\n   320→  }\n   321→\n   322→  if (listing.telegram_link) {\n   323→    await sendMessage(chatId, \"This reading group already has a Telegram link set up!\");\n   324→    return;\n   325→  }\n   326→\n   327→  // Try to create an invite link\n   328→  let inviteLink = await createChatInviteLink(chatId);\n   329→  if (!inviteLink) {\n   330→    // Fallback: export the default invite link\n   331→    inviteLink = await exportChatInviteLink(chatId);\n   332→  }\n   333→\n   334→  if (!inviteLink) {\n   335→    await sendMessage(\n   336→      chatId,\n   337→      \"I couldn't generate an invite link. Please make sure I have admin permissions in this group, \" +\n   338→        \"then try again with /link\"\n   339→    );\n   340→    return;\n   341→  }\n   342→\n   343→  // Save to database\n   344→  db.prepare(\n   345→    \"UPDATE listings SET telegram_link = ?, telegram_chat_id = ? WHERE id = ?\"\n   346→  ).run(inviteLink, chatId, listingId);\n   347→\n   348→  // Notify all members on Bookmate\n   349→  const members = db\n   350→    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n   351→    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];\n   352→\n   353→  const bookTitle = listing.book_title as string;\n   354→  for (const member of members) {\n   355→    createNotification(\n   356→      member.user_id,\n   357→      listingId,\n   358→      \"telegram_ready\",\n   359→      `The Telegram group for \"${bookTitle}\" is ready! Click to view the invite link.`\n   360→    );\n   361→  }\n   362→\n   363→  // Send confirmation to the Telegram group\n   364→  // Escape book title to prevent HTML injection via Telegram's HTML parser\n   365→  await sendMessage(\n   366→    chatId,\n   367→    `This group is now linked to the Bookmate reading group for \"<b>${escapeHtml(bookTitle)}</b>\".\\n\\n` +\n   368→      `Invite link: ${inviteLink}\\n\\n` +\n   369→      \"All group members have been notified on Bookmate. Happy reading!\"\n   370→  );\n   371→}\n   372→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"4c5466fa-2333-4a25-bba1-4cb6c49f2287","uuid":"0bf3477d-e41e-41ae-b6fe-c366baaa0f1b","timestamp":"2026-03-24T01:07:25.863Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/telegram/webhook/route.ts","content":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport {\n  createChatInviteLink,\n  exportChatInviteLink,\n  sendMessage,\n  parseListingIdFromPayload,\n  escapeHtml,\n} from \"@/lib/telegram\";\nimport { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n\n/**\n * Telegram webhook endpoint.\n *\n * Handles two types of updates:\n *\n * 1. `my_chat_member` — bot was added to a group\n *    When the author creates a group via the deep link, the bot is\n *    automatically added. We detect this, generate an invite link,\n *    and save it to the listing.\n *\n * 2. `message` with `/start listing_ID` — the bot receives a start\n *    command in a group with a payload referencing a listing.\n */\nexport async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n  // Verify webhook secret — fail closed if not configured\n  const webhookSecret = process.env.TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET;\n  if (!webhookSecret) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Webhook not configured\" }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n  const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\");\n  if (headerSecret !== webhookSecret) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  let update: Record<string, unknown>;\n  try {\n    update = await req.json();\n  } catch {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid JSON\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  // Handle bot being added to a group chat\n  if (update.my_chat_member) {\n    await handleChatMemberUpdate(\n      update.my_chat_member as ChatMemberUpdate\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Handle /start command in groups (fallback mechanism)\n  if (update.message) {\n    await handleMessage(update.message as TelegramMessage);\n  }\n\n  // Always return 200 to Telegram to avoid retries\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n}\n\ninterface ChatMemberUpdate {\n  chat: {\n    id: number;\n    title?: string;\n    type: string;\n  };\n  from: {\n    id: number;\n    first_name: string;\n  };\n  new_chat_member: {\n    user: {\n      id: number;\n      is_bot: boolean;\n    };\n    status: string;\n  };\n}\n\ninterface TelegramMessage {\n  chat: {\n    id: number;\n    type: string;\n    title?: string;\n  };\n  text?: string;\n  from?: {\n    id: number;\n  };\n}\n\n/**\n * When the bot is added to a group, check if it's related to a listing.\n *\n * The deep link format is: t.me/BOT?startgroup=listing_ID\n * When a user creates a group through this link, Telegram:\n * 1. Creates the group\n * 2. Adds the bot as a member\n * 3. Sends a `my_chat_member` update\n *\n * We use the group title or a pending mapping to associate the chat with a listing.\n */\nasync function handleChatMemberUpdate(update: ChatMemberUpdate) {\n  const { chat, new_chat_member } = update;\n\n  // Only process when bot is added (member or administrator)\n  if (\n    !new_chat_member.user.is_bot ||\n    ![\"member\", \"administrator\"].includes(new_chat_member.status)\n  ) {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Only process group chats\n  if (![\"group\", \"supergroup\"].includes(chat.type)) {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Try to find the listing this group belongs to.\n  // Strategy 1: Check pending_telegram_groups mapping table\n  const pending = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT listing_id FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE telegram_chat_id = ?\"\n    )\n    .get(chat.id) as { listing_id: number } | undefined;\n\n  if (pending) {\n    await linkTelegramToListing(pending.listing_id, chat.id);\n    db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE telegram_chat_id = ?\").run(\n      chat.id\n    );\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Strategy 2: Check for listings awaiting auto-telegram (most recent unlinked full listing by this author)\n  // We store the chat ID and wait for the /start command or title match\n  // For now, store the mapping and send a welcome message\n  await sendMessage(\n    chat.id,\n    \"Hello! I'm the Bookmate bot. I'll help set up this reading group.\\n\\n\" +\n      'If this group was created for a Bookmate listing, I\\'ll automatically generate an invite link. ' +\n      \"The organizer can also type <code>/link</code> to manually trigger the setup.\"\n  );\n\n  // Store the chat for potential later linking\n  try {\n    db.prepare(\n      \"INSERT OR IGNORE INTO telegram_chats (chat_id, chat_title, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, datetime('now'))\"\n    ).run(chat.id, chat.title || \"\");\n  } catch {\n    // Table might not exist yet on first run — handled gracefully\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Handle messages in group chats.\n * Supports /start with payload and /link command.\n */\nasync function handleMessage(message: TelegramMessage) {\n  if (!message.text || ![\"group\", \"supergroup\"].includes(message.chat.type)) {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  const text = message.text.trim();\n\n  // Handle /start with listing payload (sent when group is created via deep link)\n  if (text.startsWith(\"/start \")) {\n    const payload = text.replace(\"/start \", \"\").trim();\n    const listingId = parseListingIdFromPayload(payload);\n    if (listingId) {\n      // Verify the sender is the listing author to prevent unauthorized linking\n      const telegramUserId = message.from?.id;\n      if (!telegramUserId) {\n        await sendMessage(message.chat.id, \"Could not identify the sender.\");\n        return;\n      }\n\n      const linkedUser = db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM telegram_user_links WHERE telegram_user_id = ?\")\n        .get(telegramUserId) as { user_id: number } | undefined;\n\n      if (linkedUser) {\n        const listing = db\n          .prepare(\"SELECT author_id FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n          .get(listingId) as { author_id: number } | undefined;\n\n        if (listing && listing.author_id === linkedUser.user_id) {\n          await linkTelegramToListing(listingId, message.chat.id);\n          return;\n        }\n      }\n\n      // If no linked user or not the author, store for later linking via /link command\n      await sendMessage(\n        message.chat.id,\n        \"To link this group to a Bookmate listing, the listing author should use the <code>/link</code> command.\"\n      );\n      return;\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Handle /link command — allow manual linking\n  // Security: only show listings authored by a Bookmate user linked to this Telegram user\n  if (text === \"/link\") {\n    const telegramUserId = message.from?.id;\n    if (!telegramUserId) {\n      await sendMessage(message.chat.id, \"Could not identify the sender.\");\n      return;\n    }\n\n    // Look up the Bookmate user linked to this Telegram user\n    const linkedUser = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM telegram_user_links WHERE telegram_user_id = ?\")\n      .get(telegramUserId) as { user_id: number } | undefined;\n\n    if (!linkedUser) {\n      await sendMessage(\n        message.chat.id,\n        \"Your Telegram account is not linked to a Bookmate account. \" +\n          \"Please use the Telegram setup link from your Bookmate listing page to link your account first.\"\n      );\n      return;\n    }\n\n    // Only show unlinked listings authored by this verified user\n    const unlinkedListings = db\n      .prepare(\n        `SELECT id, book_title FROM listings\n         WHERE is_full = 1 AND (telegram_link = '' OR telegram_link IS NULL)\n         AND telegram_chat_id IS NULL\n         AND author_id = ?\n         ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5`\n      )\n      .all(linkedUser.user_id) as { id: number; book_title: string }[];\n\n    if (unlinkedListings.length === 0) {\n      await sendMessage(\n        message.chat.id,\n        \"No unlinked reading groups found for your account. The group may already be set up!\"\n      );\n      return;\n    }\n\n    if (unlinkedListings.length === 1) {\n      await linkTelegramToListing(unlinkedListings[0].id, message.chat.id);\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const listText = unlinkedListings\n      .map((l) => `  /link_${l.id} — \"${escapeHtml(l.book_title)}\"`)\n      .join(\"\\n\");\n    await sendMessage(\n      message.chat.id,\n      `Multiple reading groups need a Telegram link. Pick one:\\n\\n${listText}`\n    );\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Handle /link_ID command — require verified ownership\n  const linkMatch = text.match(/^\\/link_(\\d+)$/);\n  if (linkMatch) {\n    const telegramUserId = message.from?.id;\n    if (!telegramUserId) {\n      await sendMessage(message.chat.id, \"Could not identify the sender.\");\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const linkedUser = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM telegram_user_links WHERE telegram_user_id = ?\")\n      .get(telegramUserId) as { user_id: number } | undefined;\n\n    if (!linkedUser) {\n      await sendMessage(\n        message.chat.id,\n        \"Your Telegram account is not linked to a Bookmate account.\"\n      );\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const listingId = parseInt(linkMatch[1], 10);\n\n    // Verify this user is the listing author and the listing is full\n    const listing = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT author_id, is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n      .get(listingId) as { author_id: number; is_full: number } | undefined;\n\n    if (!listing || listing.author_id !== linkedUser.user_id) {\n      await sendMessage(\n        message.chat.id,\n        \"You can only link Telegram groups to your own Bookmate listings.\"\n      );\n      return;\n    }\n\n    if (!listing.is_full) {\n      await sendMessage(\n        message.chat.id,\n        \"This listing's group is not full yet. You can link a Telegram group once the group reaches its maximum size.\"\n      );\n      return;\n    }\n\n    await linkTelegramToListing(listingId, message.chat.id);\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Link a Telegram chat to a listing:\n * 1. Generate an invite link\n * 2. Save it to the listing\n * 3. Notify all members\n * 4. Send a confirmation message to the Telegram group\n */\nasync function linkTelegramToListing(listingId: number, chatId: number) {\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    await sendMessage(chatId, \"Could not find that reading group on Bookmate.\");\n    return;\n  }\n\n  if (listing.telegram_link) {\n    await sendMessage(chatId, \"This reading group already has a Telegram link set up!\");\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Try to create an invite link\n  let inviteLink = await createChatInviteLink(chatId);\n  if (!inviteLink) {\n    // Fallback: export the default invite link\n    inviteLink = await exportChatInviteLink(chatId);\n  }\n\n  if (!inviteLink) {\n    await sendMessage(\n      chatId,\n      \"I couldn't generate an invite link. Please make sure I have admin permissions in this group, \" +\n        \"then try again with /link\"\n    );\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Save to database\n  db.prepare(\n    \"UPDATE listings SET telegram_link = ?, telegram_chat_id = ? WHERE id = ?\"\n  ).run(inviteLink, chatId, listingId);\n\n  // Notify all members on Bookmate\n  const members = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];\n\n  const bookTitle = listing.book_title as string;\n  for (const member of members) {\n    createNotification(\n      member.user_id,\n      listingId,\n      \"telegram_ready\",\n      `The Telegram group for \"${bookTitle}\" is ready! Click to view the invite link.`\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Send confirmation to the Telegram group\n  // Escape book title to prevent HTML injection via Telegram's HTML parser\n  await sendMessage(\n    chatId,\n    `This group is now linked to the Bookmate reading group for \"<b>${escapeHtml(bookTitle)}</b>\".\\n\\n` +\n      `Invite link: ${inviteLink}\\n\\n` +\n      \"All group members have been notified on Bookmate. Happy reading!\"\n  );\n}\n","numLines":372,"startLine":1,"totalLines":372}}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01M8GYFE3n9prkJbL9E4nPNv","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01HugRaAQHKPqbV1zyvniRzR","name":"Edit","input":{"replace_all":false,"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts","old_string":"  // Strip platform links for non-members to prevent leaking invite URLs\n  const safeListingData = { ...listing };\n  if (!isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    delete safeListingData.telegram_link;\n    delete safeListingData.discord_link;\n  }","new_string":"  // Strip platform links and internal IDs for non-members to prevent leaking invite URLs and internal data\n  const safeListingData = { ...listing };\n  delete safeListingData.telegram_chat_id; // Internal Telegram chat ID — never expose to clients\n  if (!isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    delete safeListingData.telegram_link;\n    delete safeListingData.discord_link;\n  }"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":440,"cache_read_input_tokens":45291,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":440},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"4c5466fa-2333-4a25-bba1-4cb6c49f2287","uuid":"a9ea0806-429e-4b16-8b75-2604ad89dd5a"}

{"type":"stream_event","event":{"type":"content_block_delta","index":2,"delta":{"type":"input_json_delta","partial_json":", \"old_"}},"session_id":"4c5466fa-2333-4a25-bba1-4cb6c49f2287","parent_tool_use_id":null,"uuid":"afc2159a-ddcb-46ec-be8d-78fe195c3711"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01HugRaAQHKPqbV1zyvniRzR","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"4c5466fa-2333-4a25-bba1-4cb6c49f2287","uuid":"5625a4cd-019c-45e9-9571-8110747c688b","timestamp":"2026-03-24T01:07:53.241Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts","oldString":"  // Strip platform links for non-members to prevent leaking invite URLs\n  const safeListingData = { ...listing };\n  if (!isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    delete safeListingData.telegram_link;\n    delete safeListingData.discord_link;\n  }","newString":"  // Strip platform links and internal IDs for non-members to prevent leaking invite URLs and internal data\n  const safeListingData = { ...listing };\n  delete safeListingData.telegram_chat_id; // Internal Telegram chat ID — never expose to clients\n  if (!isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    delete safeListingData.telegram_link;\n    delete safeListingData.discord_link;\n  }","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { getSession, requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\nimport { isBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/telegram\";\nimport { isBotConfigured as isDiscordBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/discord\";\n\nexport async function GET(\n  _req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT\n        l.*,\n        u.display_name as author_name\n      FROM listings l\n      JOIN users u ON l.author_id = u.id\n      WHERE l.id = ?`\n    )\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  const members = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, lm.joined_at\n       FROM listing_members lm\n       JOIN users u ON lm.user_id = u.id\n       WHERE lm.listing_id = ?\n       ORDER BY lm.joined_at ASC`\n    )\n    .all(listingId) as { id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; joined_at: string }[];\n\n  const session = await getSession();\n  const isMember = session.userId\n    ? members.some((m) => m.id === session.userId)\n    : false;\n  const isAuthor = session.userId\n    ? listing.author_id === session.userId\n    : false;\n\n  // PRD: full listings should be invisible to non-participants\n  if (listing.is_full && !isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"This listing is no longer available\" },\n      { status: 404 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Check if the current user has an application (regardless of requires_approval,\n  // since the flag may have been toggled after the application was submitted)\n  let hasApplied = false;\n  let applicationStatus = \"\";\n  if (session.userId && !isMember) {\n    const app = db\n      .prepare(\n        \"SELECT status FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n      )\n      .get(listingId, session.userId) as { status: string } | undefined;\n    if (app) {\n      hasApplied = app.status === \"pending\";\n      applicationStatus = app.status;\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Fetch pending applicants if the viewer is the author\n  let pendingApplicants: { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[] = [];\n  if (isAuthor && listing.requires_approval) {\n    pendingApplicants = db\n      .prepare(\n        `SELECT la.id as application_id, u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, la.applied_at\n         FROM listing_applications la\n         JOIN users u ON la.user_id = u.id\n         WHERE la.listing_id = ? AND la.status = 'pending'\n         ORDER BY la.applied_at ASC`\n      )\n      .all(listingId) as { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[];\n  }\n\n  // Strip platform links for non-members to prevent leaking invite URLs\n  const safeListingData = { ...listing };\n  if (!isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    delete safeListingData.telegram_link;\n    delete safeListingData.discord_link;\n  }\n\n  return NextResponse.json({\n    listing: {\n      ...safeListingData,\n      members,\n      memberCount: members.length,\n      isMember,\n      isAuthor,\n      hasApplied,\n      applicationStatus,\n      pendingApplicants,\n      currentUserId: session.userId || null,\n      telegramBotConfigured: isBotConfigured(),\n      discordBotConfigured: isDiscordBotConfigured(),\n    },\n  });\n}\n\nexport async function PATCH(\n  req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the author can edit this listing\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  // Cannot edit if a platform link has been shared (group already formed)\n  if (listing.telegram_link || listing.discord_link) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Cannot edit a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  try {\n    const body = await req.json();\n    const {\n      language,\n      readingPace,\n      startDate,\n      meetingFormat,\n      maxGroupSize,\n      requiresApproval,\n      platformPreference,\n    } = body;\n\n    // Validate fields that are provided\n    if (readingPace !== undefined && (!readingPace || readingPace.length > 200)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Reading pace is required (max 200 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n      if (!/^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$/.test(startDate)) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid start date format (expected YYYY-MM-DD)\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n      const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n      if (startDate < today) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Start date cannot be in the past\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n    }\n\n    if (meetingFormat !== undefined && ![\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid meeting format\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n      const size = parseInt(maxGroupSize, 10);\n      if (isNaN(size) || size < 2 || size > 20) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Group size must be between 2 and 20\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n\n      // Cannot reduce below current member count\n      const memberCount = (db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n        .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n\n      if (size < memberCount) {\n        return NextResponse.json(\n          { error: `Cannot reduce group size below current member count (${memberCount})` },\n          { status: 400 }\n        );\n      }\n    }\n\n    if (language !== undefined && (!language || typeof language !== \"string\" || language.length > 100)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Language is required (max 100 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (platformPreference !== undefined && ![\"telegram\", \"discord\"].includes(platformPreference)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid platform preference\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    // Build dynamic UPDATE\n    const updates: string[] = [];\n    const values: unknown[] = [];\n\n    if (language !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"language = ?\");\n      values.push(language);\n    }\n    if (readingPace !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"reading_pace = ?\");\n      values.push(readingPace.trim());\n    }\n    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"start_date = ?\");\n      values.push(startDate);\n    }\n    if (meetingFormat !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"meeting_format = ?\");\n      values.push(meetingFormat);\n    }\n    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n      const newSize = parseInt(maxGroupSize, 10);\n      updates.push(\"max_group_size = ?\");\n      values.push(newSize);\n\n      // If increasing group size on a full listing, reopen it\n      const currentMemberCount = (db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n        .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n      if (newSize > currentMemberCount && listing.is_full) {\n        updates.push(\"is_full = ?\");\n        values.push(0);\n      }\n    }\n    if (requiresApproval !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"requires_approval = ?\");\n      values.push(requiresApproval ? 1 : 0);\n    }\n    if (platformPreference !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"platform_preference = ?\");\n      values.push(platformPreference);\n    }\n\n    if (updates.length === 0) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"No fields to update\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    values.push(listingId);\n    db.prepare(`UPDATE listings SET ${updates.join(\", \")} WHERE id = ?`).run(...values);\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Update listing error:\", error);\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n}\n\nexport async function DELETE(\n  _req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the author can delete this listing\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  // Cannot delete if a platform link has been shared\n  if (listing.telegram_link || listing.discord_link) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Cannot delete a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  try {\n    // Get members to notify (excluding the author)\n    const members = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id != ?\")\n      .all(listingId, session.userId) as { user_id: number }[];\n\n    // Delete in a transaction (notifications sent after, so they aren't wiped)\n    const deleteTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM notifications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM ratings WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    });\n\n    deleteTransaction();\n\n    // Send deletion notifications after transaction (listing_id is NULL since listing is gone)\n    for (const member of members) {\n      try {\n        createNotification(\n          member.user_id,\n          null,\n          \"listing_deleted\",\n          `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" has been cancelled by the organizer.`\n        );\n      } catch {\n        // Notification failure should not block response\n      }\n    }\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Delete listing error:\", error);\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":86,"oldLines":8,"newStart":86,"newLines":9,"lines":["       .all(listingId) as { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[];","   }"," ","-  // Strip platform links for non-members to prevent leaking invite URLs","+  // Strip platform links and internal IDs for non-members to prevent leaking invite URLs and internal data","   const safeListingData = { ...listing };","+  delete safeListingData.telegram_chat_id; // Internal Telegram chat ID — never expose to clients","   if (!isMember && !isAuthor) {","     delete safeListingData.telegram_link;","     delete safeListingData.discord_link;"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01M8GYFE3n9prkJbL9E4nPNv","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01QhnZQRw3RWg8VDkQp4VMrp","name":"Edit","input":{"replace_all":false,"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts","old_string":"    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n      const newSize = parseInt(maxGroupSize, 10);\n      updates.push(\"max_group_size = ?\");\n      values.push(newSize);\n\n      // If increasing group size on a full listing, reopen it\n      const currentMemberCount = (db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n        .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n      if (newSize > currentMemberCount && listing.is_full) {\n        updates.push(\"is_full = ?\");\n        values.push(0);\n      }\n    }","new_string":"    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n      const newSize = parseInt(maxGroupSize, 10);\n      updates.push(\"max_group_size = ?\");\n      values.push(newSize);\n\n      // Atomically set is_full based on actual member count at update time\n      // This avoids a race condition where a concurrent join could fill the group\n      // between our COUNT(*) read and the UPDATE write.\n      if (listing.is_full) {\n        updates.push(\"is_full = CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?) < ? THEN 0 ELSE 1 END\");\n        values.push(listingId, newSize);\n      }\n    }"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":440,"cache_read_input_tokens":45291,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":440},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"4c5466fa-2333-4a25-bba1-4cb6c49f2287","uuid":"6f4a8de6-b289-4795-bac2-fb7fd7795938"}

{"type":"stream_event","event":{"type":"message_stop"},"session_id":"4c5466fa-2333-4a25-bba1-4cb6c49f2287","parent_tool_use_id":null,"uuid":"36aa80dd-93fc-4a56-9046-43b06354c39b"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01QhnZQRw3RWg8VDkQp4VMrp","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"4c5466fa-2333-4a25-bba1-4cb6c49f2287","uuid":"98129e86-664e-499c-beb8-f6d8c47fb6b1","timestamp":"2026-03-24T01:07:54.457Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts","oldString":"    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n      const newSize = parseInt(maxGroupSize, 10);\n      updates.push(\"max_group_size = ?\");\n      values.push(newSize);\n\n      // If increasing group size on a full listing, reopen it\n      const currentMemberCount = (db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n        .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n      if (newSize > currentMemberCount && listing.is_full) {\n        updates.push(\"is_full = ?\");\n        values.push(0);\n      }\n    }","newString":"    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n      const newSize = parseInt(maxGroupSize, 10);\n      updates.push(\"max_group_size = ?\");\n      values.push(newSize);\n\n      // Atomically set is_full based on actual member count at update time\n      // This avoids a race condition where a concurrent join could fill the group\n      // between our COUNT(*) read and the UPDATE write.\n      if (listing.is_full) {\n        updates.push(\"is_full = CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?) < ? THEN 0 ELSE 1 END\");\n        values.push(listingId, newSize);\n      }\n    }","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { getSession, requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\nimport { isBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/telegram\";\nimport { isBotConfigured as isDiscordBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/discord\";\n\nexport async function GET(\n  _req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT\n        l.*,\n        u.display_name as author_name\n      FROM listings l\n      JOIN users u ON l.author_id = u.id\n      WHERE l.id = ?`\n    )\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  const members = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, lm.joined_at\n       FROM listing_members lm\n       JOIN users u ON lm.user_id = u.id\n       WHERE lm.listing_id = ?\n       ORDER BY lm.joined_at ASC`\n    )\n    .all(listingId) as { id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; joined_at: string }[];\n\n  const session = await getSession();\n  const isMember = session.userId\n    ? members.some((m) => m.id === session.userId)\n    : false;\n  const isAuthor = session.userId\n    ? listing.author_id === session.userId\n    : false;\n\n  // PRD: full listings should be invisible to non-participants\n  if (listing.is_full && !isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"This listing is no longer available\" },\n      { status: 404 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Check if the current user has an application (regardless of requires_approval,\n  // since the flag may have been toggled after the application was submitted)\n  let hasApplied = false;\n  let applicationStatus = \"\";\n  if (session.userId && !isMember) {\n    const app = db\n      .prepare(\n        \"SELECT status FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n      )\n      .get(listingId, session.userId) as { status: string } | undefined;\n    if (app) {\n      hasApplied = app.status === \"pending\";\n      applicationStatus = app.status;\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Fetch pending applicants if the viewer is the author\n  let pendingApplicants: { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[] = [];\n  if (isAuthor && listing.requires_approval) {\n    pendingApplicants = db\n      .prepare(\n        `SELECT la.id as application_id, u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, la.applied_at\n         FROM listing_applications la\n         JOIN users u ON la.user_id = u.id\n         WHERE la.listing_id = ? AND la.status = 'pending'\n         ORDER BY la.applied_at ASC`\n      )\n      .all(listingId) as { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[];\n  }\n\n  // Strip platform links and internal IDs for non-members to prevent leaking invite URLs and internal data\n  const safeListingData = { ...listing };\n  delete safeListingData.telegram_chat_id; // Internal Telegram chat ID — never expose to clients\n  if (!isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    delete safeListingData.telegram_link;\n    delete safeListingData.discord_link;\n  }\n\n  return NextResponse.json({\n    listing: {\n      ...safeListingData,\n      members,\n      memberCount: members.length,\n      isMember,\n      isAuthor,\n      hasApplied,\n      applicationStatus,\n      pendingApplicants,\n      currentUserId: session.userId || null,\n      telegramBotConfigured: isBotConfigured(),\n      discordBotConfigured: isDiscordBotConfigured(),\n    },\n  });\n}\n\nexport async function PATCH(\n  req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the author can edit this listing\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  // Cannot edit if a platform link has been shared (group already formed)\n  if (listing.telegram_link || listing.discord_link) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Cannot edit a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  try {\n    const body = await req.json();\n    const {\n      language,\n      readingPace,\n      startDate,\n      meetingFormat,\n      maxGroupSize,\n      requiresApproval,\n      platformPreference,\n    } = body;\n\n    // Validate fields that are provided\n    if (readingPace !== undefined && (!readingPace || readingPace.length > 200)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Reading pace is required (max 200 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n      if (!/^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$/.test(startDate)) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid start date format (expected YYYY-MM-DD)\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n      const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n      if (startDate < today) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Start date cannot be in the past\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n    }\n\n    if (meetingFormat !== undefined && ![\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid meeting format\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n      const size = parseInt(maxGroupSize, 10);\n      if (isNaN(size) || size < 2 || size > 20) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Group size must be between 2 and 20\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n\n      // Cannot reduce below current member count\n      const memberCount = (db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n        .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n\n      if (size < memberCount) {\n        return NextResponse.json(\n          { error: `Cannot reduce group size below current member count (${memberCount})` },\n          { status: 400 }\n        );\n      }\n    }\n\n    if (language !== undefined && (!language || typeof language !== \"string\" || language.length > 100)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Language is required (max 100 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (platformPreference !== undefined && ![\"telegram\", \"discord\"].includes(platformPreference)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid platform preference\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    // Build dynamic UPDATE\n    const updates: string[] = [];\n    const values: unknown[] = [];\n\n    if (language !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"language = ?\");\n      values.push(language);\n    }\n    if (readingPace !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"reading_pace = ?\");\n      values.push(readingPace.trim());\n    }\n    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"start_date = ?\");\n      values.push(startDate);\n    }\n    if (meetingFormat !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"meeting_format = ?\");\n      values.push(meetingFormat);\n    }\n    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n      const newSize = parseInt(maxGroupSize, 10);\n      updates.push(\"max_group_size = ?\");\n      values.push(newSize);\n\n      // If increasing group size on a full listing, reopen it\n      const currentMemberCount = (db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n        .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n      if (newSize > currentMemberCount && listing.is_full) {\n        updates.push(\"is_full = ?\");\n        values.push(0);\n      }\n    }\n    if (requiresApproval !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"requires_approval = ?\");\n      values.push(requiresApproval ? 1 : 0);\n    }\n    if (platformPreference !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"platform_preference = ?\");\n      values.push(platformPreference);\n    }\n\n    if (updates.length === 0) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"No fields to update\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    values.push(listingId);\n    db.prepare(`UPDATE listings SET ${updates.join(\", \")} WHERE id = ?`).run(...values);\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Update listing error:\", error);\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n}\n\nexport async function DELETE(\n  _req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the author can delete this listing\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  // Cannot delete if a platform link has been shared\n  if (listing.telegram_link || listing.discord_link) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Cannot delete a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  try {\n    // Get members to notify (excluding the author)\n    const members = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id != ?\")\n      .all(listingId, session.userId) as { user_id: number }[];\n\n    // Delete in a transaction (notifications sent after, so they aren't wiped)\n    const deleteTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM notifications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM ratings WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    });\n\n    deleteTransaction();\n\n    // Send deletion notifications after transaction (listing_id is NULL since listing is gone)\n    for (const member of members) {\n      try {\n        createNotification(\n          member.user_id,\n          null,\n          \"listing_deleted\",\n          `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" has been cancelled by the organizer.`\n        );\n      } catch {\n        // Notification failure should not block response\n      }\n    }\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Delete listing error:\", error);\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":229,"oldLines":13,"newStart":229,"newLines":12,"lines":["       updates.push(\"max_group_size = ?\");","       values.push(newSize);"," ","-      // If increasing group size on a full listing, reopen it","-      const currentMemberCount = (db","-        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")","-        .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;","-      if (newSize > currentMemberCount && listing.is_full) {","-        updates.push(\"is_full = ?\");","-        values.push(0);","+      // Atomically set is_full based on actual member count at update time","+      // This avoids a race condition where a concurrent join could fill the group","+      // between our COUNT(*) read and the UPDATE write.","+      if (listing.is_full) {","+        updates.push(\"is_full = CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?) < ? THEN 0 ELSE 1 END\");","+        values.push(listingId, newSize);","       }","     }","     if (requiresApproval !== undefined) {"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"stream_event","event":{"type":"content_block_delta","index":2,"delta":{"type":"input_json_delta","partial_json":", \"new_str"}},"session_id":"4c5466fa-2333-4a25-bba1-4cb6c49f2287","parent_tool_use_id":null,"uuid":"6d5f99fb-52d8-4f5c-aeb9-7be958b1db86"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_014L82oaWWDWxkh6wV2yUGiP","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/applications/route.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"4c5466fa-2333-4a25-bba1-4cb6c49f2287","uuid":"1c998be7-5fbc-4ea5-b11a-f9d987594fca","timestamp":"2026-03-24T01:08:15.606Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/applications/route.ts","oldString":"import { notifyApplicationDecision, notifyGroupFull } from \"@/lib/notifications\";","newString":"import { notifyApplicationDecision, notifyGroupFull, notifyListingAuthor } from \"@/lib/notifications\";","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { notifyApplicationDecision, notifyGroupFull } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n\nexport async function PATCH(\n  req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the organizer can manage applications\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  const body = await req.json();\n  const { applicationId, action } = body;\n\n  if (!applicationId || typeof applicationId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(applicationId) || applicationId < 1 || ![\"approve\", \"reject\"].includes(action)) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Invalid request. Provide applicationId and action (approve/reject).\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Verify application belongs to this listing and is pending\n  const application = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT * FROM listing_applications WHERE id = ? AND listing_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n    )\n    .get(applicationId, listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!application) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Application not found or already decided\" },\n      { status: 404 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const applicantUserId = application.user_id as number;\n\n  if (action === \"approve\") {\n    // Use transaction to ensure atomicity\n    const approveTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n      // Check if group is already full\n      const { count } = db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n        .get(listingId) as { count: number };\n\n      if (count >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n        throw new Error(\"Group is already full\");\n      }\n\n      // Update application status\n      db.prepare(\n        \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'approved', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n      ).run(applicationId);\n\n      // Add to members\n      db.prepare(\n        \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n      ).run(listingId, applicantUserId);\n\n      // Check if group is now full\n      const newCount = count + 1;\n      let rejectedApps: { id: number; user_id: number }[] = [];\n      if (newCount >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n        db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET is_full = 1 WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n\n        // Reject remaining pending applications inside the transaction\n        rejectedApps = db\n          .prepare(\n            \"SELECT id, user_id FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n          )\n          .all(listingId) as { id: number; user_id: number }[];\n\n        for (const app of rejectedApps) {\n          db.prepare(\n            \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n          ).run(app.id);\n        }\n\n        return { isFull: true, rejectedApps };\n      }\n      return { isFull: false, rejectedApps };\n    });\n\n    try {\n      const result = approveTransaction();\n\n      // Send notifications outside the transaction (non-critical)\n      try {\n        notifyApplicationDecision(applicantUserId, listingId, \"approved\");\n\n        if (result.isFull) {\n          notifyGroupFull(listingId);\n          for (const app of result.rejectedApps) {\n            notifyApplicationDecision(app.user_id, listingId, \"rejected\");\n          }\n        }\n      } catch (notifErr) {\n        console.error(\"Notification error (approval succeeded):\", notifErr);\n      }\n\n      return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    } catch (err) {\n      const message = err instanceof Error ? err.message : \"Failed to approve\";\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n  } else {\n    // Reject\n    db.prepare(\n      \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n    ).run(applicationId);\n\n    notifyApplicationDecision(applicantUserId, listingId, \"rejected\");\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n  }\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":1,"oldLines":7,"newStart":1,"newLines":7,"lines":[" import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";"," import db from \"@/lib/db\";"," import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";","-import { notifyApplicationDecision, notifyGroupFull } from \"@/lib/notifications\";","+import { notifyApplicationDecision, notifyGroupFull, notifyListingAuthor } from \"@/lib/notifications\";"," "," export async function PATCH(","   req: NextRequest,"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}
