{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01LBHwdUth9CXLS8YHpeHEiM","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/applications/route.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"4c5466fa-2333-4a25-bba1-4cb6c49f2287","uuid":"01e4bca6-e8ee-4b63-893a-0bf84d62643b","timestamp":"2026-03-24T01:12:19.891Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/applications/route.ts","oldString":"      // Send notifications outside the transaction (non-critical)\n      try {\n        notifyApplicationDecision(applicantUserId, listingId, \"approved\");\n\n        if (result.isFull) {\n          notifyGroupFull(listingId);\n          for (const app of result.rejectedApps) {\n            notifyApplicationDecision(app.user_id, listingId, \"rejected\");\n          }\n        }\n      } catch (notifErr) {\n        console.error(\"Notification error (approval succeeded):\", notifErr);\n      }","newString":"      // Send notifications outside the transaction (non-critical)\n      try {\n        notifyApplicationDecision(applicantUserId, listingId, \"approved\");\n\n        // Notify the author that a new member has joined (same as direct-join flow)\n        const applicant = db\n          .prepare(\"SELECT display_name FROM users WHERE id = ?\")\n          .get(applicantUserId) as { display_name: string } | undefined;\n        if (applicant) {\n          notifyListingAuthor(listingId, applicant.display_name);\n        }\n\n        if (result.isFull) {\n          notifyGroupFull(listingId);\n          for (const app of result.rejectedApps) {\n            notifyApplicationDecision(app.user_id, listingId, \"rejected\");\n          }\n        }\n      } catch (notifErr) {\n        console.error(\"Notification error (approval succeeded):\", notifErr);\n      }","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { notifyApplicationDecision, notifyGroupFull, notifyListingAuthor } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n\nexport async function PATCH(\n  req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the organizer can manage applications\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  const body = await req.json();\n  const { applicationId, action } = body;\n\n  if (!applicationId || typeof applicationId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(applicationId) || applicationId < 1 || ![\"approve\", \"reject\"].includes(action)) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Invalid request. Provide applicationId and action (approve/reject).\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Verify application belongs to this listing and is pending\n  const application = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT * FROM listing_applications WHERE id = ? AND listing_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n    )\n    .get(applicationId, listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!application) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Application not found or already decided\" },\n      { status: 404 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const applicantUserId = application.user_id as number;\n\n  if (action === \"approve\") {\n    // Use transaction to ensure atomicity\n    const approveTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n      // Check if group is already full\n      const { count } = db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n        .get(listingId) as { count: number };\n\n      if (count >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n        throw new Error(\"Group is already full\");\n      }\n\n      // Update application status\n      db.prepare(\n        \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'approved', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n      ).run(applicationId);\n\n      // Add to members\n      db.prepare(\n        \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n      ).run(listingId, applicantUserId);\n\n      // Check if group is now full\n      const newCount = count + 1;\n      let rejectedApps: { id: number; user_id: number }[] = [];\n      if (newCount >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n        db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET is_full = 1 WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n\n        // Reject remaining pending applications inside the transaction\n        rejectedApps = db\n          .prepare(\n            \"SELECT id, user_id FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n          )\n          .all(listingId) as { id: number; user_id: number }[];\n\n        for (const app of rejectedApps) {\n          db.prepare(\n            \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n          ).run(app.id);\n        }\n\n        return { isFull: true, rejectedApps };\n      }\n      return { isFull: false, rejectedApps };\n    });\n\n    try {\n      const result = approveTransaction();\n\n      // Send notifications outside the transaction (non-critical)\n      try {\n        notifyApplicationDecision(applicantUserId, listingId, \"approved\");\n\n        if (result.isFull) {\n          notifyGroupFull(listingId);\n          for (const app of result.rejectedApps) {\n            notifyApplicationDecision(app.user_id, listingId, \"rejected\");\n          }\n        }\n      } catch (notifErr) {\n        console.error(\"Notification error (approval succeeded):\", notifErr);\n      }\n\n      return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    } catch (err) {\n      const message = err instanceof Error ? err.message : \"Failed to approve\";\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n  } else {\n    // Reject\n    db.prepare(\n      \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n    ).run(applicationId);\n\n    notifyApplicationDecision(applicantUserId, listingId, \"rejected\");\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n  }\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":109,"oldLines":6,"newStart":109,"newLines":14,"lines":["       try {","         notifyApplicationDecision(applicantUserId, listingId, \"approved\");"," ","+        // Notify the author that a new member has joined (same as direct-join flow)","+        const applicant = db","+          .prepare(\"SELECT display_name FROM users WHERE id = ?\")","+          .get(applicantUserId) as { display_name: string } | undefined;","+        if (applicant) {","+          notifyListingAuthor(listingId, applicant.display_name);","+        }","+","         if (result.isFull) {","           notifyGroupFull(listingId);","           for (const app of result.rejectedApps) {"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

AND user_id != ?\")\n    .all(listingId, listing?.author_id ?? -1) as { user_id: number }[];","new_string":"export function notifyGroupFull(listingId: number) {\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT book_title, platform_preference, author_id FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as { book_title: string; platform_preference: string; author_id: number } | undefined;\n  // Include all members (including author) — everyone should know the group is full\n  const members = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":785,"cache_read_input_tokens":46598,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":785},"output_tokens":2,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"4c5466fa-2333-4a25-bba1-4cb6c49f2287","uuid":"5f6b4ecf-f5d6-4acd-ab1e-15886610b18c"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_0124HyjATYC1AMAeoDc1gBVU","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/notifications.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"4c5466fa-2333-4a25-bba1-4cb6c49f2287","uuid":"0f0bf45c-e71e-409f-83c8-296e9888d7bc","timestamp":"2026-03-24T01:19:42.880Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/notifications.ts","oldString":"export function notifyGroupFull(listingId: number) {\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT book_title, platform_preference, author_id FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as { book_title: string; platform_preference: string; author_id: number } | undefined;\n  // Exclude the author — they already received a separate \"new_member\" notification\n  const members = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id != ?\")\n    .all(listingId, listing?.author_id ?? -1) as { user_id: number }[];","newString":"export function notifyGroupFull(listingId: number) {\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT book_title, platform_preference, author_id FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as { book_title: string; platform_preference: string; author_id: number } | undefined;\n  // Include all members (including author) — everyone should know the group is full\n  const members = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];","originalFile":"import db from \"./db\";\nimport { sendEmail } from \"./email\";\n\nfunction getUserEmail(userId: number): string | null {\n  const user = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT email FROM users WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(userId) as { email: string } | undefined;\n  return user?.email || null;\n}\n\nexport function createNotification(\n  userId: number,\n  listingId: number | null,\n  type: string,\n  message: string\n) {\n  db.prepare(\n    \"INSERT INTO notifications (user_id, listing_id, type, message) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)\"\n  ).run(userId, listingId, type, message);\n\n  // Also send email notification (fire-and-forget)\n  const email = getUserEmail(userId);\n  if (email) {\n    const subject = getEmailSubject(type);\n    sendEmail(email, subject, message).catch(() => {\n      // Email sending is best-effort — don't block on failure\n    });\n  }\n}\n\nfunction getEmailSubject(type: string): string {\n  switch (type) {\n    case \"new_member\":\n      return \"Bookmate: Someone joined your reading group!\";\n    case \"group_full\":\n      return \"Bookmate: Your reading group is full!\";\n    case \"application_received\":\n      return \"Bookmate: New application for your reading group\";\n    case \"application_approved\":\n      return \"Bookmate: Your application was approved!\";\n    case \"application_rejected\":\n      return \"Bookmate: Application update\";\n    case \"rating_received\":\n      return \"Bookmate: You received a new rating\";\n    case \"listing_deleted\":\n      return \"Bookmate: A reading group has been cancelled\";\n    case \"listing_updated\":\n      return \"Bookmate: A reading group has been updated\";\n    case \"telegram_ready\":\n      return \"Bookmate: Your Telegram reading group is ready!\";\n    case \"discord_ready\":\n      return \"Bookmate: Your Discord channel is ready!\";\n    default:\n      return \"Bookmate: Notification\";\n  }\n}\n\nexport function notifyListingAuthor(\n  listingId: number,\n  joinerName: string\n) {\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT l.author_id, l.book_title FROM listings l WHERE l.id = ?\"\n    )\n    .get(listingId) as { author_id: number; book_title: string } | undefined;\n\n  if (listing) {\n    createNotification(\n      listing.author_id,\n      listingId,\n      \"new_member\",\n      `${joinerName} joined your reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\"`\n    );\n  }\n}\n\nexport function notifyApplicationReceived(\n  listingId: number,\n  applicantName: string\n) {\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT l.author_id, l.book_title FROM listings l WHERE l.id = ?\"\n    )\n    .get(listingId) as { author_id: number; book_title: string } | undefined;\n\n  if (listing) {\n    createNotification(\n      listing.author_id,\n      listingId,\n      \"application_received\",\n      `${applicantName} applied to join your reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\"`\n    );\n  }\n}\n\nexport function notifyApplicationDecision(\n  userId: number,\n  listingId: number,\n  decision: \"approved\" | \"rejected\"\n) {\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT book_title FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as { book_title: string } | undefined;\n\n  if (listing) {\n    const type = decision === \"approved\" ? \"application_approved\" : \"application_rejected\";\n    const message =\n      decision === \"approved\"\n        ? `Your application to join \"${listing.book_title}\" was approved!`\n        : `Your application to join \"${listing.book_title}\" was not accepted.`;\n    createNotification(userId, listingId, type, message);\n  }\n}\n\nexport function notifyGroupFull(listingId: number) {\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT book_title, platform_preference, author_id FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as { book_title: string; platform_preference: string; author_id: number } | undefined;\n  // Exclude the author — they already received a separate \"new_member\" notification\n  const members = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id != ?\")\n    .all(listingId, listing?.author_id ?? -1) as { user_id: number }[];\n\n  if (listing) {\n    const platform = listing.platform_preference === \"discord\" ? \"Discord\" : \"Telegram\";\n    const botConfigured = listing.platform_preference === \"discord\"\n      ? !!process.env.DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN\n      : !!process.env.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN;\n    const message = botConfigured\n      ? `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" is now full! The ${platform} group will be set up automatically.`\n      : `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" is now full! The organizer will share a ${platform} link soon.`;\n\n    for (const member of members) {\n      createNotification(\n        member.user_id,\n        listingId,\n        \"group_full\",\n        message\n      );\n    }\n  }\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":118,"oldLines":10,"newStart":118,"newLines":10,"lines":["   const listing = db","     .prepare(\"SELECT book_title, platform_preference, author_id FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")","     .get(listingId) as { book_title: string; platform_preference: string; author_id: number } | undefined;","-  // Exclude the author — they already received a separate \"new_member\" notification","+  // Include all members (including author) — everyone should know the group is full","   const members = db","-    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id != ?\")","-    .all(listingId, listing?.author_id ?? -1) as { user_id: number }[];","+    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")","+    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];"," ","   if (listing) {","     const platform = listing.platform_preference === \"discord\" ? \"Discord\" : \"Telegram\";"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01PKeMJtnTACT2XMDf8wkgUT","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_014eDwkkqEYbucyLtsu6BK1a","name":"Edit","input":{"replace_all":false,"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/telegram/webhook/route.ts","old_string":"  // Try to find the listing this group belongs to.\n  // Strategy 1: Check pending_telegram_groups mapping table\n  const pending = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT listing_id FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE telegram_chat_id = ?\"\n    )\n    .get(chat.id) as { listing_id: number } | undefined;\n\n  if (pending) {\n    await linkTelegramToListing(pending.listing_id, chat.id);\n    db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE telegram_chat_id = ?\").run(\n      chat.id\n    );\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Strategy 2: Check for listings awaiting auto-telegram (most recent unlinked full listing by this author)\n  // We store the chat ID and wait for the /start command or title match\n  // For now, store the mapping and send a welcome message","new_string":"  // The bot was added to a group. Since we can't determine the listing from\n  // the my_chat_member event alone, send a welcome message and wait for the\n  // /start payload or /link command to establish the association."},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":566,"cache_read_input_tokens":47383,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":566},"output_tokens":2,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"4c5466fa-2333-4a25-bba1-4cb6c49f2287","uuid":"410106af-3788-4e28-8cdc-f0c9850859fb"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_014eDwkkqEYbucyLtsu6BK1a","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/telegram/webhook/route.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"4c5466fa-2333-4a25-bba1-4cb6c49f2287","uuid":"29b68e03-7119-43d0-91b9-9704887cdf4b","timestamp":"2026-03-24T01:41:25.982Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/telegram/webhook/route.ts","oldString":"  // Try to find the listing this group belongs to.\n  // Strategy 1: Check pending_telegram_groups mapping table\n  const pending = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT listing_id FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE telegram_chat_id = ?\"\n    )\n    .get(chat.id) as { listing_id: number } | undefined;\n\n  if (pending) {\n    await linkTelegramToListing(pending.listing_id, chat.id);\n    db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE telegram_chat_id = ?\").run(\n      chat.id\n    );\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Strategy 2: Check for listings awaiting auto-telegram (most recent unlinked full listing by this author)\n  // We store the chat ID and wait for the /start command or title match\n  // For now, store the mapping and send a welcome message","newString":"  // The bot was added to a group. Since we can't determine the listing from\n  // the my_chat_member event alone, send a welcome message and wait for the\n  // /start payload or /link command to establish the association.","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport {\n  createChatInviteLink,\n  exportChatInviteLink,\n  sendMessage,\n  parseListingIdFromPayload,\n  escapeHtml,\n} from \"@/lib/telegram\";\nimport { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n\n/**\n * Telegram webhook endpoint.\n *\n * Handles two types of updates:\n *\n * 1. `my_chat_member` — bot was added to a group\n *    When the author creates a group via the deep link, the bot is\n *    automatically added. We detect this, generate an invite link,\n *    and save it to the listing.\n *\n * 2. `message` with `/start listing_ID` — the bot receives a start\n *    command in a group with a payload referencing a listing.\n */\nexport async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n  // Verify webhook secret — fail closed if not configured\n  const webhookSecret = process.env.TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET;\n  if (!webhookSecret) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Webhook not configured\" }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n  const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\");\n  if (headerSecret !== webhookSecret) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  let update: Record<string, unknown>;\n  try {\n    update = await req.json();\n  } catch {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid JSON\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  // Handle bot being added to a group chat\n  if (update.my_chat_member) {\n    await handleChatMemberUpdate(\n      update.my_chat_member as ChatMemberUpdate\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Handle /start command in groups (fallback mechanism)\n  if (update.message) {\n    await handleMessage(update.message as TelegramMessage);\n  }\n\n  // Always return 200 to Telegram to avoid retries\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n}\n\ninterface ChatMemberUpdate {\n  chat: {\n    id: number;\n    title?: string;\n    type: string;\n  };\n  from: {\n    id: number;\n    first_name: string;\n  };\n  new_chat_member: {\n    user: {\n      id: number;\n      is_bot: boolean;\n    };\n    status: string;\n  };\n}\n\ninterface TelegramMessage {\n  chat: {\n    id: number;\n    type: string;\n    title?: string;\n  };\n  text?: string;\n  from?: {\n    id: number;\n  };\n}\n\n/**\n * When the bot is added to a group, check if it's related to a listing.\n *\n * The deep link format is: t.me/BOT?startgroup=listing_ID\n * When a user creates a group through this link, Telegram:\n * 1. Creates the group\n * 2. Adds the bot as a member\n * 3. Sends a `my_chat_member` update\n *\n * We use the group title or a pending mapping to associate the chat with a listing.\n */\nasync function handleChatMemberUpdate(update: ChatMemberUpdate) {\n  const { chat, new_chat_member } = update;\n\n  // Only process when bot is added (member or administrator)\n  if (\n    !new_chat_member.user.is_bot ||\n    ![\"member\", \"administrator\"].includes(new_chat_member.status)\n  ) {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Only process group chats\n  if (![\"group\", \"supergroup\"].includes(chat.type)) {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Try to find the listing this group belongs to.\n  // Strategy 1: Check pending_telegram_groups mapping table\n  const pending = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT listing_id FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE telegram_chat_id = ?\"\n    )\n    .get(chat.id) as { listing_id: number } | undefined;\n\n  if (pending) {\n    await linkTelegramToListing(pending.listing_id, chat.id);\n    db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE telegram_chat_id = ?\").run(\n      chat.id\n    );\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Strategy 2: Check for listings awaiting auto-telegram (most recent unlinked full listing by this author)\n  // We store the chat ID and wait for the /start command or title match\n  // For now, store the mapping and send a welcome message\n  await sendMessage(\n    chat.id,\n    \"Hello! I'm the Bookmate bot. I'll help set up this reading group.\\n\\n\" +\n      'If this group was created for a Bookmate listing, I\\'ll automatically generate an invite link. ' +\n      \"The organizer can also type <code>/link</code> to manually trigger the setup.\"\n  );\n\n  // Store the chat for potential later linking\n  try {\n    db.prepare(\n      \"INSERT OR IGNORE INTO telegram_chats (chat_id, chat_title, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, datetime('now'))\"\n    ).run(chat.id, chat.title || \"\");\n  } catch {\n    // Table might not exist yet on first run — handled gracefully\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Handle messages in group chats.\n * Supports /start with payload and /link command.\n */\nasync function handleMessage(message: TelegramMessage) {\n  if (!message.text || ![\"group\", \"supergroup\"].includes(message.chat.type)) {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  const text = message.text.trim();\n\n  // Handle /start with listing payload (sent when group is created via deep link)\n  if (text.startsWith(\"/start \")) {\n    const payload = text.replace(\"/start \", \"\").trim();\n    const listingId = parseListingIdFromPayload(payload);\n    if (listingId) {\n      // Verify the sender is the listing author to prevent unauthorized linking\n      const telegramUserId = message.from?.id;\n      if (!telegramUserId) {\n        await sendMessage(message.chat.id, \"Could not identify the sender.\");\n        return;\n      }\n\n      const linkedUser = db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM telegram_user_links WHERE telegram_user_id = ?\")\n        .get(telegramUserId) as { user_id: number } | undefined;\n\n      if (linkedUser) {\n        const listing = db\n          .prepare(\"SELECT author_id FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n          .get(listingId) as { author_id: number } | undefined;\n\n        if (listing && listing.author_id === linkedUser.user_id) {\n          await linkTelegramToListing(listingId, message.chat.id);\n          return;\n        }\n      }\n\n      // If no linked user or not the author, store for later linking via /link command\n      await sendMessage(\n        message.chat.id,\n        \"To link this group to a Bookmate listing, the listing author should use the <code>/link</code> command.\"\n      );\n      return;\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Handle /link command — allow manual linking\n  // Security: only show listings authored by a Bookmate user linked to this Telegram user\n  if (text === \"/link\") {\n    const telegramUserId = message.from?.id;\n    if (!telegramUserId) {\n      await sendMessage(message.chat.id, \"Could not identify the sender.\");\n      return;\n    }\n\n    // Look up the Bookmate user linked to this Telegram user\n    const linkedUser = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM telegram_user_links WHERE telegram_user_id = ?\")\n      .get(telegramUserId) as { user_id: number } | undefined;\n\n    if (!linkedUser) {\n      await sendMessage(\n        message.chat.id,\n        \"Your Telegram account is not linked to a Bookmate account. \" +\n          \"Please use the Telegram setup link from your Bookmate listing page to link your account first.\"\n      );\n      return;\n    }\n\n    // Only show unlinked listings authored by this verified user\n    const unlinkedListings = db\n      .prepare(\n        `SELECT id, book_title FROM listings\n         WHERE is_full = 1 AND (telegram_link = '' OR telegram_link IS NULL)\n         AND telegram_chat_id IS NULL\n         AND author_id = ?\n         ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5`\n      )\n      .all(linkedUser.user_id) as { id: number; book_title: string }[];\n\n    if (unlinkedListings.length === 0) {\n      await sendMessage(\n        message.chat.id,\n        \"No unlinked reading groups found for your account. The group may already be set up!\"\n      );\n      return;\n    }\n\n    if (unlinkedListings.length === 1) {\n      await linkTelegramToListing(unlinkedListings[0].id, message.chat.id);\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const listText = unlinkedListings\n      .map((l) => `  /link_${l.id} — \"${escapeHtml(l.book_title)}\"`)\n      .join(\"\\n\");\n    await sendMessage(\n      message.chat.id,\n      `Multiple reading groups need a Telegram link. Pick one:\\n\\n${listText}`\n    );\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Handle /link_ID command — require verified ownership\n  const linkMatch = text.match(/^\\/link_(\\d+)$/);\n  if (linkMatch) {\n    const telegramUserId = message.from?.id;\n    if (!telegramUserId) {\n      await sendMessage(message.chat.id, \"Could not identify the sender.\");\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const linkedUser = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM telegram_user_links WHERE telegram_user_id = ?\")\n      .get(telegramUserId) as { user_id: number } | undefined;\n\n    if (!linkedUser) {\n      await sendMessage(\n        message.chat.id,\n        \"Your Telegram account is not linked to a Bookmate account.\"\n      );\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const listingId = parseInt(linkMatch[1], 10);\n\n    // Verify this user is the listing author and the listing is full\n    const listing = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT author_id, is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n      .get(listingId) as { author_id: number; is_full: number } | undefined;\n\n    if (!listing || listing.author_id !== linkedUser.user_id) {\n      await sendMessage(\n        message.chat.id,\n        \"You can only link Telegram groups to your own Bookmate listings.\"\n      );\n      return;\n    }\n\n    if (!listing.is_full) {\n      await sendMessage(\n        message.chat.id,\n        \"This listing's group is not full yet. You can link a Telegram group once the group reaches its maximum size.\"\n      );\n      return;\n    }\n\n    await linkTelegramToListing(listingId, message.chat.id);\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Link a Telegram chat to a listing:\n * 1. Generate an invite link\n * 2. Save it to the listing\n * 3. Notify all members\n * 4. Send a confirmation message to the Telegram group\n */\nasync function linkTelegramToListing(listingId: number, chatId: number) {\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    await sendMessage(chatId, \"Could not find that reading group on Bookmate.\");\n    return;\n  }\n\n  if (listing.telegram_link) {\n    await sendMessage(chatId, \"This reading group already has a Telegram link set up!\");\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Try to create an invite link\n  let inviteLink = await createChatInviteLink(chatId);\n  if (!inviteLink) {\n    // Fallback: export the default invite link\n    inviteLink = await exportChatInviteLink(chatId);\n  }\n\n  if (!inviteLink) {\n    await sendMessage(\n      chatId,\n      \"I couldn't generate an invite link. Please make sure I have admin permissions in this group, \" +\n        \"then try again with /link\"\n    );\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Save to database\n  db.prepare(\n    \"UPDATE listings SET telegram_link = ?, telegram_chat_id = ? WHERE id = ?\"\n  ).run(inviteLink, chatId, listingId);\n\n  // Notify all members on Bookmate\n  const members = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];\n\n  const bookTitle = listing.book_title as string;\n  for (const member of members) {\n    createNotification(\n      member.user_id,\n      listingId,\n      \"telegram_ready\",\n      `The Telegram group for \"${bookTitle}\" is ready! Click to view the invite link.`\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Send confirmation to the Telegram group\n  // Escape book title to prevent HTML injection via Telegram's HTML parser\n  await sendMessage(\n    chatId,\n    `This group is now linked to the Bookmate reading group for \"<b>${escapeHtml(bookTitle)}</b>\".\\n\\n` +\n      `Invite link: ${inviteLink}\\n\\n` +\n      \"All group members have been notified on Bookmate. Happy reading!\"\n  );\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":114,"oldLines":25,"newStart":114,"newLines":9,"lines":["     return;","   }"," ","-  // Try to find the listing this group belongs to.","-  // Strategy 1: Check pending_telegram_groups mapping table","-  const pending = db","-    .prepare(","-      \"SELECT listing_id FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE telegram_chat_id = ?\"","-    )","-    .get(chat.id) as { listing_id: number } | undefined;","-","-  if (pending) {","-    await linkTelegramToListing(pending.listing_id, chat.id);","-    db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE telegram_chat_id = ?\").run(","-      chat.id","-    );","-    return;","-  }","-","-  // Strategy 2: Check for listings awaiting auto-telegram (most recent unlinked full listing by this author)","-  // We store the chat ID and wait for the /start command or title match","-  // For now, store the mapping and send a welcome message","+  // The bot was added to a group. Since we can't determine the listing from","+  // the my_chat_member event alone, send a welcome message and wait for the","+  // /start payload or /link command to establish the association.","   await sendMessage(","     chat.id,","     \"Hello! I'm the Bookmate bot. I'll help set up this reading group.\\n\\n\" +"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01MbzLDKa6oVajctaBrbCXqc","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01L1j9VyXDxHBjvt6ns3gp1f","name":"Edit","input":{"replace_all":false,"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts","old_string":"    values.push(listingId);\n    db.prepare(`UPDATE listings SET ${updates.join(\", \")} WHERE id = ?`).run(...values);\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });","new_string":"    values.push(listingId);\n    db.prepare(`UPDATE listings SET ${updates.join(\", \")} WHERE id = ?`).run(...values);\n\n    // Notify existing members about the listing update (non-critical)\n    try {\n      const members = db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id != ?\")\n        .all(listingId, session.userId) as { user_id: number }[];\n\n      if (members.length > 0) {\n        const bookTitle = listing.book_title as string;\n        for (const member of members) {\n          createNotification(\n            member.user_id,\n            listingId,\n            \"listing_updated\",\n            `The reading group for \"${bookTitle}\" has been updated by the organizer.`\n          );\n        }\n      }\n    } catch (notifErr) {\n      console.error(\"Notification error (update succeeded):\", notifErr);\n    }\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":445,"cache_read_input_tokens":47949,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":445},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"4c5466fa-2333-4a25-bba1-4cb6c49f2287","uuid":"eec918cf-b05a-481c-98c4-e0a5b7d98e0f"}

{"type":"stream_event","event":{"type":"message_delta","delta":{"stop_reason":"tool_use","stop_sequence":null},"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":445,"cache_read_input_tokens":47949,"output_tokens":438},"context_management":{"applied_edits":[]}},"session_id":"4c5466fa-2333-4a25-bba1-4cb6c49f2287","parent_tool_use_id":null,"uuid":"da01a195-fd89-4350-bc8f-e5123b5c2dd6"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01L1j9VyXDxHBjvt6ns3gp1f","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"4c5466fa-2333-4a25-bba1-4cb6c49f2287","uuid":"460daa9c-def2-4af1-98dc-961cfe07db08","timestamp":"2026-03-24T01:41:35.188Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts","oldString":"    values.push(listingId);\n    db.prepare(`UPDATE listings SET ${updates.join(\", \")} WHERE id = ?`).run(...values);\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });","newString":"    values.push(listingId);\n    db.prepare(`UPDATE listings SET ${updates.join(\", \")} WHERE id = ?`).run(...values);\n\n    // Notify existing members about the listing update (non-critical)\n    try {\n      const members = db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id != ?\")\n        .all(listingId, session.userId) as { user_id: number }[];\n\n      if (members.length > 0) {\n        const bookTitle = listing.book_title as string;\n        for (const member of members) {\n          createNotification(\n            member.user_id,\n            listingId,\n            \"listing_updated\",\n            `The reading group for \"${bookTitle}\" has been updated by the organizer.`\n          );\n        }\n      }\n    } catch (notifErr) {\n      console.error(\"Notification error (update succeeded):\", notifErr);\n    }\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { getSession, requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\nimport { isBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/telegram\";\nimport { isBotConfigured as isDiscordBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/discord\";\n\nexport async function GET(\n  _req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT\n        l.*,\n        u.display_name as author_name\n      FROM listings l\n      JOIN users u ON l.author_id = u.id\n      WHERE l.id = ?`\n    )\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  const members = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, lm.joined_at\n       FROM listing_members lm\n       JOIN users u ON lm.user_id = u.id\n       WHERE lm.listing_id = ?\n       ORDER BY lm.joined_at ASC`\n    )\n    .all(listingId) as { id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; joined_at: string }[];\n\n  const session = await getSession();\n  const isMember = session.userId\n    ? members.some((m) => m.id === session.userId)\n    : false;\n  const isAuthor = session.userId\n    ? listing.author_id === session.userId\n    : false;\n\n  // PRD: full listings should be invisible to non-participants\n  if (listing.is_full && !isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"This listing is no longer available\" },\n      { status: 404 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Check if the current user has an application (regardless of requires_approval,\n  // since the flag may have been toggled after the application was submitted)\n  let hasApplied = false;\n  let applicationStatus = \"\";\n  if (session.userId && !isMember) {\n    const app = db\n      .prepare(\n        \"SELECT status FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n      )\n      .get(listingId, session.userId) as { status: string } | undefined;\n    if (app) {\n      hasApplied = app.status === \"pending\";\n      applicationStatus = app.status;\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Fetch pending applicants if the viewer is the author\n  let pendingApplicants: { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[] = [];\n  if (isAuthor && listing.requires_approval) {\n    pendingApplicants = db\n      .prepare(\n        `SELECT la.id as application_id, u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, la.applied_at\n         FROM listing_applications la\n         JOIN users u ON la.user_id = u.id\n         WHERE la.listing_id = ? AND la.status = 'pending'\n         ORDER BY la.applied_at ASC`\n      )\n      .all(listingId) as { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[];\n  }\n\n  // Strip platform links and internal IDs for non-members to prevent leaking invite URLs and internal data\n  const safeListingData = { ...listing };\n  delete safeListingData.telegram_chat_id; // Internal Telegram chat ID — never expose to clients\n  if (!isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    delete safeListingData.telegram_link;\n    delete safeListingData.discord_link;\n  }\n\n  return NextResponse.json({\n    listing: {\n      ...safeListingData,\n      members,\n      memberCount: members.length,\n      isMember,\n      isAuthor,\n      hasApplied,\n      applicationStatus,\n      pendingApplicants,\n      currentUserId: session.userId || null,\n      telegramBotConfigured: isBotConfigured(),\n      discordBotConfigured: isDiscordBotConfigured(),\n    },\n  });\n}\n\nexport async function PATCH(\n  req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the author can edit this listing\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  // Cannot edit if a platform link has been shared (group already formed)\n  if (listing.telegram_link || listing.discord_link) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Cannot edit a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  try {\n    const body = await req.json();\n    const {\n      language,\n      readingPace,\n      startDate,\n      meetingFormat,\n      maxGroupSize,\n      requiresApproval,\n      platformPreference,\n    } = body;\n\n    // Validate fields that are provided\n    if (readingPace !== undefined && (!readingPace || readingPace.length > 200)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Reading pace is required (max 200 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n      if (!/^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$/.test(startDate)) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid start date format (expected YYYY-MM-DD)\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n      const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n      if (startDate < today) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Start date cannot be in the past\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n    }\n\n    if (meetingFormat !== undefined && ![\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid meeting format\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n      const size = parseInt(maxGroupSize, 10);\n      if (isNaN(size) || size < 2 || size > 20) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Group size must be between 2 and 20\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n\n      // Cannot reduce below current member count\n      const memberCount = (db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n        .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n\n      if (size < memberCount) {\n        return NextResponse.json(\n          { error: `Cannot reduce group size below current member count (${memberCount})` },\n          { status: 400 }\n        );\n      }\n    }\n\n    if (language !== undefined && (!language || typeof language !== \"string\" || language.length > 100)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Language is required (max 100 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (platformPreference !== undefined && ![\"telegram\", \"discord\"].includes(platformPreference)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid platform preference\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    // Build dynamic UPDATE\n    const updates: string[] = [];\n    const values: unknown[] = [];\n\n    if (language !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"language = ?\");\n      values.push(language);\n    }\n    if (readingPace !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"reading_pace = ?\");\n      values.push(readingPace.trim());\n    }\n    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"start_date = ?\");\n      values.push(startDate);\n    }\n    if (meetingFormat !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"meeting_format = ?\");\n      values.push(meetingFormat);\n    }\n    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n      const newSize = parseInt(maxGroupSize, 10);\n      updates.push(\"max_group_size = ?\");\n      values.push(newSize);\n\n      // Atomically set is_full based on actual member count at update time\n      // This avoids a race condition where a concurrent join could fill the group\n      // between our COUNT(*) read and the UPDATE write.\n      if (listing.is_full) {\n        updates.push(\"is_full = CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?) < ? THEN 0 ELSE 1 END\");\n        values.push(listingId, newSize);\n      }\n    }\n    if (requiresApproval !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"requires_approval = ?\");\n      values.push(requiresApproval ? 1 : 0);\n    }\n    if (platformPreference !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"platform_preference = ?\");\n      values.push(platformPreference);\n    }\n\n    if (updates.length === 0) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"No fields to update\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    values.push(listingId);\n    db.prepare(`UPDATE listings SET ${updates.join(\", \")} WHERE id = ?`).run(...values);\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Update listing error:\", error);\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n}\n\nexport async function DELETE(\n  _req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the author can delete this listing\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  // Cannot delete if a platform link has been shared\n  if (listing.telegram_link || listing.discord_link) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Cannot delete a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  try {\n    // Get members to notify (excluding the author)\n    const members = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id != ?\")\n      .all(listingId, session.userId) as { user_id: number }[];\n\n    // Delete in a transaction (notifications sent after, so they aren't wiped)\n    const deleteTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM notifications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM ratings WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    });\n\n    deleteTransaction();\n\n    // Send deletion notifications after transaction (listing_id is NULL since listing is gone)\n    for (const member of members) {\n      try {\n        createNotification(\n          member.user_id,\n          null,\n          \"listing_deleted\",\n          `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" has been cancelled by the organizer.`\n        );\n      } catch {\n        // Notification failure should not block response\n      }\n    }\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Delete listing error:\", error);\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":253,"oldLines":6,"newStart":253,"newLines":27,"lines":["     values.push(listingId);","     db.prepare(`UPDATE listings SET ${updates.join(\", \")} WHERE id = ?`).run(...values);"," ","+    // Notify existing members about the listing update (non-critical)","+    try {","+      const members = db","+        .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id != ?\")","+        .all(listingId, session.userId) as { user_id: number }[];","+","+      if (members.length > 0) {","+        const bookTitle = listing.book_title as string;","+        for (const member of members) {","+          createNotification(","+            member.user_id,","+            listingId,","+            \"listing_updated\",","+            `The reading group for \"${bookTitle}\" has been updated by the organizer.`","+          );","+        }","+      }","+    } catch (notifErr) {","+      console.error(\"Notification error (update succeeded):\", notifErr);","+    }","+","     return NextResponse.json({ success: true });","   } catch (error) {","     console.error(\"Update listing error:\", error);"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01XBJEpniLh98woRrjAxCeyw","type":"tool_result","content":"   245→  it(\"handles pending_telegram_groups mapping via my_chat_member\", async () => {\n   246→    const userId = insertUser();\n   247→    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1 });\n   248→    addMember(listingId, userId);\n   249→\n   250→    // Insert pending mapping\n   251→    testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO pending_telegram_groups (listing_id, telegram_chat_id) VALUES (?, ?)\").run(listingId, -100999);\n   252→\n   253→    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n   254→      method: \"POST\",\n   255→      body: {\n   256→        update_id: 3,\n   257→        my_chat_member: {\n   258→          chat: { id: -100999, type: \"group\", title: \"My Group\" },\n   259→          from: { id: 789, first_name: \"Author\" },\n   260→          new_chat_member: {\n   261→            user: { id: 111, is_bot: true },\n   262→            status: \"member\",\n   263→          },\n   264→        },\n   265→      },\n   266→      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"webhook-secret\" },\n   267→    });\n   268→\n   269→    const res = await POST(req);\n   270→    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n   271→    expect(status).toBe(200);\n   272→\n   273→    // Verify listing was linked\n   274→    const listing = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT telegram_link FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as { telegram_link: string };\n   275→    expect(listing.telegram_link).toBe(\"https://t.me/+invite123\");\n   276→\n   277→    // Verify pending mapping was deleted\n   278→    const pending = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT * FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE listing_id = ?\").get(listingId);\n   279→    expect(pending).toBeUndefined();\n   280→  });\n   281→\n   282→  it(\"ignores my_chat_member when bot is not added as member/admin\", async () => {\n   283→    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n   284→      method: \"POST\","}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"4c5466fa-2333-4a25-bba1-4cb6c49f2287","uuid":"2a65c9ad-53ca-41cb-ae60-917f2f66959e","timestamp":"2026-03-24T01:41:57.452Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/__tests__/api/telegram/telegram-webhook.test.ts","content":"  it(\"handles pending_telegram_groups mapping via my_chat_member\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1 });\n    addMember(listingId, userId);\n\n    // Insert pending mapping\n    testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO pending_telegram_groups (listing_id, telegram_chat_id) VALUES (?, ?)\").run(listingId, -100999);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: {\n        update_id: 3,\n        my_chat_member: {\n          chat: { id: -100999, type: \"group\", title: \"My Group\" },\n          from: { id: 789, first_name: \"Author\" },\n          new_chat_member: {\n            user: { id: 111, is_bot: true },\n            status: \"member\",\n          },\n        },\n      },\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n\n    // Verify listing was linked\n    const listing = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT telegram_link FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as { telegram_link: string };\n    expect(listing.telegram_link).toBe(\"https://t.me/+invite123\");\n\n    // Verify pending mapping was deleted\n    const pending = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT * FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE listing_id = ?\").get(listingId);\n    expect(pending).toBeUndefined();\n  });\n\n  it(\"ignores my_chat_member when bot is not added as member/admin\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",","numLines":40,"startLine":245,"totalLines":463}}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01Lt2wx8QWdBycYCPKVJPqpW","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_014eLQg3i4nT5HX5d34hQbxJ","name":"Edit","input":{"replace_all":false,"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/__tests__/api/telegram/telegram-webhook.test.ts","old_string":"  it(\"handles pending_telegram_groups mapping via my_chat_member\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1 });\n    addMember(listingId, userId);\n\n    // Insert pending mapping\n    testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO pending_telegram_groups (listing_id, telegram_chat_id) VALUES (?, ?)\").run(listingId, -100999);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: {\n        update_id: 3,\n        my_chat_member: {\n          chat: { id: -100999, type: \"group\", title: \"My Group\" },\n          from: { id: 789, first_name: \"Author\" },\n          new_chat_member: {\n            user: { id: 111, is_bot: true },\n            status: \"member\",\n          },\n        },\n      },\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n\n    // Verify listing was linked\n    const listing = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT telegram_link FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as { telegram_link: string };\n    expect(listing.telegram_link).toBe(\"https://t.me/+invite123\");\n\n    // Verify pending mapping was deleted\n    const pending = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT * FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE listing_id = ?\").get(listingId);\n    expect(pending).toBeUndefined();\n  });","new_string":"  it(\"sends welcome message when bot is added to a group via my_chat_member\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1 });\n    addMember(listingId, userId);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: {\n        update_id: 3,\n        my_chat_member: {\n          chat: { id: -100999, type: \"group\", title: \"My Group\" },\n          from: { id: 789, first_name: \"Author\" },\n          new_chat_member: {\n            user: { id: 111, is_bot: true },\n            status: \"member\",\n          },\n        },\n      },\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n\n    // Listing should NOT be auto-linked — linking requires /start payload or /link command\n    const listing = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: {\n        update_id: 3,\n        my_chat_member: {\n          chat: { id: -100999, type: \"group\", title: \"My Group\" },\n          from: { id: 789, first_name: \"Author\" },\n          new_chat_member: {\n            user: { id: 111, is_bot: true },\n            status: \"member\",\n          },\n        },\n      },\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n\n    // Listing should NOT be auto-linked — linking requires /start payload or /link command\n    const listing = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT telegram_link FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as { telegram_link: string | null };\n    expect(listing.telegram_link).toBeFalsy();\n  });","originalFile":"import { describe, it, expect, vi, beforeEach } from \"vitest\";\nimport { createTestRequest, parseResponse } from \"../../helpers/mock-request\";\n\nconst testDb = vi.hoisted(() => {\n  const Db = require(\"better-sqlite3\");\n  const db = new Db(\":memory:\");\n  db.pragma(\"journal_mode = WAL\");\n  db.pragma(\"foreign_keys = ON\");\n  db.exec(`\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      email TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,\n      password_hash TEXT NOT NULL,\n      display_name TEXT NOT NULL,\n      bio TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listings (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      author_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      book_title TEXT NOT NULL,\n      book_author TEXT NOT NULL,\n      book_cover_url TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      book_olid TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      language TEXT DEFAULT 'English',\n      reading_pace TEXT NOT NULL,\n      start_date TEXT NOT NULL,\n      meeting_format TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(meeting_format IN ('voice', 'text', 'mixed')),\n      max_group_size INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK(max_group_size >= 2 AND max_group_size <= 20),\n      telegram_link TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      is_full INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n      requires_approval INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n      platform_preference TEXT DEFAULT 'telegram',\n      discord_link TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      discord_channel_id TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      telegram_chat_id INTEGER,\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      FOREIGN KEY (author_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listing_members (\n      listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      joined_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      PRIMARY KEY (listing_id, user_id),\n      FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id),\n      FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS notifications (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      listing_id INTEGER,\n      type TEXT NOT NULL,\n      message TEXT NOT NULL,\n      is_read INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pending_telegram_groups (\n      listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      telegram_chat_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      PRIMARY KEY (listing_id)\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS telegram_chats (\n      chat_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,\n      chat_title TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS telegram_user_links (\n      user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      telegram_user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      PRIMARY KEY (user_id),\n      FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n  `);\n  return db;\n});\n\nconst mockTelegram = vi.hoisted(() => ({\n  createChatInviteLink: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(\"https://t.me/+invite123\"),\n  exportChatInviteLink: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(null),\n  sendMessage: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(true),\n  parseListingIdFromPayload: vi.fn().mockImplementation((payload: string) => {\n    const match = payload.match(/^listing_(\\d+)$/);\n    return match ? parseInt(match[1], 10) : null;\n  }),\n  escapeHtml: vi.fn().mockImplementation((text: string) =>\n    text.replace(/&/g, \"&amp;\").replace(/</g, \"&lt;\").replace(/>/g, \"&gt;\").replace(/\"/g, \"&quot;\")\n  ),\n}));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/db\", () => ({ default: testDb }));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/telegram\", () => mockTelegram);\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/notifications\", () => ({\n  createNotification: vi.fn(),\n}));\n\nconst { POST } = await import(\"@/app/api/telegram/webhook/route\");\n\nfunction insertUser(email = \"test@example.com\", name = \"Test User\") {\n  testDb\n    .prepare(\"INSERT INTO users (email, password_hash, display_name) VALUES (?, ?, ?)\")\n    .run(email, \"hash\", name);\n  return testDb.prepare(\"SELECT last_insert_rowid() as id\").get().id as number;\n}\n\nfunction insertListing(\n  authorId: number,\n  overrides: Partial<{\n    is_full: number;\n    telegram_link: string;\n    book_title: string;\n  }> = {}\n) {\n  testDb\n    .prepare(\n      `INSERT INTO listings (author_id, book_title, book_author, reading_pace, start_date, meeting_format, max_group_size, is_full, telegram_link)\n       VALUES (?, ?, 'Test Author', '1ch/wk', '2026-04-01', 'text', 5, ?, ?)`\n    )\n    .run(authorId, overrides.book_title ?? \"Test Book\", overrides.is_full ?? 0, overrides.telegram_link ?? \"\");\n  return testDb.prepare(\"SELECT last_insert_rowid() as id\").get().id as number;\n}\n\nfunction addMember(listingId: number, userId: number) {\n  testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\").run(listingId, userId);\n}\n\ndescribe(\"POST /api/telegram/webhook\", () => {\n  beforeEach(() => {\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listing_members\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM notifications\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM pending_telegram_groups\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM telegram_chats\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM telegram_user_links\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listings\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM users\");\n    vi.stubEnv(\"TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET\", \"webhook-secret\");\n    mockTelegram.createChatInviteLink.mockResolvedValue(\"https://t.me/+invite123\");\n    mockTelegram.exportChatInviteLink.mockResolvedValue(null);\n    mockTelegram.sendMessage.mockResolvedValue(true);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 500 when webhook secret is not configured\", async () => {\n    vi.stubEnv(\"TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET\", \"\");\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: {},\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"anything\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(500);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 403 when secret header is wrong\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: {},\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"wrong-secret\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(403);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 200 for empty update (no action)\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { update_id: 1 },\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n    expect(data).toEqual({ ok: true });\n  });\n\n  it(\"handles /start command with listing payload when sender is linked author\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1 });\n    addMember(listingId, userId);\n    // Link the telegram user to the listing author\n    testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO telegram_user_links (user_id, telegram_user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\").run(userId, 456);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: {\n        update_id: 2,\n        message: {\n          chat: { id: -100123, type: \"group\", title: \"Reading Group\" },\n          text: `/start listing_${listingId}`,\n          from: { id: 456 },\n        },\n      },\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n\n    // Verify telegram_link was set\n    const listing = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT telegram_link FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as { telegram_link: string };\n    expect(listing.telegram_link).toBe(\"https://t.me/+invite123\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"rejects /start command when sender is not the listing author\", async () => {\n    const authorId = insertUser(\"author@test.com\", \"Author\");\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId, { is_full: 1 });\n    addMember(listingId, authorId);\n    // Link a different user\n    const otherId = insertUser(\"other@test.com\", \"Other\");\n    testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO telegram_user_links (user_id, telegram_user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\").run(otherId, 789);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: {\n        update_id: 2,\n        message: {\n          chat: { id: -100123, type: \"group\", title: \"Reading Group\" },\n          text: `/start listing_${listingId}`,\n          from: { id: 789 },\n        },\n      },\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n\n    // Listing should NOT be linked\n    const listing = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT telegram_link FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as { telegram_link: string };\n    expect(listing.telegram_link).toBe(\"\");\n\n    // Should have sent a message about using /link\n    expect(mockTelegram.sendMessage).toHaveBeenCalledWith(\n      -100123,\n      expect.stringContaining(\"/link\")\n    );\n  });\n\n  it(\"handles pending_telegram_groups mapping via my_chat_member\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1 });\n    addMember(listingId, userId);\n\n    // Insert pending mapping\n    testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO pending_telegram_groups (listing_id, telegram_chat_id) VALUES (?, ?)\").run(listingId, -100999);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: {\n        update_id: 3,\n        my_chat_member: {\n          chat: { id: -100999, type: \"group\", title: \"My Group\" },\n          from: { id: 789, first_name: \"Author\" },\n          new_chat_member: {\n            user: { id: 111, is_bot: true },\n            status: \"member\",\n          },\n        },\n      },\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n\n    // Verify listing was linked\n    const listing = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT telegram_link FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as { telegram_link: string };\n    expect(listing.telegram_link).toBe(\"https://t.me/+invite123\");\n\n    // Verify pending mapping was deleted\n    const pending = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT * FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE listing_id = ?\").get(listingId);\n    expect(pending).toBeUndefined();\n  });\n\n  it(\"ignores my_chat_member when bot is not added as member/admin\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: {\n        update_id: 4,\n        my_chat_member: {\n          chat: { id: -100123, type: \"group\" },\n          from: { id: 789, first_name: \"User\" },\n          new_chat_member: {\n            user: { id: 111, is_bot: true },\n            status: \"left\",\n          },\n        },\n      },\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n    // No crash, just silent ignore\n  });\n\n  it(\"handles /link command with linked user and single unlinked listing\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1 });\n    addMember(listingId, userId);\n\n    // Link telegram user\n    testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO telegram_user_links (user_id, telegram_user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\").run(userId, 456);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: {\n        update_id: 5,\n        message: {\n          chat: { id: -100555, type: \"group\" },\n          text: \"/link\",\n          from: { id: 456 },\n        },\n      },\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n\n    // Listing should be linked\n    const listing = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT telegram_link FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as { telegram_link: string };\n    expect(listing.telegram_link).toBe(\"https://t.me/+invite123\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"handles /link command from unlinked telegram user\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: {\n        update_id: 6,\n        message: {\n          chat: { id: -100555, type: \"group\" },\n          text: \"/link\",\n          from: { id: 999 },\n        },\n      },\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n    expect(mockTelegram.sendMessage).toHaveBeenCalledWith(\n      -100555,\n      expect.stringContaining(\"not linked\")\n    );\n  });\n\n  it(\"handles /link_ID command with verified ownership\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1 });\n    addMember(listingId, userId);\n    testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO telegram_user_links (user_id, telegram_user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\").run(userId, 456);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: {\n        update_id: 7,\n        message: {\n          chat: { id: -100666, type: \"group\" },\n          text: `/link_${listingId}`,\n          from: { id: 456 },\n        },\n      },\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n\n    const listing = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT telegram_link FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as { telegram_link: string };\n    expect(listing.telegram_link).toBe(\"https://t.me/+invite123\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"rejects /link_ID from non-author\", async () => {\n    const authorId = insertUser(\"author@test.com\", \"Author\");\n    const otherId = insertUser(\"other@test.com\", \"Other\");\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId, { is_full: 1 });\n    testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO telegram_user_links (user_id, telegram_user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\").run(otherId, 789);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: {\n        update_id: 8,\n        message: {\n          chat: { id: -100777, type: \"group\" },\n          text: `/link_${listingId}`,\n          from: { id: 789 },\n        },\n      },\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n    expect(mockTelegram.sendMessage).toHaveBeenCalledWith(\n      -100777,\n      expect.stringContaining(\"only link Telegram groups to your own\")\n    );\n  });\n\n  it(\"ignores non-group messages\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: {\n        update_id: 9,\n        message: {\n          chat: { id: 123, type: \"private\" },\n          text: \"/link\",\n          from: { id: 456 },\n        },\n      },\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n    // No action taken for private chats\n  });\n\n  it(\"uses fallback exportChatInviteLink when createChatInviteLink fails\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1 });\n    addMember(listingId, userId);\n    // Link the telegram user to the author so /start succeeds\n    testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO telegram_user_links (user_id, telegram_user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\").run(userId, 456);\n\n    mockTelegram.createChatInviteLink.mockResolvedValue(null);\n    mockTelegram.exportChatInviteLink.mockResolvedValue(\"https://t.me/+fallback\");\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: {\n        update_id: 10,\n        message: {\n          chat: { id: -100888, type: \"supergroup\" },\n          text: `/start listing_${listingId}`,\n          from: { id: 456 },\n        },\n      },\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    expect(res.status).toBe(200);\n\n    const listing =
